| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107777474/545793056/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNjODJiZS1lODMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xwi1CTB99cZkGC0fC5sf15CrP1EWu70MHi1gtkg8WOU=)

Peter, it’s Ritchie Torres. I know these emails are annoying, but I wouldn't reach out this late if it wasn’t so important.

I’ll get to the point: **I don’t spend my days calling up mega-donors, begging for huge checks.** I spend days working for Americans — _as I was elected to do_ — and I rely on small donations from grassroots Democrats like you.

Tonight’s mid-quarter goal is to get 300 donations, and we’re coming up short. It’s not about how much we raise — _it’s about how strong our people-powered movement is._

[We still need 68 more people to step up by midnight. Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help fuel this grassroots coalition? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107777475/545793057/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250515_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNjODJiZS1lODMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xwi1CTB99cZkGC0fC5sf15CrP1EWu70MHi1gtkg8WOU=) | **[68 DONATIONS NEEDED: RUSH $3 TO SUPPORT RITCHIE TORRES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107777476/545793058/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250515_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNjODJiZS1lODMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xwi1CTB99cZkGC0fC5sf15CrP1EWu70MHi1gtkg8WOU=)**
---
With everything from Social Security to Medicaid (and more!) on the line, I’m really hoping I can count on you today, Peter.

[Here’s one more chance to donate before tonight’s mid-quarter deadline. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107777477/545793194/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250515_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNjODJiZS1lODMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xwi1CTB99cZkGC0fC5sf15CrP1EWu70MHi1gtkg8WOU=)

I can’t thank you enough,
_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Breakthrough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Jamie Raskin, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren -- with more and more powerful voices throwing their weight behind abolishing the Electoral College, we are on the verge of a breakthrough!
We deserve a popular vote system in this country to protect our democracy and our rights, from voting to choice and more. RUSH $5, $15, $25 or whatever you can to help ditch the Electoral College forever >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
MSNBC: Jamie Raskin thinks the Electoral College threatens democracy. He's right. [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
There's no greater defender of our democracy than Congressman Jamie Raskin -- and he knows the score, friend. Here's what he had to say:
“ I think that the Electoral College now, which has given us five popular vote losers as president in our history, twice in this century alone, has become a danger not just to democracy, but to the American people . It was a danger on January 6th, 2021. There are so many curving byways and nooks and crannies in the Electoral College that there are opportunities for a lot of strategic mischief. ”
The Electoral College isn’t just a vestige of the past; it is a ticking time bomb for exploitation in our democratic system. Congressman Raskin knows this, which is why he wanted the Jan. 6th Committee to propose getting rid of it. They didn't all agree, so it didn't make their list of final recommendations to Congress.
We know the vote suppressors will do anything in order to win. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $5, $15, $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=15.00&tknfa=ln6Ym4mwyXhtlz0HfxqcfmsB9hC1F7HKFPzWZsHpbC4=&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&tknfa=ln6Ym4mwyXhtlz0HfxqcfmsB9hC1F7HKFPzWZsHpbC4=&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=50.00&tknfa=ln6Ym4mwyXhtlz0HfxqcfmsB9hC1F7HKFPzWZsHpbC4=&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=100.00&tknfa=ln6Ym4mwyXhtlz0HfxqcfmsB9hC1F7HKFPzWZsHpbC4=&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=250.00&tknfa=ln6Ym4mwyXhtlz0HfxqcfmsB9hC1F7HKFPzWZsHpbC4=&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=35.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
We don’t necessarily have to wait for Congress to act, either. Movements like the one in favor of the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) -- an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia -- might end the Electoral College without a constitutional amendment.
16 states plus DC have already joined the NPVIC, accounting for 206 electoral votes and 76% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine is also moving a bill through their state legislature to join.
Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, it's clear that the Electoral College needs to go.
Help us end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=KJO3O8FqqP+uyHFCqU2ABdn2/IXxWcAlzJS/G3p/fzSZf1ue8kzVMRUwyG7UffTW6l2/3GdMWA9EOPkTrWAJoyXAFsCbRq7qF0fJCIhRcDw=]

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Just a few more hours left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| While I face a wave of threats and insults from the MAGA movement every time Trump attacks me, it’s your support that helps me continue to stand up and fight back.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8585%2E5257348%2E7h17nm)
Hi Derek — I hope this isn’t a bad time.
With tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline just hours away, I wanted to reach out one last time to ask if you could pitch in a few dollars to my campaign to help us hit our goal.
**You can use this link to pitch in:**[**secure.actblue.com/donate/q22025_abs_em?refcode=mid-month**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250515_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8585%2E5257348%2E7h17nm)
It seems like Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and right-wing extremists attack me every other day because of my work to hold them accountable and defend the rule of law. Trump’s already attacked me once this month, and who knows how many more attacks will come my way.

Friend, did you see Wendy's email?

National Republicans aren't wasting any time attacking Marcy. That means we can't waste time, either.

In a critical battleground race like ours, these early deadlines can make or break a campaign, and right now, we're on track to miss our quarterly online fundraising goals.

From: **Wendy with Team Kaptur** <info@marcykaptur.com>

Subject: Halfway
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend, May is already halfway over (can you believe it?).

Today marks more than just the halfway point of the month — it's also the halfway point of our second fundraising quarter of 2025. But we're only about a third of the way to our goal. 😱 [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107778137/545797352/1039792322?refcode=250515_team_midmay3_img&ms=250515_team_midmay3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVlNWQ5My1lOTMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlclTKpV3eVDK0TF-AvQ4NcIHU1KPlbA8ddhr6T3zGc=) MAGA billionaires and their special interest allies have a bullseye on our district, friend. They spent **$25 million** in dark money to attack Marcy last election, and they've already restarted their attacks this year.

name: Tony Evers
subject: Why I’m asking for your donation right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Republican lawmakers are voting down the solutions we know would help families.
| Derek,

I know you’ve heard a lot about what’s happening: while families across Wisconsin are struggling to afford child care and health care, **Republican lawmakers are voting down the solutions we know would help.**

The truth is, I didn’t run for governor to send good ideas into a Legislature that refuses to act. I ran to solve real problems — like helping working families afford child care, keeping kids safe at school, and making sure Wisconsinites aren’t priced out of basic health care or their property tax bill.

[**_That’s why I’m asking for your donation before midnight tonight._**](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2660?source=te_ata_em_fr_MM2_250515_t1_1&t=5&akid=7132%2E1827488%2ETKlYJZ)

Republican lawmakers have shown us exactly where they stand: **against progress, against compromise, and against the people who sent them here to lead.** This is about the idea that our government should work for regular people — not partisan interests.

If you’ve been angry about what you’ve seen from the Legislature lately — I hear you. I feel it too. And together, we can keep pushing for something better.

[**_So if you believe we deserve a government that works — I’m asking: will you chip in before our mid-month deadline? We need to raise $5,000 to push back and fight for the priorities Wisconsinites actually support._** ](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2660?source=te_ata_em_fr_MM2_250515_t1_1&t=6&akid=7132%2E1827488%2ETKlYJZ)

Onward,
Tony
---
| [ Support Tony ](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/48?t=4&akid=7132%2E1827488%2ETKlYJZ)
---
Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin.
---

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I hate this part
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Hi Peter — I’ll be honest with you: Asking for money is my least favorite part of this job. But here’s the truth — if we want to fight back against the Trump administration’s extreme agenda, protect our progress, and flip the Senate blue in 2026, grassroots donations are a critical piece of the puzzle. We’ve got to use every tool we have — our voices, our votes, and our influence — to help elect more Democrats who will stand up for our environment, our rights, and our democracy. We’re up against a Republican Party that’s more extreme, more well-funded, and more dangerous than ever. Trump and his allies are doing everything they can to roll back environmental protections, undermine reproductive rights, and hand even more power to billionaires and big corporations. We need a Senate majority that will fight for working families, not MAGA donors and fossil fuel CEOs. **[So today, I’m asking: Can you chip in $5 or anything you can before midnight to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal and power the fight to flip the Senate in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107778307/545801097/-262051991?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250515_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjczM2I0NC1lYTMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGAhU0QGvzu5pB0jp_aVJXCKL0ujStuJZlX_chmhYy4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107778308/545801098/-434956623?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250515_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjczM2I0NC1lYTMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGAhU0QGvzu5pB0jp_aVJXCKL0ujStuJZlX_chmhYy4=)

name: David Hogg
subject: I know they’re pissed about this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
What we’re doing is 100% necessary.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250515-2&t=1&akid=2143%2E587540%2EAA05zf)
Peter, I know the old guard is pissed at me right now. But what we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve is 100% necessary, so honestly? I’m willing to take the heat.
There are too many politicians on both sides of the aisle who think they own their seats in Congress for life. But those seats belong to the people of their districts. And if the people want to elect new leadership, that’s healthy for our democracy.
The Democratic Party is historically unpopular. If we want to start winning again, we have to undergo some serious changes. And that means replacing politicians who aren’t meeting this moment with young progressives who are ready to fight.
**Leaders We Deserve is investing $20 million to help power this fight in the midterms.** We’re going to elect a new generation of bold, young leaders. But I’m not exaggerating when I say that we can only make it happen with your support.
The establishment, the right-wing billionaires, and the corporate PACs are lining up to stop us in our tracks. We have to stand together and show we won’t give up.
**[We’ve got a mid-month deadline tonight at midnight and we’re still short of our fundraising goal. Can I count on you to rush in a $5 donation right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250515_2_mm?refcode=em20250515-2143&amount=5&refcode2=2143_587540_AA05zf&akid=2143%2E587540%2EAA05zf)**

Thanks for your continued support,
David
P.S. I want to personally thank a few of the supporters who power our mission. If you **[make a contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250515_2_mm?refcode=em20250515-2143&amount=5&refcode2=2143_587540_AA05zf&akid=2143%2E587540%2EAA05zf)** of any amount today, I might call you to say thank you.

name: Kim Schrier (personal)
subject: I want to be clear about where we stand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Reaching out between meetings, this is important:
Peter, I wanted to send you a quick personal note—because there’s so much at stake right now, and so many fights ahead.

To crack down on price gouging, bring down costs, build more housing, protect reproductive rights, stand up for our democracy, defend healthcare, and make sure families in our district have what they need to thrive—I’m ready to give this campaign everything I’ve got.

I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again, because this work is too important to sit out. But I can’t do it alone. Your support is and always has been the backbone of this campaign...it's what keeps us on the ground, reaching voters, holding this seat, and fighting back against extremists who are hell-bent on rolling back progress.

That's why it's crucial that I'm clear with you and tell you that we’re falling short of our mid-month fundraising goal for May. This is one of those moments where what you choose to do after opening this email will make a difference in how strong our campaign can fight—this month, and beyond. I need your help to continue to go to bat for families just like yours. Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can to help me close the gap before midnight tonight? >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107778599/545812744/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250515_mm3_fndd_gq_act___dksper_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250515_mm3_fndd_gq_act___dksper_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6c9be17c-ed31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzliZTE3Yy1lZDMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2N1zco758mBWhdPaQt1O8_BP2ranRE8WCbmq0ZHBjc4=)**

Thank you for all that you do,

—Kim

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: It’s National Women’s Health Week
body:
| | Peter – It’s National Women’s Health Week, and access to reproductive and other lifesaving care is still under threat across the country.

This is what a post-_Roe_ America looks like, Peter: Clinics and hospitals in rural communities like ours have been shuttered, leaving so many women and mothers without access to care. Maternal mortality rates continue to rise.

Yet, ultra-conservatives in the House are advancing a spending bill that cuts Medicaid and defunds Planned Parenthood, directly endangering the health and lives of millions.

Our fight for the right to choose is not over. I won’t give up until all women have access to safe reproductive and maternal care.

[We urgently need a pro-choice majority in the House to codify women’s rights to control their own bodies. Please rush in a donation to help me defend this seat and keep fighting for you in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107778732/545818622/544333919?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250515_1_1&refcode2=52180108-ef31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4MDEwOC1lZjMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUbVPit30RWENm-vTyu6z-rR2jbpGSqrXSeNP9F1UpA=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107778733/545818624/544333919?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250515_1_1&refcode2=52180108-ef31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4MDEwOC1lZjMxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUbVPit30RWENm-vTyu6z-rR2jbpGSqrXSeNP9F1UpA=)**

clean_body: | | Peter – It’s National Women’s Health Week, and access to reproductive and other lifesaving care is still under threat across the country. This is what a post-Roe America looks like, Peter: Clinics and hospitals in rural communities like ours have been shuttered, leaving so many women and mothers without access to care. Maternal mortality rates continue to rise. Yet, ultra-conservatives in the House are advancing a spending bill that cuts Medicaid and defunds Planned Parenthood, directly endangering the health and lives of millions. Our fight for the right to choose is not over. I won’t give up until all women have access to safe reproductive and maternal care. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = – Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. We need to talk, and everything I tell you MUST stay between us. If you are still reading then I'm putting my full trust in you, Peter... Here it goes; I am on pace to fall short of my May Mid-Month Goal. And we're not talking about a few nickels and dimes here, this one stings. My Team and I are thousands of dollars off from our Goal! May has been the slowest month yet and it's looking more and more like momentum is shifting. If we don't turn this around FAST I'm worried we might not be able to keep on... I don't want to see that, but the fact is; if word gets out that I missed my May Mid-Month Goal by over $14,000;WE ARE DONE FOR! Liberals will up their attacks and smear campaigns against me and my Team. Conservatives will lose hope. And we will lose this seat AND the House Majority in 2026. I'm not willing to give up so easily though. "If every real conservative reading this donated $17 or more, we would reach this crucial goal before midnight." body:
---
Derek, We’re about to ask you to [**donate directly to the DNC before our mid-month deadline tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250515_3441_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3441_22930333__LBaoi&akid=3441%2E22930333%2E_LBaoi) If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: Trump is accepting gifts from foreign governments, increasing costs for working families, and actively working to dismantle our government and democracy as it stands. **There has never been a more important time for Democrats to take action, and the DNC isn’t sitting back.** We’ve organized over 100 town halls in 47 states to talk to voters about their concerns and what’s at stake. We’ve sued Trump and DOGE. We’ve partially beat the Trump administration in court over his illegal executive order attempting to suppress voters. And we recently announced plans to send more than $1 million a month to state parties so we can organize _everywhere_ , year-round, in every ZIP code. But the truth is, these programs take a lot to keep running. When we hit our fundraising goals, we’re able to allocate resources effectively — ensuring these programs remain strong and successful and that we can continue the fight against Trump’s extremism. **That’s why reaching tonight’s mid-month fundraising goal is so important. body:
The corporate media wants your attention—and they'll say just about anything to get it.

| [No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zoicugcadrjlb756bemapu8pdo3dmlq3etdfr2k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs)

**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate media wants your attention—and they'll say just about anything to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**Now ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn’t it be nice to trust the voices you're listening to?
---|---
2. | Wouldn’t it be even better if you didn’t have to dig through biased, clickbait headlines to understand what’s really going on?
3. | How much time have you wasted trying to figure out what's true and what’s noise?

[There is a better way!](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0ci3i5use2p2i31acok9303og745uh58vo1c1t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs)

Instead of being just another victim of the mainstream media spin, listen to [**The Flyover Podcast**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjpuv4ii12ol2ijlbsog3s2knbl2uk3akjduh038_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs) — your free, go-to audio and video podcast for the day’s most important stories.

No slant. Just facts, context, and common sense conversation across politics, business, culture, and beyond. Each episode is designed to be quick, clear, and actually helpful—so you can stay informed without the BS.

🎧 -- 100% FREE
📲 -- Delivered straight to YouTube and your favorite podcast app
⏱️ -- No time wasted—just smart, unbiased breakdowns

The media landscape is shifting. People are fed up. Nearly half of Americans say they don’t trust national news organizations—and for good reason. The corporate media lost the plot.

Now, millions of Americans are finding smarter ways to stay informed.

Don’t get left behind.

[**Subscribe to The Flyover Podcast today—while it’s still free**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8vk8cvjh8lemk3p07g72607q5taimegmtesgeu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs).

\-- Flyover Team

**P.S.** _Yes, it’s free—for now. But we can’t promise it always will be. As we grow, we may need to limit access or introduce paid options to keep it sustainable. So grab your spot early—while you still can._

[**→ _Listen now and take back your news_](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbr4fp2mnflkked71huvnfchte6nf3qbd9b751bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs).**

No spin. No noise. Just facts that fly straight.

body:

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorh66c00ch09b50cd317qp1loounnnf499nhg1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs)

---
| | You won’t believe what Elon Musk just found in the $36 trillion national debt. The facts are staggering, aren’t they? $36 trillion in national debt. Inflation’s eroding the dollar. **Read this carefully, because what Elon Musk said explains why you and your cash could be caught in the crossfire.** But there’s a way to prepare. A move many people might not know exists. And you’ll be glad once you see it. Because when Elon Musk saw the national debt, he said "This amounts to over $106k per person in America." But then he nailed it:
---
# “Terrifying.”
---
| | And it’s obvious, right? Unchecked government spending likely leads to consequences for everyone. [**But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zivkvj32vnn091v3iga93p7sq1hflpo1t2ka4kdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs) Here’s why: many might not realize how these decisions could ripple through their finances. The rising debt isn’t just numbers on a screen—it’s a slow erosion of buying power, savings, and future plans. But there’s a way to potentially step outside the chaos and regain control. Within the IRS code is an obscure provision... one that might not make sense unless you understood what it really means. But the important part? This IRS provision — [**a loophole, if you will**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrd1ble3vl6so5vd0qv6t43sp96dnpbhlf5c9q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs) — could help you protect your wealth from inflation and market uncertainty. It’s straightforward, and might be a way to help build financial confidence for years to come. [**⇒ So here’s how to get it.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57rpj974abk196kotcivnn8db8uggu1dp9t0d80_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6o33clh2bs) Time may not be on your side. The debt clock is ticking. Inflation might not wait. Click below to request your **FREE IRS Loophole Kit today**. It’s fast. It’s easy. And it could make all the difference.

name: Goldco
subject: Elon Musk’s “Terrifying” $36T Debt Warning—Your Next Move Inside
body:
You won’t believe what Elon Musk just found in the $36 trillion national debt.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpdtl92i93ge2k9c01k61g78j4eeseim3f15pjg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6p72cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7qc319mrp33esl8574g5ro0cu7vufeihstke088_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6p72cth2bs)
---
| | You won’t believe what Elon Musk just found in the $36 trillion national debt. The facts are staggering, aren’t they? $36 trillion in national debt. Inflation’s eroding the dollar. **Read this carefully, because what Elon Musk said explains why you and your cash could be caught in the crossfire.** But there’s a way to prepare. A move many people might not know exists. And you’ll be glad once you see it. Because when Elon Musk saw the national debt, he said "This amounts to over $106k per person in America." But then he nailed it:
---
# “Terrifying.”
---
| | And it’s obvious, right? Unchecked government spending likely leads to consequences for everyone. [**But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqkum9na493r1crmllasvdf6h8ovn7geauvr97tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge6p72cth2bs) Here’s why: many might not realize how these decisions could ripple through their finances. The rising debt isn’t just numbers on a screen—it’s a slow erosion of buying power, savings, and future plans. But there’s a way to potentially step outside the chaos and regain control. Within the IRS code is an obscure provision... one that might not make sense unless you understood what it really means. But the important part? name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z79ae4oehbabnu4prrgh73n6688e6g372pakmgdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or2cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5s13g1b74sal5f6i0pll2ai73fk47pi1g723f6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or2cjh2bs) [NO](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zreu6fh2qcr2frbr3870rgclljkuus2m574da58o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or2cjh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zss4s9giqi3avbk2qhn43osivdssp9go1ekejeog_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or2cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrt0dqpphkbf2plskm20nomodlnnmovq7ltti91o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk9qj8cdk6mqj4t5m6gpr4t9geup72t5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5gm2or2cth238h1e8he4937c5jmco74sdh69oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8vfkg5tuc3uii37bvn1ko3onc86jjmg0ff113p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or2cjh2bs)_

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Following up on my last message.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I meant every word I wrote. This mission is personal.

| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpvjpfgigagrcjt9q382eja2h46bfdu1jjfp0s30_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I wanted to make sure you saw the message I sent earlier this week.
It came straight from my heart.
My story isn’t unique. My story is the _American story._ And I believe it _can still be true_ for the next generation _if we fight for it._
I’ve run businesses, led teams, and served my country.
But this fight — defending the promise of America — is the most important fight of my life.
_**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpr1prldr4tis1c5le59nkbiv8ugtmbriq1bfogo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)**_

---
| | [JOIN THE FIGHT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh08ckmlfabqftiohka0gtr0gcd2bud10ru4vcho_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)
---
| | I’m running for governor because we need a leader who will champion the values our country was founded on and save the American Dream for generations to come. We’re laying the foundation for a movement that’s bigger than politics. It’s about restoring American and Minnesotan greatness.
_**[Every donation you give today help me in this fight. Please chip in whatever you can today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ghkjjloo9u4gt7bscvuapde1lmphaesnt75bbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)**_
With gratitude,Kendall

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmpm2gtr2oalqcebd2tu20iqf7lmckconnm4r2j8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)
---
| | **Sender:** Kendall Qualls
**Subject:** I’ve lived the American Dream — and I want every Minnesotan to have the same chance
---
| | Dear Friend,
My name is Kendall Qualls.
I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s, a child of divorce, one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father, a man who never finished high school, just like my mother.
But despite those beginnings, I’m writing to you today as someone who’s lived the American success story, and as someone who believes this story still belongs to _you_ , and to _every American_ , regardless of race, background, or social standing.
That’s why today I announced that I’m running for Governor of Minnesota. I’m running to make sure that the principles that lifted me, hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system, are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
**_[Will you join me in this fight for Minnesota’s future by chipping in today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z25f5o5obc9bov3juc0ddauahc309mq7u4fvcpl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)_**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ts4hcevthsngviu2ebdsud0docturdf7p6r180_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)
---
| | I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
But I’ve never forgotten where I came from, and I’ve never stopped fighting for the people who are being left behind.
That’s why I founded TakeCharge, a nonprofit committed to uniting Americans around our shared values and history, and to restoring a culture that says, “You can succeed in this country because where you start in life is not where you have to stay in life.”
We promote the idea that America’s promise is available to _everyone_ — no matter your zip code, your skin color, or your family situation.
And I’ve seen that promise come true in my own life and many others.
But right now, that promise is slipping away for too many Minnesotans.
Radical ideologies are replacing faith and family with dependency and division. Bureaucrats are punishing success, pushing identity politics, and undermining the very institutions that helped me and so many others rise.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help.
Can I count on your support today? **_[Donate now to help me fight for the American Dream.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcu0s3q4rfabbct926s39dgphgj97jrqcu01kpsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)_**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zauq7pek6ua0mq3hcnikohugbpicg2j36fm29v7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)
---
| | This isn’t political for me. This is personal. I want every child growing up in Minnesota to believe they can become a doctor, a CEO, a soldier, a teacher, a business owner, _anything they dream_ , just like I did.
_**[But we need to act now. Every dollar you give will go directly toward spreading this message, engaging voters, and building the movement we need to turn the tide in Minnesota.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zemqostr8mftftfb9l0i20iceicrn6ochebm7k58_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)**_
Together, we can restore hope, revive opportunity, and reclaim the American Dream for the next generation.
Thank you for believing in this vision. I’ll never stop fighting for it.
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze72p4g1238it59upv50ddaock862kncednclamo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)
---
| | Prepared and paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
---

[Privacy Policy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmlnrhgujn51vho9acna3kkootvdkbuf5ai20qq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)
---

---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg62921cu1il0tkr7qr2vcri5v2l4joma28vs89o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5gm2or6c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zalvvi2ab11cejsmod93ism5jb82522um9lp3rp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjpl5h5bqnunngr4h0oqjbo3jc06umnlo0jdfr2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
Get ready for your blood to boil!

| | | **May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro!**

The Liberal Mob has declared all-out political war on the Trump Administration - and now they have a new target in the President's interim US Attorney in DC, Judge Jeanine.

* SNL debuted a DISGUSTING skit attacking her on Mother's Day
* A DNC operative called her an "EMBARRASSMENT"
* A prominent Liberal talking head called her a "LUNATIC"
* The Atlantic fired off a hit piece smearing her as a "PARTISAN HACK"
* The New Republic slammed her as "UNHINGED"

Judge Jeanine served as a District Attorney and has defended our values for decades. But her qualifications don't matter to the Liberal Mob.

They're going scorched earth against her anyway in a desperate attempt to:** 1)** eviscerate the reputations of Trump allies, **2) ** drive Republicans down at the polls, and ** 3) ** spin up Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

_It 's about power and money. Nothing else._

We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqreuio7ug92qidukjj0r6hdtvm4f19586btu6m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpge9or6cjh2bs "So we’re activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkmoa1hql5af5fapn98epb9b7idt08u88q7n4f9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z97kmta3k439bnb2dme0cbp7gcp9dnilqo3sm23o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvhn7q7pa1jkl6kfmdsc258ktn3melan0v023a1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1k5v6ov8416u095hclbqmtpsq4bj401hk20h590_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zju9hr3oq9vbkc2qvkrbntqktlqvmfu27fq44bko_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs)
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4p5o47q1tr3oc1eu7v673pghl381voag1c522tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpb50vbbvc8qgt9ashl85sfdns6mguj92ogol45o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv3e54dblv3o29pqnpqlc5tudhfvsgii3bdscdm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaaergf7nclbbe7h39k61u03me6btnpi8u90kv28_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqrjr0mr30penqqrlptsjhun00luhee817nn7n5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpie0pb6cdh2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---

name: Gabriela Blanco
subject: Communism stole my family. Here’s howit’s coming for yours next >>
body:
I escaped so it wouldn’t steal my future too.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zht1dno2ugnqkqpeaoioeg850f36fsc3i8gu0u9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs) Friend,

**Communism in Cuba stole my childhood.**

I escaped _**so it wouldn’t steal my future**_ too.

Now, I’m speaking out and sharing my story... so America doesn’t follow the same path to tyranny.

[Take a second to see all that I’ve been through >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0ospvenng1u1l69scgbr9rrn9dg4unhe784b3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs)
[WATCH MY STORY >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zubnjuavsgltum8ie7lbeotsfcb25vndukvcn130_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs)
Friend, for anyone who grew up in freedom,**it’s hard to imagine what life is like under a regime that controls everything.**

It’s hard to imagine a government that dictates what you say, where you go, what you buy, and even what you believe.

It’s hard to imagine the **fear** , the **desperation** , and the way families like mine have been **torn apart**.

And that’s exactly what the Far-Left is counting on: that young American _**cannot imagine**_ what I went through.

The truth about communism is being actively HIDDEN from tens of millions of American students. **The Far-Left instead wants them to believe that freedom is the problem... and _communism_ is the way forward.**

I joined the **Dissident Project** because stories like mine _must_ be heard to stop America from sliding further toward socialism and tyranny. [I need your help to share, spread, and amplify my story before it’s too late >> ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpro667ku6iff7e227mrg3k1uf3jm37fnp1p4c5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs) [WATCH NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmb8686tueo9fae2o5r37aailtrfkfvuhua5t9ho_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs)
The Dissident Project has partnered with the Reagan Foundation to launch an incredible new project called **Liberty Over Communism** —a nationwide effort to bring firsthand stories of communist oppression into classrooms across America.

**We’re reaching the next generation** , especially in schools where Far-Left ideologues are busy rewriting history and sugarcoating the horrors of communism.

And yes, some people on the Far-Left are _panicked_ by our efforts.

They know that, when students hear the truth, _**they start asking questions.**_

They recognize the value of freedom. And they stop falling for the lie that socialism is “compassionate” or “fair.”

**The future of our country depends on truth. It depends on voices like mine.** [Watch my story, Friend](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z808qqad4fc75nm4v8mg86nmtfuatpkrjr2v1udg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs)... and if it resonates with you, [chip in just $25 to the Dissident Project](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsq5bhemqqbemcbc728udimd85j4ugt7sb0555bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs)** to make sure it reaches as many young Americans as possible >>**
[SEE MY STORY & SUPPORT THE MISSION >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmhcck1verbtt0uhv4otr5719f229sq7tsblgi78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj2chh2bs)
Thank you for standing with freedom, Friend.

Gabriela Blanco
_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

clean_body: I escaped so it wouldn’t steal my future too. | | | Friend, Communism in Cuba stole my childhood. I escaped so it wouldn’t steal my future too. Now, I’m speaking out and sharing my story... so America doesn’t follow the same path to tyranny. Friend, for anyone who grew up in freedom,it’s hard to imagine what life is like under a regime that controls everything. It’s hard to imagine a government that dictates what you say, where you go, what you buy, and even what you believe. It’s hard to imagine the fear , the desperation , and the way families like mine have been torn apart. And that’s exactly what the Far-Left is counting on: that young American cannot imagine what I went through. The truth about communism is being actively HIDDEN from tens of millions of American students. The Far-Left instead wants them to believe that freedom is the problem... and communism is the way forward. I joined the Dissident Project because stories like mine must be heard to stop America from sliding further toward socialism and tyranny. The Dissident Project has partnered with the Reagan Foundation to launch an incredible new project called Liberty Over Communism —a nationwide effort to bring firsthand stories of communist oppression into classrooms across America. We’re reaching the next generation , especially in schools where Far-Left ideologues are busy rewriting history and sugarcoating the horrors of communism. And yes, some people on the Far-Left are panicked by our efforts. They know that, when students hear the truth, they start asking questions. They recognize the value of freedom. And they stop falling for the lie that socialism is “compassionate” or “fair.” The future of our country depends on truth. It depends on voices like mine. ... and if it resonates with you, to make sure it reaches as many young Americans as possible >> Thank you for standing with freedom, Friend. Gabriela Blanco The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcag69d9ml42eb55bph6kcq85c489ntng8ofp40o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z145j0c535geg5qpuh9df6ctnhskuimjhbpp715o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4clh2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z94o0igdkqi3ml36bmsqsov597011lk1uks9igvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4clh2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj5bsvg774tlddl6qbtseqc1ighv9bomcpt230k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4clh2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkrpjv5b16d9i1jebj2qrq631lk3s4sm8b114du8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4clh2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjttcmcter0oqsss6irk2a9ua285bbetqn1puamo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4clh2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd98sq0s8fj66r25df1vt34up5vi5uqcihjvdnq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4clh2bs)
---
|
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsdgh56nlsacv5r00icroubdvigmre3qe7kaousg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zttir9h25dde3bop1ebqjlbo5ppm9vc0no2qreg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4cth2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhop4ogs05fb92c84k6o91n0u5du9cdckt0j6bt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4cth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z79oi8ur98ev1oentqthg4sefosvs69vuise6ucg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cpiecoj4cth2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." That is why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: National Defense Alerts
subject: President Trump to appoint ‘Golden Dome’ Czar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
This is an important national security issue. Please read inside:

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._7UZKXtwQA) Peter,
President Trump is ramping up national defense with a historic new initiative: the “Golden Dome,” a next-generation shield to protect American cities from ballistic and hypersonic missile attacks.
Modeled after Israel’s Iron Dome and built for the scale of the U.S., this defense system would deploy **space-based interceptors, sea-based defenses, and advanced satellite tracking.**
**_Now, President Trump is weighing the appointment of a ‘Golden Dome’ czar._** This indicates that the push for America’s missile defense system is gaining serious momentum.
With China and Russia racing ahead in hypersonic weapons, President Trump is acting, but he needs to know America has his back.
**[Peter, do you support President Trump’s Golden Dome initiative?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-tdLmPVexZb_cnslK2yA)** **🇺🇸 ****_Missile Defense Flash Poll_ **🇺🇸**
Participant: **Peter
**Deadline:** Tonight at 11:59 PM
**Status:** Response Needed [ CLICK TO BEGIN
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) We’re collecting urgent feedback in the next 30 minutes. Please don’t miss your chance to weigh in.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LzWnX0bgoSEEEZzkEijzMg~~/AARclBA~/feD7dzojGITratqovnlmmF4ba8bCklehJ_tVcXPlP2AwGPzO5QfNw4DR-N7edmRKhm-CxYhMQ_Y1CyGMKS2zv54wlg5DeRHQ4f8244Aj2UFaeUgFBJW3Biv7gLwCyFsSnbqQOaGug_ZZVyntsYelDuBV2Ys4PD2yP0skINNB1M5TCyY2Ro1jInF3vQYQwOGemsZrX0REbK-kdBQKEOERRX5hWkbYmgIdjMSHOZ2STp-nKpED1rngB6XBSwBNT6_F0XRnycuGMqX_hh59caVORiYAGIqH7a0JkgQXpz6L7H7ipbUXOyS16XATuR4P2NkT)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LzWnX0bgoSEEEZzkEijzMg~~/AARclBA~/feD7dzojGITratqovnlmmF4ba8bCklehJ_tVcXPlP2AwGPzO5QfNw4DR-N7edmRKhm-CxYhMQ_Y1CyGMKS2zv54wlg5DeRHQ4f8244Aj2UFaeUgFBJW3Biv7gLwCyFsSnbqQOaGug_ZZVyntsYelDuBV2Ys4PD2yP0skINNB1M5TCyY2Ro1jInF3vQYQwOGemsZrX0REbK-kdBQKEOERRX5hWkbYmgIdjMSHOZ2STp-nKpED1rngB6XBSwBNT6_F0XRnycuGMqX_hh59caVORiYAGIqH7a0JkgQXpz6L7H7ipbUXOyS16XATuR4P2NkT) [NO](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LzWnX0bgoSEEEZzkEijzMg~~/AARclBA~/feD7dzojGITratqovnlmmF4ba8bCklehJ_tVcXPlP2AwGPzO5QfNw4DR-N7edmRKhm-CxYhMQ_Y1CyGMKS2zv54wlg5DeRHQ4f8244Aj2UFaeUgFBJW3Biv7gLwCyFsSnbqQOaGug_ZZVyntsYelDuBV2Ys4PD2yP0skINNB1M5TCyY2Ro1jInF3vQYQwOGemsZrX0REbK-kdBQKEOERRX5hWkbYmgIdjMSHOZ2STp-nKpED1rngB6XBSwBNT6_F0XRnycuGMqX_hh59caVORiYAGIqH7a0JkgQXpz6L7H7ipbUXOyS16XATuR4P2NkT) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LzWnX0bgoSEEEZzkEijzMg~~/AARclBA~/feD7dzojGITratqovnlmmF4ba8bCklehJ_tVcXPlP2AwGPzO5QfNw4DR-N7edmRKhm-CxYhMQ_Y1CyGMKS2zv54wlg5DeRHQ4f8244Aj2UFaeUgFBJW3Biv7gLwCyFsSnbqQOaGug_ZZVyntsYelDuBV2Ys4PD2yP0skINNB1M5TCyY2Ro1jInF3vQYQwOGemsZrX0REbK-kdBQKEOERRX5hWkbYmgIdjMSHOZ2STp-nKpED1rngB6XBSwBNT6_F0XRnycuGMqX_hh59caVORiYAGIqH7a0JkgQXpz6L7H7ipbUXOyS16XATuR4P2NkT)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: The Flyover
subject: Glowing Petunias, Boeing's Big Deal, and the Magna Carta
body:
For the first time, Americans can buy the bioengineered, [glow-in-the-dark _Firefly Petunias_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO8yAUhJ_GdLEON5sUFH-TLn-7JcLhGJ8VhsiwQXn7VfbyBNvNSKNP-ubt6q6eEuX43-9o21pcxl4TtoaHi6l0yvGO7SOTr0tByrEuFJ0AoU-gT3xywVN6OsWCXREFSoaWz2qWZ-CzYJuVkku1GOASuAlyEYIrHfQsbmYB1MDIvmig-cQBzpKP0quzXpXUExgwkxkUYKBWjvG9UG4brulZHniMt7KzZLfW7nWQ_wZxGcSl9z5uZcfqc4j-CJjrazeIy097pW-v068YO2y4d0qJ6jQPCuLuKX3R258ueVjxGQAA__9h3nUg)—a 2024 top invention—in brick-and-mortar garden stores nationwide.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAQgJ8Gd7b4MRgKikin7S5tSoTN2J4IgwV4V_f2kTdRXuDa7xvNjL5fn-7TY8S0_fQH2LZml-BVI7QGxW0xvzBtJ7Qroa9zBkxbnXFznHLZU9kz5YLH-OXGLtgVgIPowLJpnIShbOLdbtXsA6xBrsF4xmZD9ai9BqOoniUI2qG9t1HJFKPUCDYIPxq5jkIqqqlWmowUArZcht8ZU9thjV_5CWVY8tFFu7d2ViJ-EP4g_IHpCbUNteUCaWiw7DcXj6sdruarLEDEBxweI-HqhgcEvA4iPk6PoT99aQlK3fH85xd_nB639J74L5mmvZDC_W3AJmU449Qw3hUbzhfGiFVNZKTbfer9aftW3qflfwIAAP__TruOCA) | |
# Friday, May 16, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1868, the U.S. Senate voted [against impeaching President Andrew Johnson](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OhCAUxfGnwQ7Dl6IFxTZ2s-2WBuUqd4IwC8wY334zm32DrX_Jycn_6zbfLAaM-6c9wNQtzRHOEqBWyPMe0olxf0B9RrRlSYBxLwvus2Cio6yjvJ-dxXDNqnFmAxAgGzBcKy1HxrVovOHLMIJmY6-lXoRWnZVSbTAsAwzr6tYGzXuNdbznjI2St9KqsduU7Ho2sKEfiGLgsKbc3hPG6mELV3pBbtd0NMH4Wh-FyA8iJiKm8zxbj6WmfL2diKl6LNTZi2Kkf0LEdNiL8p6IqUC0Fahdv59YC70nH0uKNG3U4-7pmvGAQm109MDi4AAbUy5NNu5xYghYek0U2w-L4fdQ_VfFlxE_AQAA__-PRYhz) for “high crimes and misdemeanors.” He would not be fully acquitted of all charges until 10 days later. America’s gardens just got a nightlife. ## SCOTUS Debates Judges' Limits
The Supreme Court grappled Thursday with how [far federal judges can go in blocking presidential actions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOnjAQhZ_GdP5lfOFSuEhDt2lTIgODPYmxkT0s-vfpI5JH2OZrZvTpnPPrY_5wGDH5n-4AS3ueE9w1AhGU2cd8Y_In0JXQ1SUDJl8X9LMU0nBheNvNm8P4nnWz2R1AgmrAtr3u1SjaXjbBOuO0MaPe903Ixcm-V-0C3TAItwml1gbtYxOm7VohRtW-lNOj2bUynRjE0A1MC9iQcnn9zpgowB7f-RPKa81HE20gOitTP5icmJzS-8yVnhOT0yNmchIP2gdX5U8_Jqd6nQUO4Gu-CnHnc8IvqPzx8jsABSg85hvK_4_KV5f4EvP6h1O5jpMvWCgU9IH4ioRfkGrAk-eyQWFyaordzhtjxNr1TAt_OIz_EtO3Zv608m8AAAD__4qykwk), as it reviewed President Trump’s order to end birthright citizenship. The justices sidestepped the policy’s constitutionality during the day's arguments, zeroing in instead on whether a single judge can halt a presidential order nationwide. Trump’s executive orders have been blocked 40 times in the first 100 days by [multiple lower courts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O3CAUxfGnwR0jDMYfBUUad5s2pXU9vsBNMFhwvaPJ00e7r5D6SD8d_X99bB9AiXL4CSc69mXL-GoJmbFuIZUX5XAh35mg7QUph7ZT2LTSVior-3E7gNJ7G7rDeUSNpkPXT8NkFtVPuouu3-24TAbw8Ar88xgOv5gdAJbZK-XnjtyXpmw_9kotpn8YGBbrB2NHNat5nMWg8CAu9fG7UOaIPr3LJ9bHs5xdcpH5asL8EHoVeuWIkVL62oReK4Y7AVPJQq_PcleWOzAnbEKv1ig9GSWtZPiD8IJ3k76WU-5UOVYKkeWTmP5ibpEuCTXcJ2aWwLLdV8UT5bcp9NpVd1wvSonaOIlBhRPo-0TH_1X10-l_AQAA___xRI6B). Justices across the ideological spectrum voiced concern over the chaos that could result without nationwide injunctions. With a decision expected by June, the justices [appear divided](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uhDAQBOCnMd2h9foHKFykobu0KZGBNbeRwSfjnHVvH5FXSDfSSJ8083Wf7p4jH9un38mVkKaD6hmpFMrTFlPlY3tS-TnYn3MiPrZz5m1CQHMDc5N2Wj3H96Sb1QUiJNWQk53u1ACyw-bhrB70OpMCO9tFD2DXPnSmC0GhR298w-7SwEgrAQYlW-X1YIJWxkIPve2FBlq5pNx-Jz7Kg0J8pxfldkl7E92jlOcp1IfAUeBYa23nebk6geM1RuDoc-El0hWXHd-UeyURUpPd-qwcI5-2Exq23XP8U8u_rng5_A0AAP__1dZxJw) on the issue of national injunctions. For now, Trump’s order ending birthright citizenship remains on hold.
## Boeing Lands $96 Billion Deal With Qatar Airways
Boeing has locked in the [biggest aircraft order in its history](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3SnDAMQE9jOu3YxvwVFGnovrQpGYEFqy_GJrZ2d_b2GTZHSKPmzTzp6dfX_IUcOO4_8aBRtjRHepVAIpTnPaQXx_0keUTGsiTiuJeF99lq24BuwLSzRw7v2VV-3Igs1RWNpnNdPWjT2eo-Dr3ZltZ1NNSEq-nRW9v42gzrsLRL5yoeL5tuTGu0Hmpzq9ENzebqptW97tteOU2eJeXbd-Iod9rCOz0p39Z0VGG8i5xF1T-UnZSd4vtMRS6k7HSJlZ30NYxTdnoUuPqUnf7FAMffBQ4shZ8EnjDAi-UOf1Aww5YynAEjFcCDPWyPnDJcq0Hy4zg_ECQBriudAnRwRqEC3yTKTlUe_fniELi0nXJ6P5DD52j5r08_R_s3AAD__7d9kwY): a $96 billion deal with Qatar Airways for up to 210 widebody jets, unveiled this week during President Trump’s visit to Doha. The purchase includes 130 Dreamliners and 30 777Xs, with options for 50 more. Powering this fleet: more than 400 [GE Aerospace engines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkUuS2yAQQE-Ddrj4CUkLFk5iJYs4k89ilioMLbljDA4wo9LtU3Y-F5j9e931up-P09FiwLh8sVcwdU5ThLUEqBXytIS0YlxuUF8i2nJKgHEpJ1wmwURLWUu5nrzFsE2q8WYGECAbMLxTnRwY70RzNjNn0mng-uQc92KYudOgwKnOuZ71tkFzn8Zarjljg-Q7adXQzkq2mvWs1z1RDDzWlHc_E8Z6hjls6RXyzqVrE8y51lshck_ESMS4ruvuavMFanEZIP7BiBh_vaQKRIylJnchYvx4oPvD96cfX_fvD1T1QhIx3tuJGL_ZajPdY17tVujRXqDQT1hqyujoB7Ch0M82L1Aqffe4CX1GD6fkN_qUPWSKkWL952zURv9f-EtSNQy6Z_K-tcnG31YMAYvuiGLL1WJ4xNU3feTViN8BAAD__z0uoDM), making it the largest widebody engine order GE has ever received. The deal is part of broader U.S.-Qatar agreements totaling over $243 billion and is projected to support around 154,000 U.S. jobs annually, bolstering America’s aerospace industry during a key recovery phase.
## Glowing Petunias Hit U.S. Stores
For the first time, Americans can buy the bioengineered, [glow-in-the-dark Firefly Petunias](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO8yAUhJ_GdLEON5sUFH-TLn-7JcLhGJ8VhsiwQXn7VfbyBNvNSKNP-ubt6q6eEuX43-9o21pcxl4TtoaHi6l0yvGO7SOTr0tByrEuFJ0AoU-gT3xywVN6OsWCXREFSoaWz2qWZ-CzYJuVkku1GOASuAlyEYIrHfQsbmYB1MDIvmig-cQBzpKP0quzXpXUExgwkxkUYKBWjvG9UG4brulZHniMt7KzZLfW7nWQ_wZxGcSl9z5uZcfqc4j-CJjrazeIy097pW-v068YO2y4d0qJ6jQPCuLuKX3R258ueVjxGQAA__9h3nUg)—a 2024 top invention—in brick-and-mortar garden stores nationwide. Developed by Idaho biotech startup Light Bio, the petunias emit a natural green glow at night using genes from a luminous mushroom. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1q8zAUgOGrkbeYox__DRo--DBkSJcOpZOR7SP5tLIULCXCd1_SW-j8wjO8H7fpZshTcG9mR51tnAKW5DFnPCbnY6Hg7pgfgUyaI1JwaSY3CRDNBZoLb6fVkD8nVa3aIgqUFWreqU4OwDtRbdp2g1qgX9QwW8TegjXSysHyde5n3kFF-qVBw1sOMEheS6OGxirZtNBD3_ZMAa6U41F_RQp5Q-vP-MSjXuJeeb3lfE9M_mNiZGIspdRnfOTHjK_OxJi2eOTExPj_Or5_075ct8_q0Ou9kPeU2o4pcLsh_-vlP014avETAAD__y7NcKs). They were approved by the USDA in late 2023 and are sold only as live plants, not seeds or bulbs. The flowers retail for about [$14 each in compostable pots](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2K2zAYAJ_Gvn1B_04OPiwt6h6arqELPRol-ix_rSwZS4nZty9uH2Hvw8DMr-t4dRQphR9uwb5OeUy4l4i14jaGmHdKYcX6SOTKLSOlUG4URsGEBqaBm9E7ih-jan0_IQqULfa8U528MN6Jdu5dp8ytOytzv98M59xzdE6bi54mJr1ULfWHjWluOGMXyU_SqYuelNSGndnZnBvF0FPN2-l3plRnnOJHfuJ2uueljf1c61oa-dII2wi77_tpzgt6XHM9iEbYtRH2Sy7VgXXbUsDSdjhg-B8G3-mJ8PaoPucNhuhSBUqg9LLAFcsMQ3wEeHkG-DnTulIK8IoU5goazEG-uxhBwuDuf2AAawf4BsPbOzAJr18bYaVUHeNKqnbr_bpTjFRM1ygWFkfxX0b91PtnL_4GAAD__0_FlWs) at more than 200 garden centers, including select Home Depot locations. Previously available only online, they are hitting shelves in time for the peak spring planting season.

clean_body: For the first time, Americans can buy the bioengineered, —a 2024 top invention—in brick-and-mortar garden stores nationwide. | | | | | | Friday, May 16, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1868, the U.S. Senate voted for “high crimes and misdemeanors.” He would not be fully acquitted of all charges until 10 days later. America’s gardens just got a nightlife. Firefly Petunias— and ready to show—have arrived in stores. Read more below. Would you add these glow-up petunias to your garden? Reply to this email and let us know! We're flying today with , the revolutionary battery technology that you can invest in now. | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | SCOTUS Debates Judges' Limits The Supreme Court grappled Thursday with how , as it reviewed President Trump’s order to end birthright citizenship. The justices sidestepped the policy’s constitutionality during the day's arguments, zeroing in instead on whether a single judge can halt a presidential order nationwide. Trump’s executive orders have been blocked 40 times in the first 100 days by . Justices across the ideological spectrum voiced concern over the chaos that could result without nationwide injunctions. With a decision expected by June, the justices on the issue of national injunctions. For now, Trump’s order ending birthright citizenship remains on hold. Boeing Lands $96 Billion Deal With Qatar Airways Boeing has locked in the : a $96 billion deal with Qatar Airways for up to 210 widebody jets, unveiled this week during President Trump’s visit to Doha. The purchase includes 130 Dreamliners and 30 777Xs, with options for 50 more. Powering this fleet: more than 400 , making it the largest widebody engine order GE has ever received. The deal is part of broader U.S.-Qatar agreements totaling over $243 billion and is projected to support around 154,000 U.S. jobs annually, bolstering America’s aerospace industry during a key recovery phase. Glowing Petunias Hit U.S. Stores For the first time, Americans can buy the bioengineered, —a 2024 top invention—in brick-and-mortar garden stores nationwide. Developed by Idaho biotech startup Light Bio, the petunias emit a natural green glow at night using genes from a luminous mushroom. . They were approved by the USDA in late 2023 and are sold only as live plants, not seeds or bulbs. The flowers retail for about at more than 200 garden centers, including select Home Depot locations. Previously available only online, they are hitting shelves in time for the peak spring planting season. Her trial is set for July 21. () ➤ Former Biden officials expressed awe and surprise at President Trump's foreign policy moves this week in the Middle East, praising his speed and disregard for diplomatic norms. () ➤ Vice President J.D. Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio will represent the U.S. at Pope Leo XIV’s inaugural mass Sunday in Vatican City. The White House was mum on whether President Trump would attend. () | Flying together with our sponsor This Battery Element Is 2X Better Than Tesla’s As the demand for home energy storage is projected to surpass $20B+ by 2026 , Tesla’s Powerwall holds an estimated 62% of the home battery market. But it runs on lithium - a material that is flammable, hardly recyclable, and lasts 10 years. That’s why that lasts 2x longer than Tesla’s. The same technology is already powering major cities and power plants across the globe. StorEn has engineered it to be compact enough to fit inside a garage and power homes for ~20 years. This 100% recyclable battery is such a breakthrough, StorEn projects $11M+ in revenue from pre-orders already.
