name: Crystal Cavalier
subject: 🌱 A Personal Update & Invitation to Cultivate the Future Together
body:
In memory of my mother, we continue the work—join us to grow healing at YESA Farm June 7. | | | **Dear 7 Directions of Service Family,** It is with a heavy heart that I share some deeply personal news. My beloved mother passed away unexpectedly on **Monday, May 12, 2025**.
Losing her has been like losing a part of myself. She was not only my mother but my best friend and grounding force—the reason I’ve done much of this work. I thank you from the bottom of my heart for your patience and grace as I navigate this time of grief and remembrance. Even through this heartbreak, she would want me to continue our shared mission of community care, cultural preservation, and environmental justice. So I write to you today in that spirit.
## 🌿 **Cultivating the Future: YESA Farm Benefit Event**
Join us for an evening of **culture, connection, and community healing** to support the YESA Farm and its vision of food sovereignty and Indigenous leadership. 🗓 **Date:** Saturday, June 7, 2025
🕓 **Time:** 4:00–7:00 PM
📍 **Location:** YESA Farm, Alamance County, NC
🎟️ **Tickets include dinner and drinks** You’ll enjoy:
✔️ A **shared meal**
✔️ A **silent auction** of handmade & local goods
✔️ **Storytelling** from those tending the land and growing the future of YESA Your support will help us:
🌱 Expand our garden beds
🌱 Build a seed bank
🌱 Restore a historic community space
🌱 Provide meaningful programming for **youth and elders**
## 🛍️ **The Online Auction Is Now LIVE!**
Bidding opens **today at 8:00 AM EST** and will close on **June 6**.
🛒 **Winners can pick up their items at the June 7 event!** 🔗 **Bid on auction items:** [https://givebutter.com/c/zPXwDE/auction](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxUDfkOJKjLt3RfEVrnWMbNsEo0zHDkj8fwAzx8n8YtsnuhVlmO-jGxdcW_HmXZYj0FWL0bGo70-2Zrqk7bzFULHk9ohbbLOssyXcCtqB2FbgEkx3gF4aKrRpiJJkvOrZnTxmlV-dhZZYIfvmeuLDogcA0-FWtMTad88UEOMQ3PU5MIEEWN-MldVu1RsCPDPNSE6eD7n9cvCtjKHlLb_XiLGS4oaSL1JqYHQXVVs164vwZoxLZPRyCOmVxueRMHTrN_6NN0eZmy9yVduH0BWrtRqdivJpo_lRV9IFW-16_WcDiS2OKxIssvi-_y3f5eH93vBtdCguaClsCINaOw42bmMXDQ-pbfi98uYT2_bRuRPi/4gj/EDF5itIATgq8z4ZyepDGtw/h0/h001.I92z5-3lDb58fgzzYnwPbI8ws0qBGMCzXkncd9F_-xM)
🎟️ **Donate or buy your event tickets here:** [https://givebutter.com/c/zPXwDE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxUDfkOJKjLt3RfEVrnWMbNsZwmE3zX3xwn_ciOTbVCuwJgvq7hXC5Sqb3leae1a1fyQ9YGYw93SZhNWkxXXV1NvGmR5WHzifFx4A2HhV1gOCNIuQMZMX9P1EtswYqLn3iygwdySvIJ36oywPmM3ri59VKCiBFkSv7BIWv7e6Lv-bqKqxJzna0x8uODHF-MJk4BBpQ15NBPjsBNaHqU6rUgVsZ7b5MugQv7umzAaeVMNPozZK4__ulkZ1jciIpob7GepsfsmN-s_vo9SXnHWQwnU1a98CuW75U9D6Sy_-MMi5lJLi5FnQkvE0-cUFmXFNWU_igEv-tACI8jpaZE7Sx1w4Figde8XsYFzz1iu6RiRA/4gj/EDF5itIATgq8z4ZyepDGtw/h1/h001.ShiYoVuMRkMrA7j_YhiBfqgCkCKq4tU-6RdnLi_IKDM)
## 💪🏽 **Still Holding the Line Against Pipelines**
We are still actively fighting the **Mountain Valley Pipeline Southgate extension** and the **Southeast Supply Enhancement Project (SSEP)**. Despite increasing pressure, our work protects land, water, and sacred sites from environmental destruction. Earlier this year, we faced additional challenges—**two federal EPA grants were put on hold and ultimately terminated** in **January and May**. This has made our work harder, but not impossible. We are still here, organizing and defending what’s sacred.
## 💖 **Thank You for Standing With Us**
Your support—whether through attending events, donating, or simply spreading the word—means the world to us, especially during these challenging times. My mother’s strength is with me, and I feel yours too. Let’s keep going. Let’s keep growing. With deep gratitude,
**Crystal Cavalier**
Co-Founder, 7 Directions of Service
📧 crystal@7directionsofservice.com
📞 (336) 221-4084

subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yn6Svn5Gw7zt0TQV9Fokpw~~/AARclBA~/FiEGj8zX7NBCaDRAN-PVLZTnFdnZ6FkH4-gRBKZ1eYojKSj_CrTsA_Q2om_G-64sMHUfufEB-rVJsvR0ovLb_smPDT2Lm5tFIFrqQGHcAUz8dIy1KoRnPUrPu23vgKaPrmX3FDj8nB3sWYuOxb4Oni8MegFpRDMqBAWgHmjsRSOuZ6BcVqfI_gBQ8kDqEqrtb270y-KEHnw9Io4uFKqD8w~~) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yn6Svn5Gw7zt0TQV9Fokpw~~/AARclBA~/FiEGj8zX7NBCaDRAN-PVLZTnFdnZ6FkH4-gRBKZ1eYojKSj_CrTsA_Q2om_G-64sMHUfufEB-rVJsvR0ovLb_smPDT2Lm5tFIFrqQGHcAUz8dIy1KoRnPUrPu23vgKaPrmX3FDj8nB3sWYuOxb4Oni8MegFpRDMqBAWgHmjsRSOuZ6BcVqfI_gBQ8kDqEqrtb270y-KEHnw9Io4uFKqD8w~~)
[Donate >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yn6Svn5Gw7zt0TQV9Fokpw~~/AARclBA~/FiEGj8zX7NBCaDRAN-PVLZTnFdnZ6FkH4-gRBKZ1eYojKSj_CrTsA_Q2om_G-64sMHUfufEB-rVJsvR0ovLb_smPDT2Lm5tFIFrqQGHcAUz8dIy1KoRnPUrPu23vgKaPrmX3FDj8nB3sWYuOxb4Oni8MegFpRDMqBAWgHmjsRSOuZ6BcVqfI_gBQ8kDqEqrtb270y-KEHnw9Io4uFKqD8w~~)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q5haSxKZeta-2R_haIGLAA~~/AARclBA~/a2ntS66BQXhYNKWGQ0TD4G7fEUtQRJdTywQ14DzEGG6kW8jHVV5-TJsRjzTYmen0bdceL7PolzfrzO8Svde-E3wIT9EL-PpFv7GzYD0ndy4qw9Ein721CgKEe2jBuRIc0CxxXkcWV33rq7iAhkgq4uRRsKFrFx3uSE1wFxmVSW4tqGK-7QhTnGn3MnaMwkGpuh9do5QlaFMzncMeu73VDQ~~)

Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yn6Svn5Gw7zt0TQV9Fokpw~~/AARclBA~/FiEGj8zX7NBCaDRAN-PVLZTnFdnZ6FkH4-gRBKZ1eYojKSj_CrTsA_Q2om_G-64sMHUfufEB-rVJsvR0ovLb_smPDT2Lm5tFIFrqQGHcAUz8dIy1KoRnPUrPu23vgKaPrmX3FDj8nB3sWYuOxb4Oni8MegFpRDMqBAWgHmjsRSOuZ6BcVqfI_gBQ8kDqEqrtb270y-KEHnw9Io4uFKqD8w~~)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yn6Svn5Gw7zt0TQV9Fokpw~~/AARclBA~/FiEGj8zX7NBCaDRAN-PVLZTnFdnZ6FkH4-gRBKZ1eYojKSj_CrTsA_Q2om_G-64sMHUfufEB-rVJsvR0ovLb_smPDT2Lm5tFIFrqQGHcAUz8dIy1KoRnPUrPu23vgKaPrmX3FDj8nB3sWYuOxb4Oni8MegFpRDMqBAWgHmjsRSOuZ6BcVqfI_gBQ8kDqEqrtb270y-KEHnw9Io4uFKqD8w~~) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

Make no mistake: They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for. They failed. SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. Have you ever read Ayn Rand's Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers." Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets." Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Fastest Growing Cities, Flag Football, and Baby Bobcats
body:
Seven of the fifteen fastest-growing cities in the U.S. are in Texas, according to [newly released data](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGSrCAQxvHTYKYFiDoGBC8xm5duaDXSIlUoFt2rM7ffmr3CXuD71ff_es5PiCke4T_saPm15vnAmxIyY5lXIEbiUPIdj7BEjkhrgrDOWuqull2t-tlDTO_ZVN466UdVoVWDGdqxbdu-2mz_MDgoGJ12g3uYbly61YzeLN4Z1DBW0X7GZKd6paRWpunQAcDgFPiH870TRqKPnEvDGzK-gNb0zheWZsl7lezGfJJo_wk9CT3d990seNA3NSFfQk-fPyXnXejpLEhUF0wIhCT09JGFnq54MASstdSmPvOJxM3Ge6qK9ecdU4rUD8LIsENMvyr_rdVl9U8AAAD__4qVf4I) from the U.S. Census Bureau. The analysis examined cities with populations of at least 20,000 during the period between July 1, 2023, and July 1, 2024.

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO4yAUhJ8Gd4m4GBwXFCut3GXbLa0DHBwkMBGcXPz2v5JX-MuRRjP6vv_X9Qopp337BwUtvWNdd3z1jETY1gidsNPW6ivtm0-UsMcMW1wll_rE9UmYNUDKxzoOwToeZjGgFdM4qVkpZYabVXrSs4mj89OF42xA--B0CHPw4MU4D8l-xrgWRgguxXjW6ABgcgLCxQXj2MgxJKrtTDckfEOP-ahPbGdfy5DtjejemfrD5MLkQu2oDQLu9CifApOLr3tnaoEY1xSY-qsEk6Y_3DfEXHKnD3S_F0i7MAUOqYdmw_2Vck7dTGzkW4GUv4f0O01PK38CAAD__1C0fi8) | |
# Friday, May 16, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1902, [Texas Ranger Anderson Yancey Baker](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2uqzAQxfHVmA7kLyAULl5Dl9feEo3xACM5OLJHcdj9VbKFW_2r8yvOz325A0U69__wQMfvLS0n1hKRGfOyQWEsvOdU6dxXYsKyRdi3RUvdt7Jv1bAEoHgttgnOyzCpBp0a7WgmY8zQHM5vxq_KTDhBmLwZV6lQaW0nfxsAg2zIfTDZq0EpqZXtevQAMHoF4ebD4IWVGIhT7vhAxjeULV7phblb06OJ7mB-FmH-CT0LPddaOy4HpDPSiV3Ku9Dzd9UGuFp_fSL0jCfnT61RTXbhWSlGKsMorNwfQPGL898ueTn9GwAA__--_3bq) killed suspected cattle rustler Ramón de la Cerda on the King Ranch, igniting a feud that cost the lives of several more men. Baker was eventually acquitted of murder and became the political boss of Hidalgo County. New data from the Census Bureau confirms what you probably already knew: Texas cities are among the fastest-growing in the country, and five of the top 15 are in DFW. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8GuoySEMJQpLiGbq-9EpmJA9ZlkhXxLMvbn4JG9wLb-fcn_9LnPx_zB1CktP6GJzr-DnlOeJSIzLjPAQpj4XXPB6X1QUxYQoQ1zFrqXsheKDt7oHjOpvVukX5ULTo1mKEbu66z7ebs0gcweO8G0PfeK2NGr4K0iCNoa8aWXC2TvbJKSa3MrccFAIZFgb8v3i6NkeiJ837jDRm_oYR45i_cb4_8bKPbmD9L0_1q9NTo6TiO26tUiYobPdWx0dOChUVhYKzpqmn0BDvTI16r_0p95RuKt71464sH8SkoicpeoggqV6pNApIXxEWkzBfPCcWZXzsK3ij9rec5tLvznwfFSMUOjZHrEyheEvyz1385_S8AAP__WgmbJQ) in today's _Roundup_. Today's sponsor is [Oradentum](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO4yAUhJ8Gd4m4GBwXFCut3GXbLa0DHBwkMBGcXPz2v5JX-MuRRjP6vv_X9Qopp337BwUtvWNdd3z1jETY1gidsNPW6ivtm0-UsMcMW1wll_rE9UmYNUDKxzoOwToeZjGgFdM4qVkpZYabVXrSs4mj89OF42xA--B0CHPw4MU4D8l-xrgWRgguxXjW6ABgcgLCxQXj2MgxJKrtTDckfEOP-ahPbGdfy5DtjejemfrD5MLkQu2oDQLu9CifApOLr3tnaoEY1xSY-qsEk6Y_3DfEXHKnD3S_F0i7MAUOqYdmw_2Vck7dTGzkW4GUv4f0O01PK38CAAD__1C0fi8), offering health advice to promote dental health.

## Texas Cities Among Fastest-Growing in U.S.
Seven of the fifteen fastest-growing cities in the U.S. are in Texas, according to [newly released data](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGSrCAQxvHTYKYFiDoGBC8xm5duaDXSIlUoFt2rM7ffmr3CXuD71ff_es5PiCke4T_saPm15vnAmxIyY5lXIEbiUPIdj7BEjkhrgrDOWuqull2t-tlDTO_ZVN466UdVoVWDGdqxbdu-2mz_MDgoGJ12g3uYbly61YzeLN4Z1DBW0X7GZKd6paRWpunQAcDgFPiH870TRqKPnEvDGzK-gNb0zheWZsl7lezGfJJo_wk9CT3d990seNA3NSFfQk-fPyXnXejpLEhUF0wIhCT09JGFnq54MASstdSmPvOJxM3Ge6qK9ecdU4rUD8LIsENMvyr_rdVl9U8AAAD__4qVf4I) from the U.S. Census Bureau. The analysis examined cities with populations of at least 20,000 during the period between July 1, 2023, and July 1, 2024. Leading the way is [Princeton in Collin County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAUBODTmMzIfvgHAgebkM2mG6Jn_ExbMjCyzTB9-1Xv9g0mLqlUX_35WD4w5XRsv3En177juRx010ytUVki1ka1beW807GtqSWqMeMWFxCgudBcmiVgys9FdcF5ESbZkZNW2WEahsF0D6d8QIGgQXhLOk5ikjT4MCqjPYIZuuReZUJLI6UAqXpNHhGtlxhGH4xnSlBI7Sx9e1Cjb6wxP88vKv167l12j9Y-Kxt-MZgZzPd993dEfIUMZiwtrZkYzC8XgzmfK2YG89vG3zj-X8evynGnklbkKx31qtxfhfDiARsymGG0PPgx6mAFVx4sV2GMHNGMHKRWnrQ2KKauuPB5p5xTNZYpse2Y8r_B7Wc3fzn4GwAA___mxZFi), growing from 28,336 to 37,019 residents—a rate of 30.6%. Collin County is home to three other fast-growing cities: Celina (No. 4 at 18.2%, pop. 51,661), Anna (No. 5 at 14.6%, pop. 31,986), and Melissa (No. 11 at 10%, pop. 26,194). [Fulshear in Fort Bend County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOqzAQhp_GdCDfMKFwcRq6nHZLNOAxGa3BCM-G5O1X5BW2_m_6v6_7eAdKtC3_YUXPr5jHDc-SkBmPMUJhLLwc-aRtmYkJS0ywxFFL3dayrZUbA1B6j7YKfpKhVxV61dnO9MYYVz28w5uZ3Gzn2ZrQS9fG1kjs0cgWTHS2In-VyVY5paRWtmlxAoBuUhBuU3CTsBIDcT4afiDjC0pM7_zEo5nzWiX_YN6LMP-EHoQezvNsvl-wXaLQw_VG6OETE3rQUtt6Jn7Xe95_EjDlrcbCtALjZagOH_aTUqLiOmHlsgKlzxD_Dc_T698AAAD__8fVeq8) was No. 2, growing at a rate of 26.9% to increase its population to 54,629. Rockwall County’s Fate (No. 8) grew its population to 27,467 at a rate of 11.4%, and Hutto in Williamson County (No. 13) grew its population to 42,661 at a rate of 9.4%. "_It's affordability. That’s really the driving factor_ ," [said Princeton Mayor Eugene Escobar](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8GuoySEMJQpLiGbq-9EpmJA9ZlkhXxLMvbn4JG9wLb-fcn_9LnPx_zB1CktP6GJzr-DnlOeJSIzLjPAQpj4XXPB6X1QUxYQoQ1zFrqXsheKDt7oHjOpvVukX5ULTo1mKEbu66z7ebs0gcweO8G0PfeK2NGr4K0iCNoa8aWXC2TvbJKSa3MrccFAIZFgb8v3i6NkeiJ837jDRm_oYR45i_cb4_8bKPbmD9L0_1q9NTo6TiO26tUiYobPdWx0dOChUVhYKzpqmn0BDvTI16r_0p95RuKt71464sH8SkoicpeoggqV6pNApIXxEWkzBfPCcWZXzsK3ij9rec5tLvznwfFSMUOjZHrEyheEvyz1385_S8AAP__WgmbJQ). Princeton has temporarily paused new residential development to avoid putting too much strain on local infrastructure, but Escobar estimates there are plans to build 10,000 new homes when the moratorium is lifted.
## New Rules for Galveston's Jeep Weekend
Thousands of people are expected to visit Galveston over the next few days for Jeep Weekend. Officials have [laid down some new rules](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1y5CAUhE-DMqbg8TsBwSbKvOmGqifx0LBmxBTCxr79lvYKTruru7q_P2_LG-aSj_03Pin0r1SXg8ZZqHdqS8Kz09n3Vkc-9i33TGcquKcFBBguDJd2iZjL96KnGFYR73KiIJ126q6UstMjgNJCeIMETnh_iTZZJ5yViZKOYsrhKhNGWikFSH0ztCKiWyVGv0a7Mi0o5l7brT-o0xeeqXzXT2q3rT6nEh69v06mfjGYGcxjjNv7o35cJoMZW89bIQbz9YvBXOqGhcH8l-jFB9E7HZEXHJyOLdX2pKPzRvtHwZ7rcSXAGw7KGU934oDCcX13G_dOeY5aObPGVSTQUwvxNXIp-bSOabE_MZf_G_vPyH4G-BcAAP__CtWLUg) in an effort to prevent the unruly behavior and violence that have plagued the annual event in years past. Authorities arrested at least a hundred people in Galveston County each of the past three years, and one person was [killed in a shooting last year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSpCAYBOCn0YwpQYTdgOASs730QusXfpRbBqbgV8a3v_JeYfOvurr7z9fyBSGGtP2GJxp6-7wkbDUiEZbFQyWstJXcQtpsoIDVR9j8IgYxsWFiXC0OQrwW2TuzDu6T92i4lnr8HMdR9btBbZVQXGqptYNJe6Utov2QguOEE_TB3GHDxBXng-DyMeEKAHrl4D5Wp9ZODugC5fKgHQnfUH288onlYfOzj2YnetVu_NWJuRNza-3h81uoPR-VcrpRJ-Z7VSfmv4gv1hC_MTlmC9hvl1tiG8QTb81sPhJdrO5YgvcswlVZPoglbKwcESsrubmL4YmJ-mLcq4UYQ1W6k8P2hBD_t6KffXka8S8AAP__k-eN6A). On some roads—including the beach—[traffic is restricted to one direction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuS2yAUhp8GdWi46LJbUKSh27QpNQc4SGQxeODYst8-o7zCNn_1zX_787V9Qcqp7L_hhoZesW4Fz56RCNsWoRN22ls9U9l9ooQ9ZtjjpoSauZi5XLYAKb-3aQjGifApBzRynVb9qbVehsO4NUQ5RYiovQz-Q8EqnHbRab2I6KchmctMzHKRUig5jTM6AFidhPDhwuLYJDAkqm2kAwlf0GN-1ye20dfbkM1BdO9M_2LKMmXP8xx9Tv5bHfXRqZaLYspes5iyuXrITNkrkykrLpGCKbtDfuLFc18fhd68H9hSjBxKqY_isfOGnVrylGrpHA6EwGvkfxHv_ET8xhKYskMz4X6mnFNfVjaJ_QYp_29KP_v3adS_AAAA__-_J5KA), and no parking or stopping is allowed. Other rules include a ban on mass gatherings, bonfires, and golf carts or ATVs on the beach. Over 400 officers from 14 agencies are expected to patrol the event. “ _You need to follow our rules, and you need to obey the law. And if you choose not to, we will find a place for you in our Galveston County jail_ ,” [said Sheriff Jimmy Fullen](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO2yAUBeCnwRsRYIPtwUMXb3_XjtaFe7HpTyACGpK3r9JX6Hp0dKTv_Po6viDEkM6fcKetvXw-EvUaqTUqh4faqLaz5B7S6UILVH2E0x9KKM2F5tIcCCG-j2nAzQpc5UCbnKd5XMdxNMO1jQKtQg_r4mEGxMmtiyLp9SjAamOGsH3GhJZGSqHkdNNkAWC2EnCxaCybBGFoudzaRY1eUH185yeVm8v3IW5Xa4_Kxh9M7UztvfebVB9Eyv3TYGqH0oKLxNT-yZnaY3YQmdpPiE-qLSfu8p_U3rxeVIL3HMlFKFS5K-C-MffE4SJAnj3_TfTgneibEjK1a6G40MauJB0nRZ5PchR8dRa5XhCJANDAMpQNHz3EGKqZ2STOO4T4j9D-7_jnpv4GAAD__wOcmag).
## UTA Launching Women's Flag Football
UT Arlington will [launch a women’s flag football varsity program](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQhU9DdWOI1J9dqHCQqNsUSZFSGIlDeQKKFMhZc_f2gQzkBNsNMHgP7_v-vM1vyJ7D9hN3GuXDxTlQyZ5EKM0Os1CWLcXCYVtZmLLzuLnZ1KaDugPdzxbZf85tZceltjdd0aiHdmhuTdP01WMcyPVOa2tbu2rjOnsb3NVe3XWtW-1MW_F4ltWd7rWujW4vHS2IOCwa7XWx_aLamixLTBd5kNAHZuc_45PSZY175ceHyJFVc1dmUmYqpVz2HM6fMhMFeM_KTPmISc7DxSgLeq_M9C6A6WSXGEAirIlQCBynLGD5yZljAA0l7hQgw0kO__MghDtwgNcgZSZMcL_rH7-efw_VTHFlq5rv306zVPJvSkeVRnsU9p5zP6i23nZk_0KQr4l_juZfAAAA___OZpvM) in 2027, making it the fifth NCAA Division I university in the country—and the first in Texas—to do so. UTA President Jennifer Cowley made the announcement at a community event yesterday afternoon. More than 500,000 girls between the ages of 6 and 17 in the U.S. are estimated to play flag football, and about [65 colleges in the country](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAQhU-DOywY8F9BsY27bLulNRhwkDBEZjZObr9yrrDFTPX06b3v57bcMKaYt2_cvaFXKEv2Z02eyB9LwEq-0naUM-ZtjRR9DQm3sICAjouOy35xGNN70Y0zVrhJNt7IQQ9qUkr1zd30GKZOujBpBTBKcMpjGNbBrsKNcpRNNBdMdLKXUoDUbectIg5Wohut6y3TwrtI5Wjp7sm_sIb0Lk9_tGvZm2TuRI_K1BeDmcF8nmdbbUaKJV8BBvPFZzBfJ68HWispVM9g_uD4tYmHUshiSvwsu8-V5xWR_xLH4_JDJfMnHjXSm4OAoTmMe5wxpVj7gWmx7RjTpxD9T-PTwF8AAAD__3AShlY) have varsity or club programs, including Concordia University Texas and Texas Wesleyan. Women’s flag football will be a sport at the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles. Once a coaching staff is hired, players could be signed to the program [as soon as this fall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SgzAMhU9jOjP-wRAKF9vQZdstGYFl4hljM1gbktvvOFfYQpW-kd73fu7zHUIMafuGHS29fJ4TXiUiEZ6zh0JYaDvzFdK2BgpYfITNz0oow4Xhsp8dhPieu8bZRbhRNmjl0A161Fr3zcPCqMwqOi96vRpv3M0rFFp1ZtAa3KibYOsxYWQvpVCyaw0uADAsEtxtcf3COoEuUD5beiDhC4qP7_zEs13z3kT7IDoK019MTUxNvwQ7PEvdMTVVGaam-oGpqY40H4jDWbUpJ06Zg3P8yjumwqsf9znTAjHyK8TIF9xC4keENw-Jl-MMaeNKqKGFcrya07qjcqH0A-vEtkOIn2j0v0KfVv0FAAD__zYFiuQ). Games will be played in the 12,000-seat Maverick Stadium. UTA’s football program was shuttered in 1985 due to rising costs and poorly attended games. Cowley indicated there are no immediate plans to resume men’s football at the university.

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Texas Cities Among Fastest-Growing in U.S. Seven of the fifteen fastest-growing cities in the U.S. are in Texas, according to from the U.S. Census Bureau. The analysis examined cities with populations of at least 20,000 during the period between July 1, 2023, and July 1, 2024. Leading the way is , growing from 28,336 to 37,019 residents—a rate of 30.6%. Collin County is home to three other fast-growing cities: Celina (No. 4 at 18.2%, pop. 51,661), Anna (No. 5 at 14.6%, pop. 31,986), and Melissa (No. 11 at 10%, pop. 26,194). was No. 2, growing at a rate of 26.9% to increase its population to 54,629. Rockwall County’s Fate (No. 8) grew its population to 27,467 at a rate of 11.4%, and Hutto in Williamson County (No. 13) grew its population to 42,661 at a rate of 9.4%. "It's affordability. That’s really the driving factor ," . Princeton has temporarily paused new residential development to avoid putting too much strain on local infrastructure, but Escobar estimates there are plans to build 10,000 new homes when the moratorium is lifted. New Rules for Galveston's Jeep Weekend Thousands of people are expected to visit Galveston over the next few days for Jeep Weekend. Officials have in an effort to prevent the unruly behavior and violence that have plagued the annual event in years past. Authorities arrested at least a hundred people in Galveston County each of the past three years, and one person was . On some roads—including the beach—, and no parking or stopping is allowed. Other rules include a ban on mass gatherings, bonfires, and golf carts or ATVs on the beach. Over 400 officers from 14 agencies are expected to patrol the event. “ You need to follow our rules, and you need to obey the law. And if you choose not to, we will find a place for you in our Galveston County jail ,” . UTA Launching Women's Flag Football UT Arlington will in 2027, making it the fifth NCAA Division I university in the country—and the first in Texas—to do so. UTA President Jennifer Cowley made the announcement at a community event yesterday afternoon. More than 500,000 girls between the ages of 6 and 17 in the U.S. are estimated to play flag football, and about have varsity or club programs, including Concordia University Texas and Texas Wesleyan. Women’s flag football will be a sport at the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles. Once a coaching staff is hired, players could be signed to the program . Games will be played in the 12,000-seat Maverick Stadium. UTA’s football program was shuttered in 1985 due to rising costs and poorly attended games. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. I took off the gloves and took big swings at Pete Hegseth (our country’s favorite DUI-hire), the idiot known as Elon Musk, and the dumbest person in Congress: Marjorie Taylor Greene. Then, I turned my attention to Donald Trump. I responded to his calling me a “very low IQ person” and challenged him right then and there to an IQ test. | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, \- Jasmine ♥️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: I believe this is the Left’s #1 target in 2026
body:
Fellow American, it’s Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump’s former campaign manager, and I need your immediate attention on something. Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left’s #1 target to beat in 2026. |

Fellow American,

It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and **I need your immediate attention on something.**

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026.

Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority.

**Fellow American, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy.**

Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time.

Fellow American, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, _this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left._

name: Katrina Pierson Campaign
subject: HD 33 Capitol Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katrina Pierson Campaign
body:
From the Desk of State Representative Katrina Pierson
| | | |
---
| | | _From the Desk of State Representative Katrina Pierson_
**A Message from Representative Pierson** Thank you for allowing me the privilege of serving House District 33 at the Texas Capitol. As we move through this term, I’ve been working on legislation that reflects our community’s needs. Below are updates on recent progress.
With **over 150 bills co-authored this session, there are too many to list here.** You can view the complete roster on my House member page: [_**https://www.house.texas.gov/members/33**_](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.).
**Legislative Collaborations & Policy Priorities**
---
* **HB4962 (Candidate Citizenship Bill):** As part of my commitment to clarity and trust in the election process, I have filed HB4962. This is a citizenship bill aimed at enhancing transparency in public office candidacy. The bill requires candidates to disclose any citizenship they hold in nations other than the United States, ensuring voters are informed of potential dual citizenships. It also mandates that the secretary of state post this information online for public access.
* **HB3560:** Requires background checks for all unlicensed employees with patient access and the utilization of the Employee Misconduct Registry for freestanding psychiatric hospitals.
* **HB259:** Amends the Penal Code to remove short-barrel firearms from the prohibited items list, simplifying firearms regulation and supporting Texans' Second Amendment rights.
* **HB1832:** Amends the Penal Code to enhance criminal penalties for illegal entry or presence by aliens.

**Texas House Passes Historic School Choice Legislation**
In a monumental victory for school choice advocates, the Texas House has passed **SB2** , a historic bill that brings school choice to Texas, which I co-sponsored. This legislation empowers parents to choose the best education for their children and opens new pathways to success for underserved communities. I’m grateful to my colleagues for their steadfast support, and I’m thrilled for the opportunities this brings to Texas families as we take a bold step toward a stronger, freer future for our state.
__PROMISES MADE, PROMISES KEPT.__
**Commitment to Republican Priorities** You spoke, I listened. Throughout the session I have prioritized the agenda of the Republican Party of Texas. To that end, I have joint and co-authored bills aimed at ending federal overreach, banning taxpayer funded lobbying, ending the sexualization of Texas’ kids, supporting election integrity, securing our border & power grid, and preventing the sale of Texan land to foreign adversaries.
* **HB309:** Ends _taxpayer-funded lobbying_ : bans cities, counties, and special districts from spending public money to hire or join groups that employ registered lobbyists, and lets any local taxpayer sue to stop violations and recover fees.
* **HB100:** Protects classrooms from inappropriate content by prohibiting districts from buying or using any instructional material the State Board of Education places on its _rejected list_ and tying textbook-fund dollars to that standard.
* **HB162:** Locks Texas agencies and local governments from recognizing or enforcing out-of-state _extreme-risk protective orders_ (red-flag gun seizures), bars acceptance of related federal grants, and makes knowing enforcement a state-jail felony.
* **HB239:** Requires public entities to restrict multi-user restrooms, locker rooms, shelters, and jail quarters to individuals of the same biological sex; authorizes civil penalties for non-compliance and empowers citizens to seek injunctive relief.
* **HB354:** Creates a dedicated Border Protection Unit under DPS with authority to deter, arrest, and repel illegal border crossings, construct border barriers, and coordinate statewide strategy; also adds new trespass and fentanyl provisions.
* **HB383:** Bars __ employers from imposing COVID-19 vaccine mandates or punishing individuals for declining; complaints go to TDLR, which may levy administrative penalties.
* **HB363:** Adds a consumer-protection layer to new Municipal Utility Districts by requiring would-be developers to give 30-days’ certified-mail notice to affected county commissioners courts **before** filing a creation petition with TCEQ.
* **HB1377:** Prohibits the World Health Organization, United Nations, and World Economic Forum from exercising jurisdiction in Texas and bans enforcement of their rules, fees, taxes, policies, or mandates by the state or its political subdivisions.
* **HB1549:** Prohibits businesses, except sexually oriented businesses, from selling obscene devices, allowing county or district attorneys to seek injunctions and civil penalties up to $5,000 per violation, plus investigation and prosecution costs.
* **HJR15:** Puts a constitutional amendment on the November 2025 ballot to let judges deny bail to defendants charged with first-degree sexual felonies, violent crimes, or continuous trafficking when clear-and-convincing evidence shows no bail conditions can protect victims or the community.
* **HJR91:** Proposes a constitutional amendment to recognize an individual’s unalienable right to refuse vaccination and prohibits making vaccination status a condition for employment, travel, education, business, or receiving government services.
* **HJR103:** Puts a measure on the 2025 ballot to give the Texas Attorney General concurrent jurisdiction with local prosecutors over election-crime cases, ensuring statewide enforcement when locals decline.

**Securing Texas**

_Texas House passed the strongest bill in America countering the threat of foreign acquisition of Texas land, SB17._
I’ve coauthored numerous bills as part of a broader package to secure Texas against foreign enemies--namely China, Russia, Iran, and North Korea.
[Click here to read more from Fox News.](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.)

* **SB17:** Prohibits designated countries’ governments, entities, or individuals from China, Iran, North Korea, Russia, or governor-designated nations from acquiring Texas real property, with enforcement by the attorney general, divestiture, fines, and a state jail felony for violations.
* **HB34:** Prohibits state investments in certain countries like China and Russia, requiring divestment from scrutinized companies with ties to these nations. It mandates notification and potential divestment within 90 days if companies do not alter their status.

* **HB119:** Regulates lobbying by requiring registration for those acting for foreign adversaries and prohibits related compensation, with civil penalties. It defines foreign adversaries broadly and empowers the attorney general to enforce compliance through fines and injunctions.

* **HB127:** Protects higher education from foreign adversaries by enhancing penalties for theft of trade secrets, providing civil and administrative penalties. It strengthens security measures against such threats in academic institutions.
* **HB132:** Protects confidentiality of information used to prevent or investigate hostile acts by foreign adversaries, expanding the scope to include tactical plans and critical infrastructure details. It ensures such data is safeguarded for national security purposes.
* **HB173:** Prohibits public higher education institutions from accepting gifts or grants from certain foreign countries to safeguard against foreign influence. It focuses on enhancing transparency and security in higher education funding.

**Community Engagement** ****
It was an honor to welcome constituents participating in Collin County Days at the Capitol. I also had the pleasure of meeting with delegations from the City of Sachse and Plano ISD to discuss legislative priorities and mutual concerns. I deeply appreciate everyone who took the time to visit Austin and share their perspectives. Your feedback is invaluable and helps guide my work.
___Great hosting the City of Sachse in the Capitol Office during Collin County days.___
_So much fun having the Plano YRs at the Texas Capitol._
_TFRW Days at the Capitol are always a blast._
___Honored to add my name to the rider that support's Rockwall's Children's Advocacy Center.___
_Made it back home in time to attend Collin County Lincoln Day._
___Couldn't miss out on GO BLUE for Rockwall County.___
**Thank You for Your Support** I am grateful for your continued engagement—whether by phone, email, or personal visits to the Capitol. Please know that I will keep listening and working diligently on your behalf to secure a thriving future for Rockwall and Collin County.
**Contact Information**
* **Phone** : (512) 463-0484
* **Email** : District33.Pierson@house.texas.gov

If you have questions, concerns, or suggestions, do not hesitate to reach out. My team and I are here to serve you.
**Sincerely,**
**Katrina Pierson**
_State Representative_
| | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by Katrina Pierson Campaign

Brandeis Center Coalition to Combat Anti-Semitism ("the Coalition") to explain why Microsoft's refusal to establish a Jewish Employee Resource Group (ERG) alongside its existing network of ERGs has resulted in distributing very real professional benefits [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/NeRI4jsWccXrliZIyvIQg7e9MLLOfLo7Di3xV3BRmWQVOKNqia7uJwuzNltCZ-fJXsKk4PVNDzyJzcwtUFB4LNHDnpVoAZY-1uwL5tRmNIyMj9CS8hF15iE2TeGMVxRseKhQ0BA4wh2SOM4-xDJVBmEW4OTZCLCufwj5XaBu1fNogXzwE_xMS4fv3fUox6PEtxMSMXWhh1Z5f3SodlBrMjde76hrQ49FayaTXsCJLPV2BtSP6ohnotyyjkL8YAhCDw18bh1rSf8XFQcvTj4ah6fvVl35LOWa-tNiGVlllTQv91vytj49DT2w3myL_qe2viVAdEV8m6G63GIip_J_tJGVM5rqBQuhn6Oe_SaOAqLXwipfH1DFuPxtwEFnBQMIJ3kjufStQkqIOajXfOoVb-E-SdM/aC4eootIMfxYPrYfVMTA8dwFOmqIc_tX/9)

Members are due to meet at the University of York campus from 11 to 15 July. The names of most of those who will help to decide the next Archbishop of Canterbury were announced this week: five representatives of the global Anglican Communion, along with those selected from among the central members elected by the General Synod for a five-year term. Previously, the Canterbury Crown Nominations Commission (CNC) has had only one representative of the [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/bc2OJUZdYFBHuRE1noQA_bcQECRtuKsd3mW-O1nExW1C8_x-tUIOMsJ9cc8tZtB4yQ6k6ji5GKhMyVlOWPY66oSSV7CWL_5a1n0vOFc2Y4nnYkB-gNEkuEkdWD7U-cRHyboBlIipftahDss-nZb0d4co2As1Lc_uNVvUZzD1wGIUxU3B14mCFYaoFyAKIJTpk9sUAsZoWupoaSJemsa8HgmUYiSdbxxAZ1fkHuV192i-fDGStIzvy4oX_LwFcikGGDyBco25sOAsCcx1UkfiBu97KJ8twxgsKooa7QXgTuYuNIscSaN56esbx3CEz7Xn6GjcDRcNegwgFzy9TA/Wzqm4f4YbL1tt9H-v38QRzdPtGtDaMqf/9)

Marks & Spencer has launched a trial of a paper fibre alternative ready meal tray for its popular Fiery Chicken Tikka Masala. The innovative packaging is suitable for both microwave and oven cooking, offering customers the same convenience they expect from traditional packaging. name: Roy Beck
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens
body:
This is not by accident—it’s by design | | |
#
---
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cf9d00e39b9644ca908bc18f0e7de0ff&_e=U9Qp8SDbHJD4nAhgwmSr9OrCZnJWl_L9zGwcWrRNbrN1gYHiS55_ds5slZ2CVEvLerZK_15t6PfEm7o3RnB5kBitYBJqzaXYiJGC3re9H_X0tpsWlMKRCsONyezwv45jyKA62dw3NiIXPeoczIQi7J6jbVw7nlEFqXqir4WfJSLHReNkhCTsNYJmz6OAr8vWyQq64rBMSoR5XBXy8T_1vUYsNEW6dUt0zryEcgTQNuBPco3qHe2ryVIoNbUVpwb8Y5olZKa1TmS9S2UrOF9Tqn9z1HS4jdv-dzTlyRq2YSDTj5G7BaF0OEFHd5T5ADHR_lQyFdosMBm9EckUdhgNNeeeCWLHzbuHJt355Tdb89Z4fhdJAF83jIkRAIt1rIphV3z5cBxSvlE34CzuH4DNk7ipx8Tp1Pnctl1HW5JgNlIM2jrTAap6tny0H7Kaxkz96xl67RsF7os47t3IUoSi1xrwCZBJUjgvxu3dknF9ydpsMRjOHYfwVjGazd5D6xzCwHNLKRT4dnVGS7ch4a-jdaFMLfr9I3iYHauTPpp2vEF0kZr_jQmUXvXIsX6veLxJTpHZz5m0s1EgFBaN1XYSMZO_bDuCVMg-zz2ou28vbMcFrum6yiNwaD4K-Nl2Dy21)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cf9d00e39b9644ca908bc18f0e7de0ff&_e=U9Qp8SDbHJD4nAhgwmSr9OrCZnJWl_L9zGwcWrRNbrN1gYHiS55_ds5slZ2CVEvLerZK_15t6PfEm7o3RnB5kBitYBJqzaXYiJGC3re9H_X0tpsWlMKRCsONyezwv45jyKA62dw3NiIXPeoczIQi7J6jbVw7nlEFqXqir4WfJSLHReNkhCTsNYJmz6OAr8vWyQq64rBMSoR5XBXy8T_1valz0EKdxIe5_80BOpofhAXw4RJd9PSAr2Tm3hDT6dp9A37Q5zVzz2bQZl06ejCO-o6vggTOARmlvECRWV32otKjvGPREUXbe9u48tZBd2l3sYoA8lKZWlkVhjBaD6PQjmT9h5xJxhGmSFg2E-A5XMgRBCfkSvys6jf533vWO8I4a_eIRLzcOmB0dns2H_Squq7_MpRvcPv4jf6Sztyn93RaiBAMa1iHfLwMyrnghaTVx0W0l39zQVmzlceGie5vkXtaXe9UodLMwEcs34IGfUpFDJnZacfdmIdo5TikzA8TH7RA8j5_r6r-6U73PQIjpDV0WAg6ZXpfwIPe3FqjIz7HVrDJwyKK-LX_AQwhBm1jmXXAMysK4LsEwUKLXwGVzDFenDD5eKJ9F0cmw6ERgsqP-Hjqxo6WXD3u_11gldEm)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cf9d00e39b9644ca908bc18f0e7de0ff&_e=U9Qp8SDbHJD4nAhgwmSr9OrCZnJWl_L9zGwcWrRNbrN1gYHiS55_ds5slZ2CVEvLerZK_15t6PfEm7o3RnB5kBitYBJqzaXYiJGC3re9H_X0tpsWlMKRCsONyezwv45jyKA62dw3NiIXPeoczIQi7J6jbVw7nlEFqXqir4WfJSLHReNkhCTsNYJmz6OAr8vWyQq64rBMSoR5XBXy8T_1vbRjBgJMXAsssv9rILEEyIxB5j4WlA4DnSsPjh75mXUU_BAJyZk7jnYY_nTJUraGw28Gs6pUPwKWcq-uDQIcSo_8b3jghSZanUSL1NbBgywGASV1RkeR82IKeiwK14eElMEM_y4U-YYoUC654hotQLvJO97iU0wovhLMfZT5eS6mHPQ0tgiJPJ1QdfSmn-inSQdio0AhvtNZEA-ffi0B8a20kwZ1GrycE2zwrAcHS-wcvR0004ONxYgdx3bAFFxGekWNA6QFUvjhIdS3oBNTgB_ALxXgTzyCdao3gIJ_7QpBLMJyt_JqGCWwnpcE3F-Hr-drhqd6WYXquyukpr2s7CVRXkPk5cupqMuVKtdT-E1IeK1nHKn31KLhgcDNAfHOg3ERL6VUk2gwVSQJbtJDs3AoP8zlVTP9zrTmvZBJ8QZb)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cf9d00e39b9644ca908bc18f0e7de0ff&_e=U9Qp8SDbHJD4nAhgwmSr9OrCZnJWl_L9zGwcWrRNbrN1gYHiS55_ds5slZ2CVEvLerZK_15t6PfEm7o3RnB5kBitYBJqzaXYiJGC3re9H_X0tpsWlMKRCsONyezwv45jyKA62dw3NiIXPeoczIQi7J6jbVw7nlEFqXqir4WfJSLHReNkhCTsNYJmz6OAr8vWyQq64rBMSoR5XBXy8T_1vfRbCwGfA1pIH2QKBeQRlS6LnNyNwN8qoMA9QWuFeSQie932dX8pOTJv_ob7E2OzdFAGAJFOhg996MSuWSKNMoJu7XIu2Q3oyP30F6hdadW0qeRwMVS4A69eXOvU6bpc2fT1pEE8r3i4j7Er3JnP6Ob2BfWL0A0fbPvzIoNWl0TU17PGqc44l_KreE79-GLfHnPzAtFvSW9dAD1nnFXaSytZbKY3d-APRoXb_ZgIeCT4TCJyPClswT-h-O0B21D_UR9WnEJZTomcuGPgmslPu4dQjc0VaHSQ-ap9BTcxWy86dffnwSomL3z2lXuO0coHgMMMMU-N78DVk0YK-sp_R84SEWWQP-T9WFeJgVlvt47rP_moQJ_WdbwRJusnn7tTX25XXR3Q4oC4DcFOncjyKxTJ2KuA84FRZTPybRLiekCT)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or clean_body: This is not by accident—it’s by design | | | | | My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. Take the Survey | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. | | | ---|---|--- NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209 _

body:
Preview text here
The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too
much in their war chest.

[https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/zinke-closing/?amtposition=3&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&ex_tid=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&utm_term=lrm-active]

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too
much in their war chest.

NOW THEY'RE RAISING $50 MILLION TO FLIP MY SEAT BLUE.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/zinke-closing/?amtposition=3&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&ex_tid=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&utm_term=lrm-active]

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat,
and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my
reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not
only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House.
It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST
agenda all over again.

Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior
starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.

In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority,
and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one
of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other
Republican will have a chance.

BUT IF YOU CAN CHIP IN JUST $5 RIGHT NOW, I CAN PROMISE YOU THAT WE
WILL BLOW MY FUNDRAISING GOAL OUT OF THE WATER AND RUIN THE DEMOCRATS'
PLAN TO DESTROY OUR NATION.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/zinke-closing/?amtposition=3&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&ex_tid=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&utm_term=lrm-active]

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my
entire life, will you help me out?

Chip In NOW!
[https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/zinke-closing/?amtposition=3&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&ex_tid=20250513_WA90.116684_t1639490-573&utm_term=lrm-active]

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6,
I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,

Ryan Zinke

It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6. In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party. If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. BUT IF YOU CAN CHIP IN JUST $5 RIGHT NOW, I CAN PROMISE YOU THAT WE WILL BLOW MY FUNDRAISING GOAL OUT OF THE WATER AND RUIN THE DEMOCRATS' PLAN TO DESTROY OUR NATION. [] I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out? Chip In NOW! [] You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad635099-86db-4dda-8a18-300a9f0c7d2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While the Black Lives Matter movement no longer holds the power it once had nearly five years ago, that does not mean the tribal thinking over incidents making national headlines, that BLM encouraged, has gone away.
We saw that tribal thinking over the Austin Metcalf case, where Karmelo Anthony allegedly killed Metcalf over a seat and people poured in the donations for Anthony's defense. We saw it more recently after Democratic members of Congress **[brawled with ICE agents](https://substack.com/redirect/9810852a-e550-46e4-b519-65edab4935e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Newark's mayor was arrested for trespassing, as I explained in a video here.
But perhaps the worst example this month is the case of retired Hamilton County sheriff's deputy Larry Henderson being allegedly killed by Rodney Hinton Jr. in a targeted attack.
Henderson was directing traffic for the University of Cincinnati's commencement ceremony when Hinton reportedly **[drove his car into Henderson](https://substack.com/redirect/a51f623c-1197-490a-ad72-94a4dc1d87d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , apparently in an act of revenge for the death of his son, Ryan Hinton, who was shot and killed by Cincinnati police the day before when he was caught in a stolen SUV and took off running, while armed with a gun.
The elder Hinton had just seen the body camera footage with other family members and allegedly killed Henderson because he was the first officer he saw. Hinton's family witnessed the attack because they were following him in another car.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With Birch Gold Group](https://substack.com/redirect/665a0856-ad10-4890-b247-5d4ead927cae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
### **A Message from Dr. Ron Paul...**
# **" Do This ONE THING Before July's Rio Reset!"**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/665a0856-ad10-4890-b247-5d4ead927cae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In July, the BRICS nations will meet in Rio de Janeiro to unveil their most ambitious plan yet: To create an **alternative to the dollar-based financial system** that has dominated global trade for 80 years. People are calling this financial revolution the "Rio Reset."
Hi, I'm Dr. Ron Paul.
For decades, I've warned about the consequences of unrestrained money printing. Now, the **worst-case scenario** is unfolding before our eyes.
**Why Is This Important For Americans?**
When the dollar loses global demand, its decline directly affects:
* Bank accounts and cash savings
* Most IRAs and 401(k)s
* Social Security benefits
* Pensions and fixed income investments

The signs of this coming shift are already visible. Central banks worldwide are buying more gold than ever. If they're preparing, don't you think you should too?
**The Wealth Diversification Plan Americans Need Now**
Throughout my career, I have advocated for gold. And now, more than ever, I urge you to consider gold - _before_ the Rio Reset in July. My trusted friends at Birch Gold Group can help you move your IRA or 401(k) into a Gold IRA with no taxes or penalties.
**[To learn more, click here to request a FREE Info Kit on Gold IRAs from Birch Gold.](https://substack.com/redirect/665a0856-ad10-4890-b247-5d4ead927cae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Get My Free Info Kit](https://substack.com/redirect/665a0856-ad10-4890-b247-5d4ead927cae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Rio Reset represents a pivotal moment for the global financial order, and I want as many Americans as possible to be prepared. Take action now, _before_ July's Rio Reset! **[Get this free info kit here.](https://substack.com/redirect/665a0856-ad10-4890-b247-5d4ead927cae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
**(Continued)**
The lawyer representing Hinton had this to say: "Mr. Hinton experienced a psychiatric episode, triggered by watching a video of his son being shot to death. And that because of his mental defect, he did not know the wrongfulness of his conduct when he engaged Deputy Henderson."
Similar to the Anthony case, social media users have twisted themselves to defend and praise Hinton's alleged crime.
"[I] feel like everyone taking issue with the fact that he killed an 'unrelated' cop doesn't understand that it wasn't just that cop that killed his son. it is every cop who participates in the brutalization of black americans and allows others to, that killed his son," **[one user posted](https://substack.com/redirect/91680b64-4423-415a-922a-515c73cf6e49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , which got over 4,800 shares, 29,000 likes, and was viewed half a million times.
That post was in response to a painting depicting the real courtroom moment Hinton held his head high at deputies while being escorted out. That picture got 38K likes and was seen over one million times.
"BROTHER said an eye for eye," was another popular post that shared **[a TikTok video](https://substack.com/redirect/e3b04da6-fbde-4bb4-b293-b9814a1192b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of Hinton that has the caption, "Stand Tall King."
There are countless **[TikTok videos lionizing Hinton](https://substack.com/redirect/3c4f6389-c14b-4efe-9c6f-9c66bdde156f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for being the "REALIST man in the world."
The BLM movement has fostered the deteriorating race relations within the United States since the death of Michael Brown in 2014. As previously stated, its political power has weakened almost to the point of irrelevancy, but its destructive mark on the culture is still alive and well.
Let's look at what Hinton, who is 38-years-old, has accomplished. He killed a retired law enforcement officer who was not responsible for his son's death. He wasn't even in the same department. The man he killed wasn't a high-speed operator, he was a literal traffic cop. The evidence is so strong against Hinton that it got the _Democrat_ prosecutor for Hamilton County to seek the death penalty. Five children are now without their father.
It feels like I'm beating a dead horse whenever I bring it up, but while the fires and smoke from the 2020 riots have long cleared our nation's cities and the physical damage has been (mostly) repaired, BLM's devastating impact on our way of life will be felt for years to come.

subject: Joint Statement From the Republican Parties of Massachusetts, Maine, Vermont, Rhode Island and Connecticut
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dIV1UDeRn8NgmhCrs6c0qOUtynZ2QgsnJ_90fhrWTq9zixF5BUHfFjkLqrw7AtdSJlISoJOe1VuIFRyr0KX9YIuArc_zGOn3ZH0YXiPbhpUzicbZBbhCfY8zXT8jdNnkTML9mIvktgo_8EQf99xhEQ==&c=CUrsspiCs6Q3gCWVzfopoLiKcPVVeRaw3D8lDCkXiAn9rkqrOD-RTw==&ch=uFCpLQSoxoFjO_EELXBnQC892Kd7yhCt_-FKozUQOe5twq54AjJBZA==)
---
| Joint Statement From the Republican Parties of Massachusetts, Maine, Vermont, Rhode Island and Connecticut
---
---
|
> PRESS CONTACT:
> John Milligan, [jrm@massgop.com](mailto:jrm@massgop.com)
>
>
> Boston, MA - The Republican Parties of Massachusetts, Maine, Vermont, Rhode Island and Connecticut release the following statement in response to the "United in Justice New England Town Hall" with Attorneys General Tong (CT), Frey (ME), Campbell (MA), Nerenha (RI) and Clark (VT):
> "Less than two years ago, New England was overrun by waves of illegal aliens who strained the ability of our states to provide basic government services for their citizens, and today we are still dealing with the criminal repercussions and resulting budget shortfalls.
> "Rather than support cooperative efforts with ICE to deport violent illegal aliens, these far-left attorneys general are failing our residents by providing legal cover for tone-deaf media stunts over their well-being.
> "President Trump will continue his work to restore law and order in New England and across America. Meanwhile, these Democratic state prosecutors should focus on their actual jurisdictions and solving the problems caused by their ideological crusades."

###

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | Joint Statement From the Republican Parties of Massachusetts, Maine, Vermont, Rhode Island and Connecticut | PRESS CONTACT: John Milligan, mailto:jrm@massgop.com Boston, MA - The Republican Parties of Massachusetts, Maine, Vermont, Rhode Island and Connecticut release the following statement in response to the "United in Justice New England Town Hall" with Attorneys General Tong (CT), Frey (ME), Campbell (MA), Nerenha (RI) and Clark (VT): "Less than two years ago, New England was overrun by waves of illegal aliens who strained the ability of our states to provide basic government services for their citizens, and today we are still dealing with the criminal repercussions and resulting budget shortfalls. "Rather than support cooperative efforts with ICE to deport violent illegal aliens, these far-left attorneys general are failing our residents by providing legal cover for tone-deaf media stunts over their well-being. "President Trump will continue his work to restore law and order in New England and across America. Meanwhile, these Democratic state prosecutors should focus on their actual jurisdictions and solving the problems caused by their ideological crusades." | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: He’s the Left’s worst nightmare
body:
Peter, it’s Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump’s former campaign manager, and I need your immediate attention on something. Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left’s #1 target to beat in 2026 |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8d6def795e8041e2923e362b67e7a1d4&_e=Z65VCsC7iPZTGN6vA-3TNRUxMSi4JbTxU-T_nU-TRmz4EYe8jQE7sCvrtonItvZIDZOZ10VnSgk86i9A9Tk-e1b0gM1kLtoSMR55CbkSyB7ZgslzANDIIaqYmyxlvoVzC1dTBSB7IuvUtXWrR_SXwk0WF_yMphXMkAjn4kSw3_AxhoiXCSzsGn_iNJ4LNNRLgOwUjnEuw4sWKJheubavQJ2oWr2L_Wlc0IafjxuDeckMQ1wqVxLOstbKfsBX530lfj3NhWIOQM-66rUnNru08gfErRNNBo10mXMOyJwfgH_1CIS6P6FdTiIei890A3K9iWwciQC9mAxNnz8T7-YWAaBrIwfKR8kjnQ00Wz9DQVdCfXYb2dArTgZlCUoveQYvEN1FsNp37iACcOp9Td2TNbOU3QQQEWWf36eEy5x8W3MwR2sTLxMmCOS18jCuFBZlHTZ6m79jclW-jfDNl8X7pLKOQeNxdUMY_rID_L22TG4XWRWJGHdCmDkExyMRqHNdA_TSIaKQAhZ5dfm8Ai_-vLpcsCxt6II3oO4ViqVzVZDKDdkWwa8sU33X1yZpXvSpqLbzOi0hxsPXaPg3gk5h-yM4YYra9itIamL4YfThQ-Aeryb4kKGFfo5kEzwrBfnKhjNr3O4UExFkRxmn3dmgJ3O_c-NMWc1oFOOiWqyIV42VnYXkMc5xMJiDNi868C3I2tQxCaaC1-4J5AKiOgPcXQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and **I need your immediate attention on something.**

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026.

Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority.

**Peter, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy.**

Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time.

Peter, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, _this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left._

**[Will you join me in supporting Senator Lindsey Graham as he fights hard to keep South Carolina Red and maintain the strong Conservative Senate majority he helped build?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8d6def795e8041e2923e362b67e7a1d4&_e=Z65VCsC7iPZTGN6vA-3TNRUxMSi4JbTxU-T_nU-TRmz4EYe8jQE7sCvrtonItvZIDZOZ10VnSgk86i9A9Tk-e1b0gM1kLtoSMR55CbkSyB7ZgslzANDIIaqYmyxlvoVzC1dTBSB7IuvUtXWrR_SXwk0WF_yMphXMkAjn4kSw3_AxhoiXCSzsGn_iNJ4LNNRLgOwUjnEuw4sWKJheubavQJ2oWr2L_Wlc0IafjxuDeckMQ1wqVxLOstbKfsBX530l1jDoidv3r9vpkRMV2hzT6waYZzEt4Dc9Xmji5-cwvRkZg94UmWrXzjSxAK1YF5Gdo3i7bn4kw1VgW7ZY0Ztn7BSD2wqNeIJ311VZXj-LKYSo490SQpqmtyfbQpUTjABuE2-ID13PpchDVJqbdp7Ypobza4Qf8SZFUa961PIDxzzNc6KoMnICPt_MmdOxAwFF4edisUBnW3LE8okh67nXTFp55ZgqpoYXXMGFVKEw37nkt_kfKGM6XK7BnXffZMOgpTwjH7gW-plDQlpJ1Q4JQi53HwfP38KJWw2xRZbwx5NzFEy3SZ6Zvi_psedZX6rNkg4fgB2hTTG38caZoiUpMV98U6hJXAHZD90-OIUTxK6AB3iNv7c80-1VFQbaibu6OdWi2IAkCyw0FVQgl5PrlSHyOxtoypYg3ynp7hhf6B308MJO0PClYUJHe_Qm85SapWw52-sUfhXGgluN8cYN3A%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP SEN. GRAHAM >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8d6def795e8041e2923e362b67e7a1d4&_e=Z65VCsC7iPZTGN6vA-3TNRUxMSi4JbTxU-T_nU-TRmz4EYe8jQE7sCvrtonItvZIDZOZ10VnSgk86i9A9Tk-e1b0gM1kLtoSMR55CbkSyB7ZgslzANDIIaqYmyxlvoVzC1dTBSB7IuvUtXWrR_SXwk0WF_yMphXMkAjn4kSw3_AxhoiXCSzsGn_iNJ4LNNRLgOwUjnEuw4sWKJheubavQJ2oWr2L_Wlc0IafjxuDeckMQ1wqVxLOstbKfsBX530llYUFfHNTc1Jh8akysF1CxFTckGVvb5phtOO0LUQMGKA6mEPGGaFXGyzy8IT4AQv90vyGJKkrhfL4OwP5E4sKhdsEuehAzqtVH9gO2Olj1PbeEfK9hSE03RHBQB87e3eAV3hKP90Gv_bl7f4ZmwTNKflvfAoK_wb65tHj4y0QWkznGl0F8oRhfbQfyUr1KMCG8gVR_mOsUceCy-gDr0IEjPv1dNA2770O-6qrJxYhomTDgNcJo3OV6CcWopFdjeV20s8Jr0vt_KooCpzVNr01HvEyvDQSU6UsGICQ4_G4J-QsD5Vs7VUgYuntVricKu6FaTNNOm1fDdMtr4zOVAhExkxiT7iXxJBDSOp3ABeC3g7VwCwQfMWJ6ZjPQ3xQaD_3csCBt61YDH68lRJxkC0Pj8aEtnB3TaI9HjEPjMhxcH9VSI8MUtkv0iZ7OTxmw0FazIsz7MFMvpAWWqE9kTxyDA%3D%3D)

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

clean_body: I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
