**Peter – We have a once-in-a-generation chance to elect someone amazing to replace Mitch McConnell now that he has announced he will NOT be seeking another term in the U.S. Senate.**

We are thrilled to share that Her Bold Move is officially the **FIRST MAJOR ENDORSEMENT of Colonel Pam Stevenson** , who will likely be the Democratic frontrunner for McConnell’s seat in the Senate. Col. Stevenson currently serves as House Minority Floor Leader in the Kentucky Legislature. She is often the only Democratic member that can break through to Republican leadership to “make the bad bills better.”

When we first sent this email last week, many of you wrote to us that you were not sure a Democrat could win statewide elections in the state of Kentucky. **But here’s the thing: Democrats have been elected to Statewide positions in Kentucky _consecutively_ since 1983.** This race is WINNABLE for a Democrat – and we know Col. Pam Stevenson is the perfect person to appeal to the widest range of voters in her state.

[**McConnell has been terrible for America. It’s time we have a pro-choice, pro-women woman in that seat who will undo his decades of damage to our nation. Help support Colonel Stevenson's bid to replace Mitch McConnell by rushing a split donation of $20.25 today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107802665/545875817/-527673297?refcode=EM_F_250515fwd_N_CB_NO_4_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2OWJhOGRlLTU5MzItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8DfcW0b6vkv0o10eWfJMKCEH-liurKO6eRe0GUQoYYU=)

Together,

Charlotte Bell
Policy Researcher
Her Bold Move

McConnell developed a reputation as “Dr. No” during former President Obama’s term. He blocked Obama’s pick for a vacancy on the Supreme Court, paving the way for Roe v. Wade to be overturned. He unified Republicans against the Affordable Care Act, and then, after it passed, he sought to undo the law. He has voted against IVF. He has an A+ rating with the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America scorecard for consistently voting against reproductive rights. He voted against the Family and Medical Leave Act, opposes same-sex marriage, voted against the Equal Pay Act, voted against raising the federal minimum wage... and so much more.

Mitch McConnell has been horrible for America, and after enduring him for decades, the people of Kentucky – and our country as a whole – deserve better. **This is truly a once-in-a-generation chance to elect someone amazing to replace him as his seat in Washington is FINALLY open.**

**That is where Col. Stevenson comes in.**

[**From negotiating hostage crises, prosecuting child sex criminals, violent crimes, and more, Colonel Stevenson has served this country with honor. Now, she needs our help to take her experience in public service to Washington. Help ensure Col. Stevenson’s campaign has the funding it will need to be successful by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107802676/545875828/-527673297?refcode=EM_F_250515fwd_N_CB_NO_4_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2OWJhOGRlLTU5MzItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8DfcW0b6vkv0o10eWfJMKCEH-liurKO6eRe0GUQoYYU=)

subject: I'm the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025. Will you split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to help us win?

body:
I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side.
Hi, my name is Abigail Spanberger. I'm a three-term congresswoman from Virginia, a former CIA officer, and the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025.
**My opponent just launched over $1 million in ads.**
Soon the floodgates will open. The same billionaires who got Trump elected will come after me and everything we've built together.
_But I'm not intimidated by far-right extremists._
In 2018, I won a seat in Congress held by Republicans for fifty years, and I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side.
**[Will you split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to help us run our own ads and win tough elections all over the country? Our election in Virginia this November will set the tone for Democrats in 2026 and beyond, so it's critical that we raise enough money to win decisively.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88560?refcode=em20250516-8940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8940%2E614464%2EguSsy5)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: House Passes Take It Down Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
We’re tackling the scourge of revenge and deepfake porn head on.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._enVhEsgOanPvA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The scourge of revenge porn is nothing new. Perpetrators have inflicted serious emotional pain our their victims and done lasting damage to our society. This is unacceptable.

And now to make matters worse, new AI-generative tools make the creation of deepfake pornographic images easy for sick criminals. There has been an alarming rise in image-based sexual abuse - with an explosion of cases in which vulnerable teenage girls have been targeted.

Last year, I introduced the **Take It Down Act** to tackle this epidemic of exploitation head on.

The Senate unanimously passed it back in February. President Trump declared his support of this landmark legislation during his speech before a joint session of Congress, andfirst lady Melania Trump has been a vocal advocate for its passage as well.

**Last week, the House passed the Take It Down Act on a 409-2 vote and sent it to President Trump 's desk to be signed into law.**

This historic win in the fight to protect victims of revenge porn and deepfake abuse will do two primary things:
1. Require online platforms to remove nonconsensual intimate imagery within 48 hours of a request, and;

2. Make the distribution of such images a crime, punishable by fines or jail time.

I'm proud to have led the charge to get the Take It Down Act across the finish line. We put a lot of time and effort into garnering support from more than 40 organizations across the political spectrum, and pushed hard to get this to President Trump as quickly as possible.

**I 'm also incredibly grateful for the victims who shared their stories - this victory belongs first and foremost to them.**

None of our efforts at Team Cruz would be possible without the backing of grassroots supporters like you. Every financial contribution we receive makes a difference and is greatly appreciated.

[**Please make a donation today to help us keep charging forward and deliver results >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._tpBzCzDSp6gA)
For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[ **PITCH IN HERE** ](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
---
| | PO Box 25400
Houston, TX 77265
---

clean_body: We’re tackling the scourge of revenge and deepfake porn head on. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, The scourge of revenge porn is nothing new. Perpetrators have inflicted serious emotional pain our their victims and done lasting damage to our society. This is unacceptable. And now to make matters worse, new AI-generative tools make the creation of deepfake pornographic images easy for sick criminals. There has been an alarming rise in image-based sexual abuse - with an explosion of cases in which vulnerable teenage girls have been targeted. Last year, I introduced the Take It Down Act to tackle this epidemic of exploitation head on. The Senate unanimously passed it back in February. President Trump declared his support of this landmark legislation during his speech before a joint session of Congress, andfirst lady Melania Trump has been a vocal advocate for its passage as well. Last week, the House passed the Take It Down Act on a 409-2 vote and sent it to President Trump 's desk to be signed into law. This historic win in the fight to protect victims of revenge porn and deepfake abuse will do two primary things: 1. Require online platforms to remove nonconsensual intimate imagery within 48 hours of a request, and; 2. Make the distribution of such images a crime, punishable by fines or jail time. I'm proud to have led the charge to get the Take It Down Act across the finish line. We put a lot of time and effort into garnering support from more than 40 organizations across the political spectrum, and pushed hard to get this to President Trump as quickly as possible. I 'm also incredibly grateful for the victims who shared their stories - this victory belongs first and foremost to them. None of our efforts at Team Cruz would be possible without the backing of grassroots supporters like you. Every financial contribution we receive makes a difference and is greatly appreciated. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. id: 2024-08-16-13:05:31:567t |

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Cowards.
body:
Republican members of Congress fear the wrath of Donald Trump.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=606%2E2563979%2EadnkaW)

Republican members of Congress fear the wrath of Donald Trump.
But that fear must be nothing compared to the fear of a parent on the verge of losing food assistance for their family as Republicans set to cut lifesaving programs to give tax cuts to the rich.
That fear must be nothing compared to the fear a working class mom with a history of health issues must feel as Republicans prepare to slash Medicaid benefits for those who need it to survive.
In just a few weeks, Congress will vote on Trump's "one big, beautiful bill" that will take away vital services from the poor and working class just to give more to people who already have it all.
Some of the members of Congress who vote yes will have met with families on the verge of losing a vital safety net. They will see the polls that show Americans overwhelmingly oppose these cuts.
They will look at those families, then look over their shoulder and see the potential for mean tweets from Trump... and they will choose Trump.
Shame on them. Cowards.
But there is still time. There is time to stop that from happening -- and there is time to hold them accountable if it does.
Both require resources. Both efforts will be led by the DNC. So if stopping this bill and holding Republicans who vote for it accountable is important to you, we're asking:
[**Rush a $5 contribution directly to the Democratic National Committee. They will put your donation to work fighting Trump's bill to cut lifesaving programs and to hold accountable Republicans who do.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em2505016-1C&refcode2=606_2563979_adnkaW&akid=606%2E2563979%2EadnkaW)

# [How Corporate Media Killed Jamal Khashoggi... Again](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163583997&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNTgzOTk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc0MDQzMjgsImV4cCI6MTc0OTk5NjMyOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pmSXpWvCCKmDHK9GJhmgmV2V277SpsEHDv_TQtu2au8)
### Legacy media has made clear that it is abandoning its duty to protect our democracy--here's how we fight back and demand meaningful accountability
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| May 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163583997&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNTgzOTk3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NzQwNDMyOCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5OTk2MzI4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.i8IlxPNpxDCT2cvkRtzExaX-C5AjnD8PnU1bPCl7DqM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

Do you remember Jamal Khashoggi?
In 2018, this Washington Post journalist and American resident walked into a Saudi consulate in Istanbul. He never walked out. The Saudi regime murdered him--brutally and deliberately. Khashoggi was dismembered. His body never recovered. His only "crime" was doing what journalists are supposed to do: tell the truth.
And now? Just six years later?
Silence. How do we protect ourselves when legacy media won't? **Let 's Address This.**
**Earnest Ask! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join 131,000+ fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..9OTRH3vg12zZeWR-0S0RrnTTp38LFjsukrGwz_R60Ck?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163583997)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a734617e-31c0-49f1-9fab-a82bbc791d25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A composite image of Saudi journalist Jamal Khashoggi and Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. AP/Virginia Mayo; Nicolas Asfouri - Pool/Getty
## A 'Pariah' Who Is Now A Partner
This week Donald Trump met with Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman ("MBS") as if nothing happened. And because my standard is justice, it is important to likewise remind readers that during his presidency Joe Biden met with MBS all the same. Despite campaigning in 2020 on making MBS a _' pariah' _if elected to the White House, Joe Biden embraced him. Thus, MBS--the man the CIA concluded gave the order to kill Khashoggi--is once again being treated like a legitimate global partner. Corporate media barely bats an eye. Perhaps most shockingly, we see notable silence even from the _Washington Post_ , Khashoggi's own paper. It's like it never happened. Like his life, his murder, his sacrifice--just...disappeared.
This is not journalism. This is betrayal. And it speaks to a broader issue of legacy media fully transitioning into the footstool of billionaire oligarchs.
### The Fourth Estate Is Failing--And It's Dangerous
Corporate media's job--its sacred duty--is to be a watchdog for democracy, a guardian of truth, a voice for the people. But today, the fourth estate is not holding power accountable. It's cozying up to it. It's been bought, sold, and gutted. So much of what passes for journalism today is filtered through billionaire ownership, sanitized by ad buyers, and manipulated by partisan algorithms.
For example, Jeff Bezos owns the Washington Post. Elon Musk owns Twitter. Mark Zuckerberg owns Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. Rupert Murdoch owns the Wall Street Journal and the New York Post. Summer Redstone owns ViacomCBS. The Ochs-Sulzberger family owns a controlling stake in the New York Times. Patrick Soon-Shiong owns the Los Angeles Times, The San Diego Union-Tribune and Hoy. The list goes on and on, and all of it loudly proves how the billionairization (yes I made up that word) of media is bad for democracy.
Meanwhile, local and independent papers are collapsing, with one study estimating that the United States has lost a shocking 33% of all small papers over just the last two decades.
If small papers are collapsing under economic pressure, and corporate media won't speak truth to power due to autocratic capitulation--what makes you think it will stand up for you and me when it's _we_ who are in the crosshairs? If the assassination of a journalist like Khashoggi doesn't spark unified outrage, what will?
The harsh truth is that the corporate media capitulation to authoritarianism is already here. It's in the headlines they don't run. The guests they don't book. The questions they won't ask. And if we don't act, we will lose the very foundation of a free society: the ability to know the truth.
So what do we do?
**If you 're finding value in this content, be sure to join our movement and subscribe.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..9OTRH3vg12zZeWR-0S0RrnTTp38LFjsukrGwz_R60Ck?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163583997)
### The Solution: Ground News and Independent Media
I've always said--I don't believe in only identifying problems. I believe in building solutions. Because we are not powerless. We are not voiceless. And we are _not_ without tools. So I offer two solutions for consideration.
First, invest in independent media and writing. I launched _Let 's Address This_ with the intention of providing clear, factual, objective, and truthful analysis on the critical human rights issues that impact each of us. To date we have published more than 400 pieces doing just that. And you have responded, with more than 131,000 (and counting) subscriptions. Thank you for your trust and support. Let's keep building.
Two, I use critical tools to ensure accuracy. One valuable tool I use is **[Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/5bc73513-7920-4e3a-80af-6d91ac57362f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --a platform that every reader who cares about truth and transparency should have at their fingertips. Ground News is not just another news app. It's a revolution in how we consume information in the age of propaganda and clickbait. It does what corporate media refuses to do: show you the whole picture.
Here's why it matters:
✅ **Bias Analysis** : Ground News clearly shows you where an outlet leans--left, right, center--and how reliable its reporting is. No more guessing. No more being manipulated by one-sided coverage.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c0c577e-45e7-4288-86e7-d1670b7e2f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
✅ **Funding Transparency** : Want to know who owns the outlet feeding you information? Ground News tells you. Because ownership matters. Because motives matter. As Jeff Bezos pushes out Pulitzer prize winning journalists who object to his biased reporting, Ground News helps ensure you see that bias a mile away.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4a491431-43f1-4b7d-a1ee-2b439c5282fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
✅ **Global Comparison** : Ground News compiles related stories from across the globe--so you can see how different countries, different political factions, and different journalists are covering the same event. It restores _your_ power to decide what's true. The world is, in fact, bigger than the United States, and our media analysis should reflect that.
And unlike billionaire-run media, **Ground News is reader-supported**. It's built for people, not profits. It answers to you, not advertisers.
I've written about Ground News before, and I will continue to write about it, because it works and it's ethical. I use Ground News' Vantage Plan to research and write my articles. You can too--[click here](https://substack.com/redirect/5bc73513-7920-4e3a-80af-6d91ac57362f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to subscribe at 40% off--bringing the price down to just $5/month. This link supports my work, and more importantly, keeps you armed with a better understanding of the full picture in a time of disinformation.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/72691aee-dc91-4e8a-a53a-709c0a461976?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### The Time for Action Is Now
The murder of Jamal Khashoggi should have been a turning point. Instead, it became a warning sign we chose to ignore. The question now is not just, _Who killed Jamal Khashoggi?_ It's, _Who will they come for next?_ Journalists? Activists? Ordinary citizens who refuse to fall in line?
When truth is silenced, tyranny thrives.
But we are not powerless. We can still choose what we read. We can still choose to support the journalists and platforms that put truth over profits. We can still fight back--with information, with solidarity, and with courage. This is why I write. This is why I publish daily. This is why I partner with Ground News.
Because the truth still matters. And because democracy doesn't die overnight--it dies one ignored atrocity at a time. Let's make sure it doesn't die on our watch.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/72691aee-dc91-4e8a-a53a-709c0a461976?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Perhaps most shockingly, we see notable silence even from the Washington Post , Khashoggi's own paper. It's like it never happened. Like his life, his murder, his sacrifice--just...disappeared. This is not journalism. This is betrayal. And it speaks to a broader issue of legacy media fully transitioning into the footstool of billionaire oligarchs. The Fourth Estate Is Failing--And It's Dangerous Corporate media's job--its sacred duty--is to be a watchdog for democracy, a guardian of truth, a voice for the people. But today, the fourth estate is not holding power accountable. It's cozying up to it. It's been bought, sold, and gutted. So much of what passes for journalism today is filtered through billionaire ownership, sanitized by ad buyers, and manipulated by partisan algorithms. For example, Jeff Bezos owns the Washington Post. Elon Musk owns Twitter. Mark Zuckerberg owns Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. Rupert Murdoch owns the Wall Street Journal and the New York Post. Summer Redstone owns ViacomCBS. The Ochs-Sulzberger family owns a controlling stake in the New York Times. Patrick Soon-Shiong owns the Los Angeles Times, The San Diego Union-Tribune and Hoy. The list goes on and on, and all of it loudly proves how the billionairization (yes I made up that word) of media is bad for democracy. Meanwhile, local and independent papers are collapsing, with one study estimating that the United States has lost a shocking 33% of all small papers over just the last two decades. If small papers are collapsing under economic pressure, and corporate media won't speak truth to power due to autocratic capitulation--what makes you think it will stand up for you and me when it's we who are in the crosshairs? If the assassination of a journalist like Khashoggi doesn't spark unified outrage, what will? The harsh truth is that the corporate media capitulation to authoritarianism is already here. It's in the headlines they don't run. The guests they don't book. The questions they won't ask. And if we don't act, we will lose the very foundation of a free society: the ability to know the truth. So what do we do? If you 're finding value in this content, be sure to join our movement and subscribe. The Solution: Ground News and Independent Media I've always said--I don't believe in only identifying problems. I believe in building solutions. Because we are not powerless. We are not voiceless. And we are not without tools. So I offer two solutions for consideration. First, invest in independent media and writing. I launched Let 's Address This with the intention of providing clear, factual, objective, and truthful analysis on the critical human rights issues that impact each of us. To date we have published more than 400 pieces doing just that. And you have responded, with more than 131,000 (and counting) subscriptions. Thank you for your trust and support. Let's keep building. Two, I use critical tools to ensure accuracy. One valuable tool I use is --a platform that every reader who cares about truth and transparency should have at their fingertips. Ground News is not just another news app. It's a revolution in how we consume information in the age of propaganda and clickbait. It does what corporate media refuses to do: show you the whole picture. Here's why it matters: ✅ Bias Analysis : Ground News clearly shows you where an outlet leans--left, right, center--and how reliable its reporting is. No more guessing. No more being manipulated by one-sided coverage. | | ---|---|--- ✅ Funding Transparency : Want to know who owns the outlet feeding you information? Ground News tells you. Because ownership matters. Because motives matter. As Jeff Bezos pushes out Pulitzer prize winning journalists who object to his biased reporting, Ground News helps ensure you see that bias a mile away. | | ---|---|--- ✅ Global Comparison : Ground News compiles related stories from across the globe--so you can see how different countries, different political factions, and different journalists are covering the same event. It restores your power to decide what's true. The world is, in fact, bigger than the United States, and our media analysis should reflect that. And unlike billionaire-run media, Ground News is reader-supported. It's built for people, not profits. It answers to you, not advertisers. I've written about Ground News before, and I will continue to write about it, because it works and it's ethical. I use Ground News' Vantage Plan to research and write my articles. You can too-- to subscribe at 40% off--bringing the price down to just $5/month. This link supports my work, and more importantly, keeps you armed with a better understanding of the full picture in a time of disinformation. The Time for Action Is Now The murder of Jamal Khashoggi should have been a turning point. Instead, it became a warning sign we chose to ignore. The question now is not just, Who killed Jamal Khashoggi? It's, Who will they come for next? Journalists? Activists? Ordinary citizens who refuse to fall in line? When truth is silenced, tyranny thrives. But we are not powerless. We can still choose what we read. We can still choose to support the journalists and platforms that put truth over profits. We can still fight back--with information, with solidarity, and with courage. This is why I write. This is why I publish daily. This is why I partner with Ground News. Because the truth still matters. And because democracy doesn't die overnight--it dies one ignored atrocity at a time. Let's make sure it doesn't die on our watch. Before you go! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Trump Tank Parade via Our Revolution
subject: Can you help us organize to stop Trump's massive military birthday parade?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1062&refcode=email-20250516_v&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump is finally getting his dream: a massive taxpayer-funded
military parade...on his own birthday.

It’s official: on June 14th, Trump will spend a staggering $45 million in
public money to showcase 6,000 troops, 50 fighter jets and bombers, and
150 military vehicles – including tanks rolling through the streets of DC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27104?source=email-20250516&t=1112&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]Headline: Trump's 'big, beautiful' military parade perfectly distills
his presidency

But we have a chance – and a responsibility – to say NO to Trump's
dangerous ego trip. Our Revolution's Citizen Action Team is mobilizing
thousands of activists to stage massive, peaceful counter-protests, loudly
and unapologetically standing up against this reckless display.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1108&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250516nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]But to pull it off, we need your help right now to power our organizing,
outreach, and logistics efforts. Chip in now – $5, $10, or whatever you
can – to fuel Our Revolution's counter-demonstrations and show Trump loud
and clear that democracy won't bow down to tanks.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1093&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250516nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1094&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250516nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1096&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250516nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1097&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250516nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1098&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250516nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1099&amount=9&refcode=email-20250516nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

It would almost be funny if it wasn't so outrageous and scary. At a time
when millions still lack adequate healthcare, housing, and decent wages,
Trump's big priority is a spectacle glorifying himself.

But make no mistake: Trump's authoritarian fantasy has a clear motive:
sending a chilling message, reminiscent of dictators who flex military
strength on the streets to assert power and silence dissent.

That’s precisely why massive counter-protests of resistance are so
critical. Our message to the nation and the world must drown out Trump's
self-aggrandizing parade by standing strong for peace, democracy, and
community – not vanity and militarism.

Trump wants the cameras trained on his tanks, troops, and bombers. But
together, we can shift the lens to thousands of peaceful protesters making
it clear we don't endorse his parade, his waste, or his dangerous agenda.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27104?source=email-20250516&t=1111&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]Headline: As Army plans parade for its 250th anniversary, protesters
prepare, too

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1105&amount=22&refcode=email-20250516nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8471%2E5885482%2E7U6LfE ]Every dollar contributed today will directly power our organizing
infrastructure — powering our campaigns team, mobilizing volunteers, and
covering event logistics — to effectively respond to Trump's dangerous
spectacle. Are you in?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Chip in now – $5, $10, or whatever you can – to fuel Our Revolution's counter-demonstrations and show Trump loud and clear that democracy won't bow down to tanks. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT It would almost be funny if it wasn't so outrageous and scary. At a time when millions still lack adequate healthcare, housing, and decent wages, Trump's big priority is a spectacle glorifying himself. But make no mistake: Trump's authoritarian fantasy has a clear motive: sending a chilling message, reminiscent of dictators who flex military strength on the streets to assert power and silence dissent. That’s precisely why massive counter-protests of resistance are so critical. Our message to the nation and the world must drown out Trump's self-aggrandizing parade by standing strong for peace, democracy, and community – not vanity and militarism. Trump wants the cameras trained on his tanks, troops, and bombers. But together, we can shift the lens to thousands of peaceful protesters making it clear we don't endorse his parade, his waste, or his dangerous agenda. [ ]Headline: As Army plans parade for its 250th anniversary, protesters prepare, too [ ]Every dollar contributed today will directly power our organizing infrastructure — powering our campaigns team, mobilizing volunteers, and covering event logistics — to effectively respond to Trump's dangerous spectacle. Are you in? When we organize, we win. name: Roy Beck
subject: Trump can’t fix this alone — he needs backup
body:
Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | |
#

---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6522d5bb3ba94cb88eb3acb6227cc499&_e=G98aEz7cQdJmWdKHjZv9P2M2RXmtpkbO7qq5T89HmXEBeKs_cNG0Qy1FcAp2G9i3wp9mSuKnsagOipSInbaM_L8rUbZz56vXu2GRqBZOCCdCUMFRF_k5KJIM6yJdGFJ9ZdHcTqTkZWOB30OjJi_NXkpza1sGU7r1zmdW1pEwAW3O5ms2WT5a1KV3b75aTAf5aPoHtmV1XxRk7-YO3dmurIW4Dr_VrTzhsvJgyrq3ZPv__S9gltEVAHgy0kpHxcLoC71onvb4FeiXOXOnLjE1QWa-uBfrLIFPHwC0HQMVRLws5oDc0X7LrTYUj_gQ1hCOgX0eop4vggEIWvq6BsfOYsRbEI_UgK7N91OMJtiAR3HgMrjSVE65f1LyC75HANDV-A_RtuMjmofntaaSyg_xApt9AAzAfQTW8uqy7ubYC_E71fQRXY1nEQbDNE-8rUPjCiW9wAUjaEnZHS5EVuevEVKqOP5sHb3Np6YKFAeskQPoDdA4LHG17lLpTXpCzzUkM9sGAa2B0Kz8Mik3xvnE1qKJsxbZPOkfWubcga7B6ngYU7jCtVBDQ0DKis1QcizRGcCpQFFALH8nzNjnfL80_8-_G6BJSRzVJ5hIIKeGVDsjMof36S9YyM8WMba97FGo)

Peter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6522d5bb3ba94cb88eb3acb6227cc499&_e=G98aEz7cQdJmWdKHjZv9P2M2RXmtpkbO7qq5T89HmXEBeKs_cNG0Qy1FcAp2G9i3wp9mSuKnsagOipSInbaM_L8rUbZz56vXu2GRqBZOCCdCUMFRF_k5KJIM6yJdGFJ9ZdHcTqTkZWOB30OjJi_NXkpza1sGU7r1zmdW1pEwAW3O5ms2WT5a1KV3b75aTAf5aPoHtmV1XxRk7-YO3dmurGGIXfpekVuVlmBRHlR0qPXxmA4usOAm2f4iWmouTmPzYslZkPANan1XNi_tSno2APNpxkLZAw3lXyWrV5Cv5vNMOP6bO9TpTWHU7F2h9RR1lwHqK6qruGeKiMYWSllfgutFIZODzpJjhDzLc4et5qSOjaJ8dohhTfLZvaGvCcO0jcI957RJM1QC0lGKwmXs0s7wKm--2r1vrXcQqM2TzPS9FVxV5KTQch1Htn2dJVcuiFeE7dD_Dt8JEAwXpsFBc5Is-Rnk0_HH5OJII1QHRmEmTmxakA3tlt5AfMOdHP9EDt63cXCuLFOXwiK2CTdMLdBPxZ37sk3W00KTnFQBJBxIuF9U865L7zMEymWfOFKFnAgkY4eexIyWgUbZ-2Bn2IzLuxHVLoheYdeCfRXt0nYl5LVQWC4jez-w-sR7IHlL)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6522d5bb3ba94cb88eb3acb6227cc499&_e=G98aEz7cQdJmWdKHjZv9P2M2RXmtpkbO7qq5T89HmXEBeKs_cNG0Qy1FcAp2G9i3wp9mSuKnsagOipSInbaM_L8rUbZz56vXu2GRqBZOCCdCUMFRF_k5KJIM6yJdGFJ9ZdHcTqTkZWOB30OjJi_NXkpza1sGU7r1zmdW1pEwAW3O5ms2WT5a1KV3b75aTAf5aPoHtmV1XxRk7-YO3dmurGFyNwqCOFOd7QW-u6KrCyMIL9FY92D6Ay1DMj3ekE7BzeH-krK4vkmHTuCq7iJzEv6BE9rdsKS6gzLPJIcaQi1IiRnb_9c3R9FeyIfxWzaSC9OeL0K3i1YKeA4ZV7nGyIFd2SEm-td18Qf_Po_TvqTM3sIkf9r5XyE4oUzhSWL_sMUNecWWDTygp_g3Pk45UaNHEl8srkL_apbZCVp6pHg-vG7qIUEzbfE48iNFGd16njoLpFS5W5oArBvpYz_ay_hhp6b1F0bC5uICKhpvjTahJmj8OFmN7xpPNrR4FYdMuHrBCcgFT7-aqk29ZskArme6GOua3MWWWI-HNlgHfJS_jRjpUV78vs9qpWV58uU6K2g0uY6-vT3gdmiMchoj0ntgIjSPRhPhOcmMgxLavVKJT236mF8HoGmIO-sk2xMl)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**

**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6522d5bb3ba94cb88eb3acb6227cc499&_e=G98aEz7cQdJmWdKHjZv9P2M2RXmtpkbO7qq5T89HmXEBeKs_cNG0Qy1FcAp2G9i3wp9mSuKnsagOipSInbaM_L8rUbZz56vXu2GRqBZOCCdCUMFRF_k5KJIM6yJdGFJ9ZdHcTqTkZWOB30OjJi_NXkpza1sGU7r1zmdW1pEwAW3O5ms2WT5a1KV3b75aTAf5aPoHtmV1XxRk7-YO3dmurI7M-5V7vP9SMZHLBkrIhgvL26WsYCCRzEfSJfOFgOW5hXu-JAzWZrnABiO9sboAg6Rd01YBU1t4neqqy16C-T6GiNUIkhysD_HskgJ6th7y_iNo5F2iZX3oaGb-24EJfTo0vbmfQP_EVPvLtCuL0ADBv9TYhiq_UfRQjoHvNFhaCxNNTtG4WRHnHnYnY_kBuF9gT2eI74rcLtxni5ILdjKN9jlZ4wLpmnpjkOohidqb6muQADr19PXU-evZAhKafzkuvjU_PxZMTEyTilVle9gy72iGewEVzyx7Lbrz8v8hbk_F-vqhyv9dbE_GjS0HFPClk00pHUYFiySgkdx9XEfzFmtzgh0MZ7mEgCc5mErbUPsV6WY-Wohd3EzNSIwbwzaVPk7HAnsnjW9uOjFvd8ZiSNhuLtD76fr7XwcIKatg)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6522d5bb3ba94cb88eb3acb6227cc499&_e=G98aEz7cQdJmWdKHjZv9P2M2RXmtpkbO7qq5T89HmXEBeKs_cNG0Qy1FcAp2G9i3wp9mSuKnsagOipSInbaM_L8rUbZz56vXu2GRqBZOCCdCUMFRF_k5KJIM6yJdGFJ9ZdHcTqTkZWOB30OjJi_NXkpza1sGU7r1zmdW1pEwAW3O5ms2WT5a1KV3b75aTAf5aPoHtmV1XxRk7-YO3dmurANJ5Yd_n3ZjoNjaCfxLpwEZadRqlk0isVViVqD2mxsAs24erYGnHZw0nMgMHuu97-fXTTFysK6E3eRzfhj0o8wXg12SnhdXnXG2k8ikA1BlsMpsvXEprazLXRMCsP78c6DzZPZIZe-9jdapOT3bwjApwEeW80NovBf1zUqVEgxUybNEsPC0a6wv2mOVHSFxww_HDqfSNILMXmPN9NioU5CbEhK8n9Pjsc2Hf0qCOrkiYC6EkT932AeU7vQDJrkD0Mu9ft7q2WiTQPO1QDIBY-oXi-GE8s8bG8fHgzi0An0A8e9GVk8wNIO7bxtDJN1SbGpaHSn_rip6KrZ2TYAcYPXkE3u2_skIjeQhon1SjBuuMeFg9npUQsVKGBX5zAeIFMcwKiR_BgOBQzxdBans2ghNJN_Mrc471UBpeM15Qhvs)**

clean_body: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | | | | Peter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. Take the Survey | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. | | | ---|---|--- NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209

To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. | | | | | ---|--- Our team has identified the cycle’s best and most consequential opportunities to build durable Democratic power in state legislatures, and I’m so excited to share our new target map with you: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 Battlegrounds: Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the slimmest of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 Power Building Chambers: Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 Watch List: Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. We’re ready to hit the ground running – but this strategy is only as strong as the grassroots movement behind it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | State Dems are working daily to lower costs, address real concerns, and improve the everyday lives of folks like you in places like your state. That’s why it’s vital that we fund our strategy to defend our majorities, elect strong Democratic leaders, and invest in ultra-competitive races nationwide. Thank you for being part of this movement. Together, Heather Heather Williams President Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee P.S. body:
Click here to unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4xBla9HqS06_watf7h3QaQ2?source=header_rfe]
500% MATCH UNLOCKED FOR:
dpwillis67@gmail.com [#]
DEADLINE: 11:59PM
SUGGESTED SUPPORT: $15 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2025?amount=15]

We need to make sure you saw this important message:

The Rachel Maddow show just called on ALL of us to step up and do our part to defeat MAGA extremists and block Trump’s far-right agenda:

The Rachel Maddow Show: "The time is now to stand up and do all that we can to fight this administration." [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91305/images/Rachel%20Maddow%20Show%20QG.png]

We know the past few months have been difficult, but we can’t afford to sit back and stay silent.

We’re calling on 1,800 grassroots Democrats to step up immediately with $15 so we can rush resources to critical swing districts, ensure we have what it takes to FLIP the House, and finally hold Trump ACCOUNTABLE. Because this moment is so urgent, generous Democrats have unlocked a 500% MATCH – but only for the next 14 hours until midnight. Can we count on your $15 before this unprecedented opportunity expires? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2025?amount=15]

The past few months have been far from easy.

→ We watched Donald Trump and his MAGA Majority SLASH Social Security and Medicare...

→ We watched them try to SHUT DOWN our government...

→ We watched them CUT thousands of jobs and FIRE critical federal workers...

But we can’t give up hope. That’s why Rachel Maddow’s show is calling on all of us to do our part to defeat MAGA extremists’ radical agenda.

We’ve never been closer to flipping the House blue and holding Trump and his MAGA Majority ACCOUNTABLE once and for all – but we need grassroots supporters like you, to prove it! That’s why we’re counting on 1,800 grassroots Democrats to step up and chip in a 5X MATCHED $15. Please – this could be the day that we take back our government. But only if folks like you step up before it’s too late. Can we count on your $15? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2025?amount=15]

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: Boebert has shown her true colors, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
And we need to believe her.
| | |
---
Peter, Lauren Boebert (R) hasn’t been afraid to show us who she really is – and we need to believe her.
* Boebert skips votes, won’t meet with her constituents in person and uses her time in Congress to defend billionaires. I’ll actually show up, listen and fight for working and middle-class families – just like mine.

* Boebert divides people, spreads hate and chases headlines. I’m running to bring people together and focus on what actually matters: making life better for all of us.

* Boebert is backed by Elon Musk and monopoly interests. My campaign is powered entirely by grassroots folks like you – because I’ll never forget who I’m in this for.

**Peter, Boebert has made it clear: She’s about herself, not you. This district – and the people in it – deserve better.**_**[So if you’re ready to join our movement, please chip in $5 or more now to defeat Boebert and build a better future for Colorado.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107809905/545897928/-1014866554?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk33-fr-wu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBhMTZmYTYtNjMzMi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LZTEk3orstI0uL7sOIaM4zR0H9ksR5rfC6AvxIdDDoo=)**_
The GOP is ready to do everything in its power to prop up Boebert and stop us from flipping the House blue. I’m not worried about the road ahead, because I know there are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal and corruption can’t crush. But I do know that this is going to be an expensive race – and that’s why I’m personally reaching out to ask for your help.
**Unlike Boebert, I don’t have shady GOP megadonors to fund my campaign. Instead, I’m relying on support from folks like you, one grassroots donation at a time. With your help, I know we can send Boebert packing.**

Boebert skips votes, won’t meet with her constituents in person and uses her time in Congress to defend billionaires. I’ll actually show up, listen and fight for working and middle-class families – just like mine. Boebert divides people, spreads hate and chases headlines. I’m running to bring people together and focus on what actually matters: making life better for all of us. Boebert is backed by Elon Musk and monopoly interests. name: Noah Widmann
subject: I’m running for Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfde80a6a-a9cd-424e-b577-618d0a234fff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T054bf719-b404-4285-8ed1-fb6a4bdcd2e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, most people in Congress didn’t grow up like me. My name is Noah Widmann. I’m not a politician, but I’m proud to announce I’m running as a Democrat for Florida’s 7th Congressional District. Look here: For as long as I’ve been alive (29 years!), being wealthy and well connected has been the only path to winning a Congressional seat and representing the people. I’ve spent my entire life watching Congress get older, richer, and further from the people they are actually elected to fight for. I rarely see folks like me – a teen parent who worked as a fry cook for $8 an hour – in office. But I’ve been defying the odds my whole life – and with your help, we can do it again. [That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Unlike most candidates for Congress, I don’t have millions of dollars to fund my campaign. There aren’t a lot of former fry cooks in Congress. I hate that to run a winning campaign, it takes millions of dollars. Truly, this system is messed up! But Peter – I refuse to accept that only the ultra-wealthy should run for office. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split a $15 donation between myself and Blue Amp Action to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b9050b5-63ef-4d0f-b061-1dce3634483a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m a heck of a lot different than most members of Congress. I was raised by a single, disabled mother in central Florida. We lived in Section 8 housing and relied on food stamps to get by. The system was meant to work against people like me. When I secured a path to college through a wrestling scholarship, I thought I had broken the cycle of poverty. But on what was meant to be my first day of class, I found out I was going to be a father. So I made a new plan: Do whatever it takes to ensure my daughter can succeed in life. My daughter Elizabeth will be 10 years old next month. And her father — who worked day and night to provide for her — is running for Congress. [When I decided to run for Congress to fight for working-class families like mine, I knew I wouldn’t have the same connections as the D.C. insiders. But, Peter: I can’t take on this fight alone. I’ll need the support of folks like you to prove I have what it takes to win this race, defeat MAGA extremist Cory Mills, and flip the House for Democrats. Can I count on you to become a Founding Donor of my campaign by splitting $15 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action before midnight? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td54ac7e5-1dc7-4133-aa81-2ba0af63c8c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, when I was 18, I worked as a fry cook, bagged groceries at Publix, and did anything I could to pay the bills. I worked night shifts as an EMT to put myself through community college, becoming the first in my family to attend university—then law school. Now I fight to make sure people get the benefits they’ve earned and rely on, like Social Security. So when I see our Congressman attack working families like mine, it’s not just about politics. It’s deeply personal. [Peter, I’m not running for Congress because I have deep pockets or connections that can get me elected – I’m running in spite of that. I’m running to break the cycle and ensure everyone has a seat at the table. I’ve seen how hard it is to change a system that wasn’t built for folks like me to win. But I’ve also seen what’s possible when people join together, organize, and build change. So please: Can I count on you to split a $15 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action, become a Founding Donor, and help me pull off a historic victory? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57940734-1a58-4f15-8d8e-d88eb36a61f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8d2ba6b-5697-4a4b-ab7e-38f903373a3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

I'm honored to have just earned the official endorsement of the Ohio Republican Party - **by a historic 60-3 margin.**
That kind of result doesn't happen by chance. It's a reflection of our momentum, our message, and the movement we're building across Ohio.

The Ohio GOP is behind us. President Trump is behind us. But none of it matters unless YOU are too.

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: The gloves are off. To Republicans: It’s your vote or your seat.
body:
---
Derek, I’m reaching out with an update on what’s going on right now — and what Democrats are doing about it (and no, this is not a fundraising request). Here’s what’s happening: To pay for Donald Trump’s billionaire tax cuts, Republicans in Congress are scheming up a budget that includes the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history. Once again, they’re showing that their top priority will always be their billionaire backers, not working families. Medicaid and SNAP are critical programs that millions of Americans rely on for quality, affordable health care and to put food on the table. These are programs meant to help families during tough times — which Trump has created with his broken economy. Republicans need to wake up and realize there are consequences for their actions. **It is their vote or their seat. With your help, we’re sending that message, loud and clear.** At the DNC, we’re targeting four of the most vulnerable House Republicans — Tom Barrett (MI-07), Don Bacon (NE-02), Mike Lawler (NY-17), Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-01) — putting pressure on them to do the right thing and vote against this disastrous bill. To do that, we’re organizing both on the ground and online. We even held a town hall in Congressman Fitzpatrick’s district last week — his constituents packed the room and boy were they angry. This is what we’re doing at the DNC. We’re fighting back to stop bad ideas, rally against dangerous bills, and hold Republicans to account. We’re preparing to take back Congress in the midterms. We’re building a long-term Democratic success plan. As part of that, we’ve started investing $1 million a month in each of our Democratic state parties — which get Democrats elected in your own backyard — and we launched a cutting-edge War Room to put Republicans on the defense every single day, compete in every information space, and forcefully challenge Trump. This work isn’t always flashy — it’s hard. But all of us are up for the challenge. At the end of the day, we’ll fight tooth-and-nail for working people. With your help, that’s exactly what we’ll continue to do. Thank you for reading this message, and I’ll have more to share soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250516_3454_fr&refcode2=3454_22930333_1IMiY0&akid=3454%2E22930333%2E1IMiY0)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Steve Scalise
subject: You are not an ATM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_401a48c528d992c48a0d3b92b6f&n=1).
---
| Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won’t do that to you.**

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE or Elon Musk’s work.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what Elon Musk and DOGE are doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

** _[So that's why I’m dropping into your inbox right now:](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDSerq1ql4DBusyX8IYJZnHsJbXrXn0N8EINHz-XSc360KLHvMvwGsor2beiJeNMxwzPOTSSu1mN1m0NC3VMXgpc-5y7tiGKGWGZom6pmQy_ogBPwMn_0jmUJaBVmGshMEjzJqerPeW0Z8S5OjxNECuyzVyExDaL58NhTphOqkO8zQOu7iGYEZLvt5S6FYGYiZkwk0jToLejqP7cefp8wJDa2fv7wMuj24DpzaCx-CzA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_401a48c528d992c48a0d3b92b6f&n=2 "So why I’m dropping into your inbox right now: ")_**

The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything Elon Musk, President Trump, and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste.

Of course, the DC Swamp can’t have that.

That’s why they’re mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against Elon Musk.

_Democrats are suing him. They’re pushing for partisan investigations. They’re firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They’re introducing legislation to block his access. And a top Democrat even floated impeachment against Elon Musk._

Their plan is simple:
**1.** Attack Trump and Musk
**2.** Drag them into court battles
**3.** Slow them down at every turn
**4.** Use the press to attack their work
**5.** Unload millions to win the Midterms
**6.** Block Trump’s ENTIRE legislative agenda
**That’s where House Republicans – and most importantly, YOU – can make a major difference.**

Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE.

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it’s over. They win the House.

That’s why I’m tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I’m imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority – and President Trump’s entire legislative agenda along with it.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDSerq1ql4DBusyX8IYJZnHsJbXrXn0N8EINHz-XSc360KLHvMvwGsor2beiJeNMxwzPOTSSu1mN1m0NC3VMXgpc-5y7tiGKGWGZom6pmQy_ogBPwMn_0jmUJaBVmGshMEjzJqerPeW0Z8S5OjxNECuyzVyExDaL58NhTphOqkO8zQOu7iGYEZLvt5S6FYGYiZkwk0jToLejqP7cefp8wJDa2fv7wMuj24DpzaCx-CzA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_401a48c528d992c48a0d3b92b6f&n=3 "If you can afford to do so, I’m
imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority – and
President Trump’s entire legislative agenda along with it. ")**_
| | [PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDSerq1ql4DBusyX8IYJZnHsJbXrXn0N8EINHz-XSc360KLHvMvwGsor2beiJeNMxwzPOTSSu1mN1m0NC3VMXgpc-5y7tiGKGWGZom6pmQy_ogBPwMn_0jmUJaBVmGshMEjzJqerPeW0Z8S5OjxNECuyzVyExDaL58NhTphOqkO8zQOu7iGYEZLvt5S6FYGYiZkwk0jToLejqP7cefp8wJDa2fv7wMuj24DpzaCx-CzA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_401a48c528d992c48a0d3b92b6f&n=4 "
PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Again, I’m NOT pretending this money is going to fund DOGE or anything these other groups are alluding to.

This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump’s MAGA agenda.

If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now.

God bless you,
_– Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

| | | [ PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDSerq1ql4DBusyX8IYJZnHsJbXrXn0N8EINHz-XSc360KLHvMvwGsor2beiJeNMxwzPOTSSu1mN1m0NC3VMXgpc-5y7tiGKGWGZom6pmQy_ogBPwMn_0jmUJaBVmGshMEjzJqerPeW0Z8S5OjxNECuyzVyExDaL58NhTphOqkO8zQOu7iGYEZLvt5S6FYGYiZkwk0jToLejqP7cefp8wJDa2fv7wMuj24DpzaCx-CzA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_401a48c528d992c48a0d3b92b6f&n=5 " PLEASE

body:

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c554e0f563bd40799420bb59868c8c02&_e=zv-ZR8fXrz02sm_fJv59j8FMutY00dpny0KGqRZXh5UjEyta4-FF4ut3h5QjrcDaYccprB8BlNEwk0yMD0wjGISE9DOVKnGphlDhvpWtII_RnbxIa13xGqjPkUuC6EsCo5lbEKSS2A5rBRStObXNIw43dn_ciTXWMNzkhcMhO34OKLMeFyHCk5jvd0OKW_eDC5lV2bgtKQFKiscu2Wmj8bCW5t6ud0Gun6jj_fczOTvu8qQUVBm4m4abd-npr9GNisgIf8lwKmWZMvIvELOXGcuDXBhoji-14RVFTGYPx_P7RGwkNNR3EwvSO1X3irgoAGkevvQ7JToG0y6c9qj_jUMMlfBlcoaGs6LZAusFUHSGL7QKaq8TWGvYwO0450RGthgl6VR7wjrxYs5Lj9y7G55TFkYuMXMv5RSFfOQxJR0zo3yKDwUMbN0L--t2cgMrX_y0dLpynFdVPUjLFQ-Iw3HboXnN_5vWI4sxYR1sX9wEeS6aPvQNCmmu_qM8DJluFOp22gOf2FuKedRuy5f1Bw9n5FcPn-YN5SDeaB0W8wvIRZoaPujYA2dnDs157k0-xf8DKheMoVO1jxNo9J7vx8ke5t_Itocqj_Mne_hPSbhvOQ_FM4BFCjMW-GCyDeTyTYeL_vxV8AjjPrEaxDOVYoOchSO_aKqzD3IsRNNFu3encscuCm0DqZBm-m7yrtlvuI1rGVk2E0xYT7V9N0C0Nw%3D%3D)
---
| |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c554e0f563bd40799420bb59868c8c02&_e=zv-ZR8fXrz02sm_fJv59j8FMutY00dpny0KGqRZXh5UjEyta4-FF4ut3h5QjrcDaYccprB8BlNEwk0yMD0wjGISE9DOVKnGphlDhvpWtII_RnbxIa13xGqjPkUuC6EsCo5lbEKSS2A5rBRStObXNIw43dn_ciTXWMNzkhcMhO34OKLMeFyHCk5jvd0OKW_eDC5lV2bgtKQFKiscu2Wmj8bCW5t6ud0Gun6jj_fczOTvu8qQUVBm4m4abd-npr9GNRTPxXzxeEgVF_wQL01FW1HJuAgL8qC1ojEHazJxQOCJYCEdLM9QoULRZywDnX6A9Xz_MQb9vmHd5Zpk15QrrxCdD2hKpxWdviEjGLR4sFpyLKPc2iDwZ5qT-ZEw68lYDCIHkBoTK_NC1D7YCUQDS2bukrMH_408MdsLcOmJQK4NJoxS2exjw7EYEcLneXSrWLYie7-Z9lhofzVWvN070B0K7a1A8PTN2DCfkY0pDXJhjN6219b8s1LDZfkIPVPu1mFaQnp3vHd8BEOppHueyTpno9FDUYLpDaP6csQ58ItgESqC2iiRixBw6lovmXm7rr7SLcRcXcrvD3ZUX3CAzvyfeZK4Os_Jl_MVC_zxuAYJJoiJ-C0y_davKsnZAsxNyEY2yKmi4_X7bBpTnIMCYzONdLpRNosEzJWwW443TRtd6F6SdpufA2Qs4UdxjXhH7IrcSdVkEwSYnotnpOyWtEQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c554e0f563bd40799420bb59868c8c02&_e=zv-ZR8fXrz02sm_fJv59j8FMutY00dpny0KGqRZXh5UjEyta4-FF4ut3h5QjrcDaYccprB8BlNEwk0yMD0wjGISE9DOVKnGphlDhvpWtII_RnbxIa13xGqjPkUuC6EsCo5lbEKSS2A5rBRStObXNIw43dn_ciTXWMNzkhcMhO34OKLMeFyHCk5jvd0OKW_eDC5lV2bgtKQFKiscu2Wmj8bCW5t6ud0Gun6jj_fczOTvu8qQUVBm4m4abd-npr9GNx8fLSvB0uO354IFGo1lyLKfUG8_6hC3_MZZxqW6jwd9Ki1C1z7YDbtejEDP8RqrJRE2ois-y35gCWe8zqYg0ISHc60-4lUDBgxU-Gmeaydd9BfTJl8dCvrL0NDikuf-cS8zB1AmJPiyt_T9sWsZxDPsM7vqdBmJ4PynOjUjTIusfY7QEMbcEDTmn5pY3v9neeyq3OE0GdZThyB5edZtNGdTn5az88-w5MzwtNsVw7HBke13RC8Xy-45Wqq_Nx8JhYAxO2wyYUNN0n2QLHRzN66WDnQUAvBLIzRBi1l8K4Pfal7IPJ7gbQFedAcROg8YAs_2qLJ0mf_AMn1LddyHl88Do54rsCzhAv28ma9444UGlFGh1yl97V3Ztgnnk4C1U6tyxSAiNgI1BU6JQmGMeq3j3ke3l6tiSD3ZkPQ1XS16gniv3vvtdAegV-_o2UQRhrDqs1aZBuoCzFxFxqHRZDg%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: Limited Time: Free Color Map of Rome A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Friend, The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today. To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, " The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic." You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of " The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," along with the companion map today: By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced " The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Americans for Energy Dominance
subject: Don’t Let RINOs Destroy the Family Homestead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Alliance for Solar Choice
body:
Fellow Patriot,
Washington is at it again.
Right now, a handful of **RINOs and radical leftists are working behind closed doors to destroy the family homestead.** They don’t want you to teach your own kids, raise your own food, and they definitely don’t want you to produce your own electricity.
RINOs are going to gut the tax credits that help American families power their own homes independently, protect themselves from utility blackouts, and prepare for whatever chaos lies ahead.
**[TELL CONGRESS TO PROTECT YOUR RIGHT TO GENERATE YOUR OWN POWER. ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/atOc/?__vbtrk=MjkwNDkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNDkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Make no mistake: this is a direct attack on self-reliant Americans like you.
Thanks to**tax credits that were reauthorized by President Trump** during his first term, patriotic families across the country have been able to install rooftop solar and battery storage – shielding themselves from a broken energy grid and soaring electricity bills. They’ve taken matters into their own hands to survive.
But the political establishment – bought and paid for by corrupt utility monopolies and globalist interests – wants you dependent on the same fragile grid that collapses when you need it most. They want control.
**[FIGHT BACK NOW: SAVE ENERGY TAX CREDITS FOR AMERICAN FAMILIES](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/atOc/?__vbtrk=MjkwNDkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNDkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
President Trump said it best: “I’m a big fan of solar.” Because he knows that home solar is a big part of independence, resilience and protecting the American homestead.
We need more power from all energy sources, including home solar because it keeps your family safe, secure and self-sufficient when the system fails.
**[SPEAK UP: DON’T LET RINOS TURN OUT THE LIGHTS ON THE AMERICAN HOMESTEAD. ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/atOc/?__vbtrk=MjkwNDkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNDkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**Stand with Americans for Energy Dominance. Stand for survival. Stand for freedom.**
Thank you,
Americans for Energy Dominance
|

---

body:

Fellow American,

It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and **I need your immediate attention on something.**

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026.

Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority.

**Fellow American, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy.**

Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time.

Fellow American, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, _this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left._

[**Kash Patel, Pam Bondi, and I are trying to turn America into a winning team, just like I did at Auburn University when we dominated the SEC for nearly a decade.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=af88811fc09f49b9920839e864aa4102&_e=Deeihk1bFY5OH7RsM5WLSX_Ny4i7vjzHvaMNc52MS0OHgNaf7ZX-w4uVu4E4oynyMW53qliL9NyTELbbUFYYgyuUT2sJzCRE0LK-nfNdlFkb3aGmGHwZQwQ9k8BVTsUR30KS8YBTNtfkQKqsC5RVejcIAHKQnon5vagspG6IJXMB3oaqDuJrKH9wbDXnKsS4Q___Q_fV3_Vrmsffh_W8TrG6zwsWOrhuHj-QYHWVa9F5zuWZGyntV8uZa1XXC-v5-_xMvLMHX0rwJULsNEr59mC6J3-G2fiQE8Iv43s71mDlV_xijS0c-hz7lzZ6h0Isgo7KYoji4p1L6Nc2CM1iZYGerQt51JyK1RpaW81CHnb-vh_y8X4c3ujOoULiZ34_phE_9LF-8CUvDK1XjFF8fcs2qXrir3BPZLxVlp1nj6I2tyk2mLlfw357fKs5MwQWjwCRdBvis2JpIjTJQna7mIGWidfGMCUQVugxfeiCl_QaeKPtv_lSvfxBMk3enxxJTNpjZ2EHCJEKE_MKkt1vAZWEhSTUKoNTPi2Vfx_9dsEGiFzc2SjNhTHEWcY2JBCu)

Coach Tuberville
