Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=af88811fc09f49b9920839e864aa4102&_e=Deeihk1bFY5OH7RsM5WLSX_Ny4i7vjzHvaMNc52MS0OHgNaf7ZX-w4uVu4E4oynyMW53qliL9NyTELbbUFYYgyuUT2sJzCRE0LK-nfNdlFkb3aGmGHwZQwQ9k8BVTsUR30KS8YBTNtfkQKqsC5RVejcIAHKQnon5vagspG6IJXMB3oaqDuJrKH9wbDXnKsS41YzXamVu5XNxD5JCpTT0kISAUcdgThke3UgN-zSFA5zZzF0NR6OI9vUsN-HF_k241HRs3vMQ9rcL3MqdIdp73bSTcFmwntBB20AL1tky9zLEhrEQz7nerK6F706tPz4XQLuEX212QpufmJnc72VDVSfvQvHn_DhSiw1TgzI8GgI7JsctPMKvBHWlKW6GiDMMEASdDJSqpd7pmXQgNBCBkCb08V7dtUHfOrZy3ST6tE2k_2nUxOcNK8yMAS8xb3UbeRyhTDlMD7h01LW-4MstOiK6iRWX1Uu9y73ZfrZzC912MaMXqpDGg1GPq2dQgOb40Z75eoMXuKo4LvVhJJsQAIa6M16DNigXDpkCmrfBQTo2DvbenmFCnXydqmpU5qQI)

body:
You’ve probably heard that phrase more times than you can count—usually from far-Left politicians and media elites, aimed at anyone who dares to challenge their agenda. I know that I hear it—a LOT.

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/iXwAcZe7h3arYxuRaIpov5f84rC39owVPOPKm6dfm-tCNz_pE1rJeEUG6TuvOMxjIxpEt2fMETnrlijWvqP8IcUjBFukKpXOgtCELvs-eyx02YAKkMav9JbmG2d7q7gdrNG26sN-mux6oShWM1_LXjnLSO7zoS_t_ZVKmHnvp0kErBRmMjxLFT7f/knhaKMjif6rTvrq-YQJoCZiQ5uq93LPa/9)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/ur4ITr4lFUpTJwQ-1f71cdJc3GxSl3wlLtAF5EBfKum1fs1kgLNmYHExQB51UOShPiJsBReD99WqB_CSo5ZDKkCAgmZo1w_cnKIEIKRARS-lw2f8CfYJWxJdtNdeDuOujGk-yxKSQv13bm3l1CpYRciJG2Ev_fVEamFUiInprT6Xd9yv3RDXY5qUKq6cQMwu-qAIMINgzFe9Z2aK0EZsbwZ0pyYu4SMIJrFlM5mDimHnSsI2BKbqzyOs5er0wonP0H-gsSa0LyNQVDmQtlzXPjvPxy1SQR5m8Dlr6AmgzeaGZXb8dUokSJz7cYKTUHjKoFvYMKqhPoRvVj1P8nS6w7uv05_-pVG0xpIuoWB9sSaNQ-gdVy3bbtdNOD3xLKO-xjdJ_zMT9Ktgtto-AlPkBtutVyTu53iHHUoYQDwxly_bSg-vtsu_6R1dmGP5O05KDiC-Kq6uQSApEwq0gqdWGUnH5tA33HhrjOKp_MbDhWIRxy_jVEvS1vhI4pY-ma6KbWE69VUSpRE5T6UZQrkO_albwrRBDT1ww59e08j_HMkxOII5nMqNK-J4dGks2PGqISGfIAG7sGu4dfF-Escapq_6rPwuAHlMRZn_Am0A9er7JTqDXgos44lMRRyY-MbiRTW-LXPvS17Yw_-W1zHDG36kSJUbcodz9CJeVb0d-qdYzgwDXhK59xqwb6G_fwogwq0OxPWvlNEgg2V_0Mfw5HxQKguSxaAXDUlt_Oq9P6CSfELCziPRAAtoVH9D7Jo/pfaemjBcEKSaxXNKS7xfSErPM13f7ZWd/9) Dear Friend, _" Threat to democracy!"_

You've probably heard that phrase more times than you can count--usually from far-Left politicians and media elites, aimed at anyone who dares to challenge their agenda. I know that I hear it--a LOT.

But here's the irony: their real concern isn't democracy--it's that they're losing their grip on power, which comes in the form of unelected bureaucrats graduating from elite institutions.

Finally, Americans like you and I are questioning their "expertise" and challenging the assumption that they are fit to govern while insulated from the will of We the People.

That said, our form of government _is_ under threat--but not in the way they claim. The real danger is the drip, drip, drip erosion of our founding principles, which has been decades in the making.

**[That’s why, on June 17, Hillsdale College will launch a new _free_ online course: “The Federalist.”](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/jlsgQ7sYfp-6leCCDMdBNTofNeungFpL_Jh0K59xaWhD9mkBCEhYAGuUIQsLkMZA2FRBQUePAwUiG5PePqiWDCqqODPQWONcxq5XvVlzww6JYjphhhWuOWsZGvHNK7Qq-8WWSGGQlPGtr0pkCnUtZUa9lYtSNrDaElNiz6MFIFvAx1f0qI1XQxoDA4uKBaceOqg1fjUsT18h5nlGnJBwtde4EWiUxx4-Eal7NVZLnCu-mdirD6pQjP2F7j8UvqfQUecc-dbXSqVZkpiPJ1IsJiyMCWSCnqnoL6Ndxpr5iQEOJ2_8Q2_xMtm6lkfCmis7K5cUxwq21jF21rbG4Jcf6oP8tUNg6EFjApI0K9rkoALLU10ZYwo5R-SlZpdMG4NrqOEGT8ThoG0pxeX4uMReCj1vbrA8QKZH2l8OZpt3KLLFFrID92pE7vEcyQ8W9J3K7cLRDi__sKkUgZOQVIFk_y_QQQhv74yemD66SgYtPc8a5mXXAXhUghpeGF-QuVJYp6XNk2Wue3fYmDiGA1GpDQ-PORCJvrM5LcU8o85_m3svu6-hT75QFyneYZ70sljblAgSaqJ5c56D14CRl2QXoH5H73OQWQA3aAKxihbOzMniLrYVgNB8OqiOJpYe5eROJ_5YmkdA7D3ZpZYFA6Z670ynpKiFYvFYA6heXaFO_NYDN63fIRl0ZppF7NGCmZuqQi4OVY-aSHO8D4980j1hlI3c_hSkv3IpIkcGdPPpXb5H60xC0jdqMytt069GkkM/9YrxLiN61FaFoNhQJBS45G7iZqh4NI78/9) **

This course dives into the essays by Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--written to explain and defend the Constitution during its ratification in 1787 and 1788. **Now, you can understand the Constitution as the Founders intended.**

Enrollment won't open to the public until late June--but you can be among the **first** to sign up using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-federalist-papers-teaser**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/7Gcq2ZDL4z4tpq2zIZz_IMGACuJ1BsQm_AkOTUGq1xIbWbfMvn843x4wJY6hsVE2oyNZpsPWn8VHvTKazeRtp9SN-NKJuq7tn3_R8_ifUSV2v-imsVbCjFg7i2tye6uSmYqT9nFelpqSRCc8uVlSGe8k9s4MVz0goiRZiSEb9jZklpLNxGQERgI93vB0lrD8aE3jRArJk5VS1E5FGNyAqx5yqOqP5DD0c36XhjNpMUxwWIbdLZ_c7VypHTNDjHaxlCkZJG4c__mj4JvcNfDa-oq_O1Pg5_MVwN0qRR4xHKiHWAb3fkL_9m51R4mrwIxbmmtsTQkJTZyE4XI2Rr93qMh24XH6RNtdBYQDb_TDuhKPXAHn_qKA6oHtx_rHqg484lEuOECmS6T_USt69bjcudvWnkeqsljOpK35AATbzjh19PrQl2QArGHAZX_iXWY5GyNfeg__b0cwCtz-twxRDHhsbBV6Sxz49ziZNWb6EMchgfhW4_g2KMe8T8jLrITQq1sCC9I8yxZ61-wuZwTbUdr-SVTLl0CorUwjSEzeF_CLLCuaFq8m1iUvs0jQL1mg3LSytZco0gKd2Sk0VXy1uPuk2_JnCIrlNueYpzPqW3cOIIPuOcKtl7K0ViSHEGi5zVDPztvzb0Ox9vA5X5fnA5b5fvNyvy-DyKRH1tAAErgL89lqvj8CydoXE196FC5p6kljfAd3JynUdx3o2cXl61ZS0c2rt_1QuNzBq6pC-9K2IVDFBYKhQ3QpCBZm6oI/AV8g_wh1sXwprH1oOhPzY8nzD9Jp6c59/9)

This course goes beyond theory. It gives you the knowledge and clarity needed to defend liberty and help restore the constitutional republic our Founders entrusted to us. And it's taught by the same great faculty that our students learn from here on campus.

In a time when the truth is twisted, and history is rewritten, equip yourself with the real story--straight from the source.

clean_body: You’ve probably heard that phrase more times than you can count—usually from far-Left politicians and media elites, aimed at anyone who dares to challenge their agenda. I know that I hear it—a LOT. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, " Threat to democracy!" You've probably heard that phrase more times than you can count--usually from far-Left politicians and media elites, aimed at anyone who dares to challenge their agenda. I know that I hear it--a LOT. But here's the irony: their real concern isn't democracy--it's that they're losing their grip on power, which comes in the form of unelected bureaucrats graduating from elite institutions. Finally, Americans like you and I are questioning their "expertise" and challenging the assumption that they are fit to govern while insulated from the will of We the People. That said, our form of government is under threat--but not in the way they claim. The real danger is the drip, drip, drip erosion of our founding principles, which has been decades in the making. This course dives into the essays by Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--written to explain and defend the Constitution during its ratification in 1787 and 1788. Now, you can understand the Constitution as the Founders intended. Enrollment won't open to the public until late June--but you can be among the first to sign up using this secure link: This course goes beyond theory. It gives you the knowledge and clarity needed to defend liberty and help restore the constitutional republic our Founders entrusted to us. And it's taught by the same great faculty that our students learn from here on campus. In a time when the truth is twisted, and history is rewritten, equip yourself with the real story--straight from the source. name: James Carville
subject: This race is a bellwether for the entire country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88743?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe)
Peter,
I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: **this one is as important as it gets.**
The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.
**[So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution between Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia and State Democrats Committee?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88743?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88743?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe)**
Here’s what’s got me terrified:
The _Cook Political Report_ has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.
If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen.
Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.
That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.
**[Will you contribute right now to State Democrats Committee and Abigail Spanberger to help Abigail Spanberger win this race and deliver a major victory for Democrats?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88743?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88744?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88744?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88744?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88744?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88744?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88744?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88743?refcode=em20250516-8955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8955%2E614464%2E4dBjEe)
---

James Carville

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Everyone has a role to play in our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate

Everyone has a role to play in our democracy, team. That's what I said on The Weeknight recently: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107815749/545913880/-1692162061?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.16_Can-Do_B1_F1_S1_C1_90op_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDA4NWI5OS02YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hg_vYoXCbj7OmiqchEMt5FdwjTzwCw-hgNtkt1vqdes=) I've been asking myself that question ever since I joined the Senate back in January.

And my answer is: **_Whatever the American people need._**

You sent me to the Senate on the promise I'd fight for you and your families. And that's exactly what I've been doing. | ✅ I sat in solidarity with fellow Senator Cory Booker and Leader Jeffries to protest Republicans' attempts to slash Medicaid funding.

✅ I've introduced The Housing Supply Frameworks Act to increase access to affordable housing.

✅ I'm a cosponsor of the bipartisan Clean Slate Act to give more people second chances in the workforce.

✅ I rejected Donald Trump's extremist cabinet nominees and called out their dangerous attacks on our health care, education, and due process.
---
**_And I'm just getting started._**

[**What I can do at this moment is get up every day and put my energy into fighting for you. Here's what you can do: support me and Senate Democrats getting to work for you by chipping in just $10. We all have a part to play, team:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107815750/545913882/-1692162061?amount=10&refcode2=EL10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.16_Can-Do_B1_F1_S1_C1_90op_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDA4NWI5OS02YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hg_vYoXCbj7OmiqchEMt5FdwjTzwCw-hgNtkt1vqdes=)

name: Lee Johnson
subject: Washington Needs Builders, Not Dividers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107815508/545913193/2109746102?refcode=250516_MFC_Johnson_BuildersNotDividers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzVjYjgxMy02YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQLPzYyccs40vTHyk8AwM3YuudUmTNnSPgXUY8Z1TeE=) Friends, I’ve been building my entire life. My family built roads and bridges for a living, and I’ve been operating heavy machinery before I could drive. From building infrastructure, to working on major water and energy projects, to leading major companies - I’ve spent my entire life building things from the ground up and fixing them when they break. I believe that Washington D.C. needs more builders - not dividers. That’s what I’m running for the U.S. Senate - to build an economy that works for everybody, not just the elite few. While career politicians like Lindsey Graham have been busy trading stocks, funding endless wars, and answering to corporate interests - South Carolina has been left behind. It’s time that we send a Senator to Washington that actually represents us, the people of South Carolina. **If you believe in building an economy that works for everyone, and an American Dream that includes everyone, then donate to our campaign today.** [**By donating in the first 48 hours of our campaign, split evenly with Seth Moulton, you can help be a Founding Donor to this movement to help bring back unity, civility , and accountability to our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107815509/545913194/2036686014?refcode=250516_MFC_Johnson_BuildersNotDividers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzVjYjgxMy02YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQLPzYyccs40vTHyk8AwM3YuudUmTNnSPgXUY8Z1TeE=) Thanks,
Lee Johnson
Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: At my wits' end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

|
---
| | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/LR5Efbu-rYqk5nBkipL0t4LMHFOueQn1GVTaPFgG6twLTYGYqxf8C4Vpi2fyZHDOB6FkMuD-macJdJEIBWsarydgFoDa9BAu5Lp7CQ-_VdyJ58l_etWoed9wxLkScq1rbCe6_1Fli1PiOUqo5A700X_6vIY92hYhXkn7q2D7K0ocIzsqUM1atHf1HVFMsdQwTPxsA32aVGQ3jCU9WYWyo6UAUpscv_rDbQ1AYKmKeoMe0vfrE_Lckr8O0TY0w9QqhsVyQZKMD1Mg7QDEZDzYRuuoreBRN-Dndf_8g-TFaOGq5YB_Nn0ZeAPRQj-GPAp84NAUZ9wSUIpNAuy2whjIsJj_n6kQP78ouIilj1EX1c1E7ShkTgx3rCO-sr8gDrecbrX0wex-E1kOyo75TrIrVs_Y01hm--MU4LQaJrKeFznec1aMwFG1754wBQnowGIXoFPGAw-yXXh1q8Z4zz9lFwWYZWxQ_-0W0gIZOQCD6q2UzKlpqN1T/xlFyyo-3OG0H4283iPhmJQqi2OATv947/9)
---

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

**[Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/u8GvSSEO-aceVHpc3b9Jup8anubIQhfi3CpspXcWV6yvZjAofBEyI1d1p-gjO7AL8IBJuZvegHyjgjU2_NMZP7fV3KEtJMhKw4nP2UmIcNcekQJjDaWk1V3LHhWAq9yvT2c8lTZos3wwU4udRSvZaUk3NZPI69g6kaHvomhIM_vLDAQyHNPEVJBMKZ7oeW2JxWEIXprMpK5177mAUhtlaiup8FNW4_SVls-c0_a3z3_8dm4Jp5EcsMlfMer1NpDjXCuVWqOXsI-pDMI89u5VVR7lbgevqnfIKEATaywonUbzy2GABS58Kc7e73ACPQsufe8l5FmsT8QkhGE_op8woQ1CxkvYbHyRxGrn-6RRAr2dx1AHzKP49SNcdCOv_HYmuB70g1J6imV7C7AZcZisugC-Uiq-jQ0dQ9N2xoR_0gR3M4HHvSmKKAJOmdfXnEpsZC4eCu8Qc9EW6ReodTQSur8puBleZJEz2w-2ZJPMvz0zO1gPZKfJ/6QI0rGtSwHooqr-QKX6YFI3Y10sFLNgj/9 "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.
In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/CJNHEgFgG2VHUaBFBHUqhyHKSIVqz2AD6lfmrwhw5eUFTv9gtM6LA77qqplKGelg6b82f2EyBzEFTlqb-t-2yFV2L_6l-3d4r_wJKIzCt42pIUZlkj-06o64cjla25B-nvcSOokZeN_jgLRt-2sEd3_WcY_Bg2N2PnLxHaxtDoiJb1-6IsOsoblffNd0qJGWIWnUOmx501DGsloSNG2GhzcNE_zDMLXMta3u8x9wbUQTSdcJg-2gjEX57VV2y8LJWyMJwjR6YQ47KtKpJGtecA5seoYlHYEQCz_O1cneCrs7AEb9oVb1iBat8XE1i3hKuT-hGt0viTmrmsluT-RDpGa1kHvB4ZNWexKQyKmqNpwoy4an5yRp5Hx3PUKoXAyw600AFfGotZm0CuvlbJXwqoFU0alSzCd9vrCmiSlHNPk7AuQ4C7d7mUs42TblcNobOA6WpEtbjC3WEgAcg0NFx5r0k717zB66P-npS7Z1002ibWa2_590/LuecYMMPrNzhFMHZ3Sb-THxM6_Jf_49Q/9 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.")**

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | | [Chip In NOW!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/KlXHzxDLIYHTj4hW-kNorgVYqtJQofARDZcHTTygz6Yv5Y6MOJUnyfizjIp3kOHLXc0TWS4HTykzkWvXlBMSvxFmYAVpDYRz1w8x3tqgbJuyJIPLaRI0HkSLmMpFNB4ODk8Z7zd8P-auiRJFS-WdTsWC0PJZfG51t2cgwTEQIC5pCjENDntGN7txDwFC-FXndg3ZUaua0jArmWKyaPWZH5X9Z18TX9QsXcXr35748qN9zlDEzBdNd-mB0LB9woagC_Fy6nSho21aWHpfG8wd7VcrPaLd9Vfcf4Y60CgvjJseMg4y-deG_A-UQ4wj0dzvX-tyV8GtiZ-AISBYAB5B_Vi8Hdu6mVi7GPZWagRVYy363zxu2eQcdvjYXhk5Xc_C4UKn7WLZ-QXvUtvRQuSBOqc_m8-r_9XbgKmswTBSF9c5vsvRT6Z1GQGFAy8bId0ztn19qlXKUBvLb1fzwltW9ceh8rnifZWhJJjrbf4QXnL7uotPlmT3/B6DiHxBXAAPfzza45x0J1s01ShJlEpfC/9 "Chip In NOW!")
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,

Ryan Zinke

clean_body: The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest. | | | | | Closing the curtains on my campaign. I'm at my wits' end, Peter. The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest. "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue." In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again. Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6. In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party. If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation." I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out? | | | "Chip In NOW!" You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!

name: Roy Beck
subject: Trump can’t fix this alone — he needs backup
body:
Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | |
#
---
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fead5ce6a4f44e7888ccf368a278e441&_e=GV94SENU-yKE4uhZr12p9VPn4OKXaevAz-9cJ53XrK847zZ27aM1QPs8LyUDMEcBbisr535DsWcdnohpuNjcT9k6TyG6ZBjg57JomXIa0OAv4XA6qwhUSyFoo7QjhNQjCh_7UW00NfeQsSqhOrIzVa0puWm0e2566b-60F9l4h26-LpTKNx71Xop_PFq5_l4cnSuV1BB0rzLsR6mSh17Iop3oEJTKmBr8TfddzCfTxRyDgQwidW7F13EYjBbEqi9fBPxx2QdzRKcBmTHeqsDywbrPfsEmtH4NfD_hIUs1MMeEh1kUEKDt3hi5QbYQh5ncOaJsGjRQ4DR8eRRdkX7CG57MapXSGwy5j3SWbi4moyGAWOM67GE6gfK_zDcdci-)
---
Peter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fead5ce6a4f44e7888ccf368a278e441&_e=GV94SENU-yKE4uhZr12p9VPn4OKXaevAz-9cJ53XrK847zZ27aM1QPs8LyUDMEcBbisr535DsWcdnohpuNjcT9k6TyG6ZBjg57JomXIa0OAv4XA6qwhUSyFoo7QjhNQjCh_7UW00NfeQsSqhOrIzVa0puWm0e2566b-60F9l4h26-LpTKNx71Xop_PFq5_l4cnSuV1BB0rzLsR6mSh17IhqECJT9jmnAQoz8MOsZZZZ7KBTaGSTO6h3Q8vUIOJp7pUHG4d38oUbiKKo8_Xv9F45jeA92ihQW83FPQ2gQvSwVxf5ZkXnwnF8FpN6SQNR6icQMxs_PjezQSqS1EPQYV0CKENMR4DxyELq6Kp3u8LhgYf02dhFP2Y4e-AXxa0Xb)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fead5ce6a4f44e7888ccf368a278e441&_e=GV94SENU-yKE4uhZr12p9VPn4OKXaevAz-9cJ53XrK847zZ27aM1QPs8LyUDMEcBbisr535DsWcdnohpuNjcT9k6TyG6ZBjg57JomXIa0OAv4XA6qwhUSyFoo7QjhNQjCh_7UW00NfeQsSqhOrIzVa0puWm0e2566b-60F9l4h26-LpTKNx71Xop_PFq5_l4cnSuV1BB0rzLsR6mSh17Io7iu_ArV4yFB44SsCO-CFc9T80tZC9-EQ8IiqJXHQ5pZlCPcA9ul2_iR-Lxc1d97q3OM1gSUYLNn37zTKoQzmlYbLCKsgpklXBSHmxno4tDuzvodNm2lYjQ00bQhLcIzHMu-fMPhiX_kwnfK3c04dF4CnrLbKY1cyV8fvjWe39i)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fead5ce6a4f44e7888ccf368a278e441&_e=GV94SENU-yKE4uhZr12p9VPn4OKXaevAz-9cJ53XrK847zZ27aM1QPs8LyUDMEcBbisr535DsWcdnohpuNjcT9k6TyG6ZBjg57JomXIa0OAv4XA6qwhUSyFoo7QjhNQjCh_7UW00NfeQsSqhOrIzVa0puWm0e2566b-60F9l4h26-LpTKNx71Xop_PFq5_l4cnSuV1BB0rzLsR6mSh17Isku7vbCMEGQtu3Oa1tA5PIZs5gaDHBdk03RMkrNxwJ0UJVo726IbudMNh-Jp2nlRAkAv-sc3to_APJxL_nTAqDpKGo9boKhwwQXyN43lfmkoDNo0vpt82oySSvfwU3GmbaCqRZDoYmAJharTgSx67ZIugJDelsGkCxHbiBv2VJB)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fead5ce6a4f44e7888ccf368a278e441&_e=GV94SENU-yKE4uhZr12p9VPn4OKXaevAz-9cJ53XrK847zZ27aM1QPs8LyUDMEcBbisr535DsWcdnohpuNjcT9k6TyG6ZBjg57JomXIa0OAv4XA6qwhUSyFoo7QjhNQjCh_7UW00NfeQsSqhOrIzVa0puWm0e2566b-60F9l4h26-LpTKNx71Xop_PFq5_l4cnSuV1BB0rzLsR6mSh17IpRYg9k2kco8m9AMuz1q9ehaeJ4gpE36jHBbbktgD97o_GoNLwHsxAZXseUkJxwwTYrLBz3Xmg9f-EhhbGPA95OkqtoVTd_81lJ1sBgUn2gRbRnBI_RsmWBnDuHNndsTXQM2KjzFQiGiPKR5PCJnGPged97rSX1yLQ-JiIJY7-1o)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fead5ce6a4f44e7888ccf368a278e441&_e=GV94SENU-yKE4uhZr12p9VPn4OKXaevAz-9cJ53XrK847zZ27aM1QPs8LyUDMEcBbisr535DsWcdnohpuNjcT9k6TyG6ZBjg57JomXIa0OAv4XA6qwhUSyFoo7QjhNQjCh_7UW00NfeQsSqhOrIzVa0puWm0e2566b-60F9l4h26-LpTKNx71Xop_PFq5_l4cnSuV1BB0rzLsR6mSh17IqObOoHLrMXWz3R238bl4QgPtSKv_D6DS3jWff0wRRsqUDJ5jqzgZdLqr0eUtArAwL7OPEZFRhRVWYE-ZTxucbOOfCCjBokVWyNTaAFq6c07i9dXAtCDqQtyiVYM05KdZj8IE-8XW91QeGL3j-9yBoPUsoYFcFeIrhSpacMH3MSL)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fead5ce6a4f44e7888ccf368a278e441&_e=GV94SENU-yKE4uhZr12p9VPn4OKXaevAz-9cJ53XrK847zZ27aM1QPs8LyUDMEcBbisr535DsWcdnohpuNjcT9k6TyG6ZBjg57JomXIa0OAv4XA6qwhUSyFoo7QjhNQjCh_7UW00NfeQsSqhOrIzVa0puWm0e2566b-60F9l4h26-LpTKNx71Xop_PFq5_l4cnSuV1BB0rzLsR6mSh17IiXqgD6wQmxxQGpyYSYW7goD1OdOO05SrArhkkV6LRsLxO3zuUipHPuPL7PKLcOqvnin6bdVoNpgpW7OKmNK4NeBhligcmOD6M0AaAvRiJWiQIycl0pmQoB19CTikeBDxl43iwVqfUCN8-S5Xijm8s0SRvNozU416D5KTYR1tbQZ)

clean_body: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | | | | - Peter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. - Take the Survey | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. Each month, my team and I do our best to hit online fundraising goals so that we can run the strongest campaign possible and keep delivering real results for the working families of Pennsylvania.
This is important now more than ever, as our state has attracted the attention of national Republicans in a big way for continuing to stand up to Trump’s aggressive and radical agenda. **It makes us a target, Peter, but that only means we have to work a little harder to keep fighting back. **
Here’s what I can promise you: I will not give up on Pennsylvania. I won’t stop fighting for a better future for us. I’m here for YOU, not to listen to Donald Trump. So no matter what he’s choosing to do at the federal level, I will stay laser-focused on holding him accountable, mitigating the damage, and getting results that protect us.
**[If you want to help my team and I, chipping in now, ahead of our mid-month deadline, would be a huge help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107821096/545930147/15868926?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_051525_PROMISE_30DO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2E0MzIzMi03MTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUHqsYyM_YBME6iX1oGzgRkFIPx8dcDIRMKxLLfBKNc=) **

body:

# I Want to Hear From You!
---
| Last November **you** elected me to advance the conservative principles that have made our country great. I’m committed to securing our border, advancing election integrity, and reining in reckless government spending.
A lot has happened since then and I want to hear your thoughts on what is going on in our state and nation today.
Please take my [**survey**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d178561a05&e=e907534017) and share your thoughts with me today!
---
| [OFFICIAL SURVEY](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=98b0c538d5&e=e907534017)
---
| It’s my priority to represent you in Congress and deliver on our conservative agenda.
Whether it has been investigating [**ActBlue**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=3be7a9ca9f&e=e907534017) , passing the [**SAVE Act**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=29a4a7a88d&e=e907534017) , [**securing our border**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=70473de8ff&e=e907534017) , or fighting back against the [**radical Left**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=36b9f55f1b&e=e907534017). I promise to continue working for you!
---
|
# State Convention This Weekend

A reminder that beginning today, the Republican Party of Wisconsin will hold our annual state convention in Wausau. Be sure to [**join us**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=4a1cf4af26&e=e907534017) this weekend to hear about the ways we can fight back and ensure **Wisconsin remains Red!**

| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil

body:
$300 Million Medicaid Shortfall with May 21 Deadline Approaching

# [Provider Taxes - Healthcare Crisis in Connecticut](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=163716763&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE2NzYzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc0MTI0NDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDAwNDQ0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.opaAPmvnm0EGeOYN07pElxFRJZYaQEfBqUK53opsCSY)
### $300 Million Medicaid Shortfall with May 21 Deadline Approaching
| | [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct) and [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---
| May 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)| | [](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=163716763&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE2NzYzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NzQxMjQ0NywiZXhwIjoxNzUwMDA0NDQ3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nn1PjE-2DSLnwLkatfeCz3Bgr3023Fojqof2mFozrw8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=163716763&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE2NzYzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc0MTI0NDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDAwNDQ0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.opaAPmvnm0EGeOYN07pElxFRJZYaQEfBqUK53opsCSY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=163716763&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE2NzYzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc0MTI0NDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDAwNDQ0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.opaAPmvnm0EGeOYN07pElxFRJZYaQEfBqUK53opsCSY)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvZHJtaWNoYWVsZ29sZHN0ZWluNGN0L3AvcHJvdmlkZXItdGF4ZXMtaGVhbHRoY2FyZS1jcmlzaXM_.HusCYvfsQN-IE_7WAYAdAffHmTzza14d5h3wVNxAKBU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/provider-taxes-healthcare-crisis?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Since the establishment of the Affordable Care Act, most Americans know that healthcare has become more unaffordable. One Reason - Provider Taxes
[Pledge your support](https://substack..bJ1DRp75OJurMsRrTc--pLYAH5CSoljweHViJ3Uunwg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163716763)
Health insurance premiums have drastically increased as those who have health insurance subsidize those who do not. _**Meanwhile states like Connecticut are unable to manage resources and balance budgets without tax increases.**_
**The Connecticut Medicaid System (HUSKY)**
Medicaid and the children's version Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP) provide coverage for approximately 79 million low-income and disabled people in this country. _**These programs are jointly funded by the federal government and the states.**_
In Connecticut, Medicaid has been conveniently rebranded HUSKY while the children's corollary is still called CHIP.
According to the Connecticut Health Foundation - HUSKY/CHIP provide coverage to more than 900,000 state residents - including more than 366,000 children. [Source ](https://substack.com/redirect/23353119-c0a0-4627-801f-b0376ed28fbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Behind the scenes, more and more Medicaid is being provided. What you may not realize is that all states, except Alaska, use "provider taxes" to boost their federal Medicaid dollars. These are used to cover the 30 percent or more of the costs not covered by the federal government.
**What is a Provider Tax?**
Provider Taxes have been around since the 1980s and they are taxes on health care providers, and the most common provider taxes are levied on nursing facilities and hospitals. Here in CT Ther are 3 types of provider taxes: hospital tax, resident user fees imposed on nursing homes and user fees on certain intermediate care facilities. For more about the hospital tax see a report by the State's Office of Legislative Research from 2016 [here](https://substack.com/redirect/4c194cdb-300f-4b7f-ae95-f3b808318ec7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**They provide a lovely graphic on How Provider Taxes Work:**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1cf6ec01-e63a-4860-b4ea-4d44b536b04d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
These taxes levied on providers are used to increase payments to healthcare providers and help address the difference paid by Medicaid as compared with the fees paid by Medicare and most hospitals lose money on Medicare and Medicaid patients. These are costing you the taxpayer (with health insurance) to further subsidize these mismanaged programs.
While the percentages change based on the user, Federal dollars match state payments with no limit increasing the reimbursements.
**Provider Taxes are a Brilliant Government Shell Game.**
_The hospitals, the states, and the state governments are all big winners in this scheme probably making it impossible to shut down._
_**Hospitals love the tax because they get more back in higher reimbursements than they pay in the taxes - its a Win-Win for Hospitals**_
**Provider Taxes Increase Premiums.**
_Provider taxes were intended to curb and prevent the dramatic rise in healthcare premiums, copays and deductibles covered by employer health plans._
**Healthcare premiums have increased are as a result of this tax.**
It also increases the costs of the federal share of Medicaid costs that is paid for by the taxpayers. So regular taxpayers with health insurance pay higher premiums due to the tax and higher taxes to cover the federal government's higher Medicaid costs. Taxpayers are paying at all ends of the spectrum.
**Provider Taxes on the Budget Chopping Block**
Provider taxes are up for consideration to be eliminated as part of the cuts to Medicaid which is a $900 billion program. The Congressional Budget Office estimates eliminating provider taxes would save the federal government [more than $600 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/08ba9e9f-cd3c-44c0-9138-05abc76faf40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the next decade as many lawmakers see these taxes as forms of waste.
The waste is due to a lack of incentives to reduce spending. Under current programs, states and healthcare facilities are not held accountable for how the tax money is used and no accountability is required as these programs lack incentives to curb and control Medicaid spending.
_**Expect a lot of pushback here, especially in Connecticut as the State struggles with massive Husky/CHIP shortfalls due to the wild success of enrollments, especially among the undocumented that has drastically increased since Husky for immigrants launched in June 2023 with significant shortfalls.**_
**THE CONNECTICUT HUSKY CRISIS - May 21 deadline**
Currently there is a 300 million Medicaid Deficit in Connecticut and Governor Lamont and Democrat lawmakers are att odds as to how to solve it with less than one week to go. If they cannot agree before the May 21 deadline, the state would have to stop sending Medicaid reimbursement checks to providers as early as next Friday.
It is time for more efficient healthcare and reductions in costs. Unfortunately without incentives, states like Connecticut will just raise taxes to cover shortfalls. It is somewhat refreshing to see Governor Lamont at issue with his fellow Democrat lawmakers.
**We would love to hear your comments on this article.**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..bJ1DRp75OJurMsRrTc--pLYAH5CSoljweHViJ3Uunwg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163716763)
**Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way.

If they cannot agree before the May 21 deadline, the state would have to stop sending Medicaid reimbursement checks to providers as early as next Friday. It is time for more efficient healthcare and reductions in costs. Unfortunately without incentives, states like Connecticut will just raise taxes to cover shortfalls. It is somewhat refreshing to see Governor Lamont at issue with his fellow Democrat lawmakers. We would love to hear your comments on this article. Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message.** Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein The father-son team continues on so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way. | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 The Goldstein Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Goldstein Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Michael Goldstein ? ?

## The media's LIES about Biden's decline...
I talked last time about Trump's productivity; he's working long weekends to get things done for the American people.
And it got me thinking about what a stark contrast it is with Biden's embarrassing presidency.
We all saw it.
He stumbled and slept his way through his time in office-- anyone with eyes could see his decline.
Yet for years we were gaslit by the by the Left. They told us that he was sharper than ever, that behind the scenes he was as active and on top of things.
Then came the presidential debate, and they couldn't hide it any longer. They turned on a dime, ousted him from the race, and did all they could to leave him in the dust.
Until now.
Those same pundits who insisted Biden was mentally fit, are now capitalizing on their "investigations" into the cover-up of Biden's decline.
Let me say that again.
They're "exposing" the cover up that _they created._
Jake Tapper is even selling a book about it.
Talk about shameless. ...

name: Team Haley
subject: Need Your Response: Do you approve of Donald Trump's economy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Let Haley Stevens know before midnight tonight.

| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2615?t=1&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC)
**POLLING UPDATE:**
**Donald Trump's approval rating on the economy has _plummeted_**
A new poll shows only 44% of Americans approve of Trump’s handling of the economy – but it's important that we confirm these numbers for ourselves. That's why we need 5,000 grassroots supporters to let us know where they stand before midnight, including you, null. **Tell us now:**
**Do you approve of Donald Trump's economy?**
| | | [YES](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2613?email=%7B%7B&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC user.email %7D%7D&zip=%7B%7B user.zip %7D%7D&t=5)
---
| [NO](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2613?email=%7B%7B&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC user.email %7D%7D&zip=%7B%7B user.zip %7D%7D&t=6)
---
|
---
Grocery bills keep getting higher.

Big ticket items like cars and houses are more expensive than ever.

The job market is full of uncertainty.

_These_ are the outcomes of Donald Trump's chaos agenda.

With his reckless and inconsistent trade policies, he has single-handedly plunged the global economy and Michigan manufacturers into a crisis.
**Trump has even said he "_couldn't care less_ " about prices rising.**
Haley Stevens is running for Senate in Michigan because she _couldn't care more_ – she's ready to do everything in her power to block Trump's disastrous economic agenda and make sure working families can not just get by, but get ahead.
**She needs to know if this team is with her, so please, respond to our poll now:**
**Do you approve of Donald Trump's economy?**
| | | [YES](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2613?email=%7B%7B&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC user.email %7D%7D&zip=%7B%7B user.zip %7D%7D&t=7)
---
| [NO](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2613?email=%7B%7B&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC user.email %7D%7D&zip=%7B%7B user.zip %7D%7D&t=8)
---
Thank you,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2614?t=2&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2614?t=3&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=4&akid=132%2E49239%2Ex_gBCC).

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Say HELL NO to a new $50 million private jet for Kristi Noem!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [A new $50 million private jet for Kristi Noem? Tell Congress to say NO!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46eba0a1-57cb-4b46-bd39-fa0d1d5d0ac2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbac56abd-b1da-4785-8e90-85faaef7b020/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **What the hell is it with this administration and wasting money on private jets?** Kristi Noem, homeland security secretary and America's proudest dog killer, tried to [sneak $50 million](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55e69adb-e3b3-41df-94b4-746d8c3467cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) into the DHS budget for a private plane. Even though DHS already has one for her. _" I was horrified last Friday when we received a last minute addition to your spend plan for fiscal '25, a new $50 million Gulfstream 5 for Secretary Noem's personal travel coming from the Coast Guard budget. She already has a Gulfstream 5, by the way, this is a new one," rep Lauren underwood told Noem in a hearing._ Unless she's planning on cloning herself, Noem should be just fine with the private jet she already has. And we don't need to waste money on something utterly unnecessary. [**Add your name, and tell Congress to reject Noem's outrageous request.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c02d99a-9f6a-4d1f-b984-9afae5bf4414/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/16/2025
body:
The COvid Chronicles May 1–7, 2020: Seven days that set the stage for open rebellion
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Friday!
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Gov. Polis signaled [support for SB276](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), a bill limiting ICE cooperation and expanding protections for undocumented immigrants. In Colorado Springs, a homeless camp was cleared after [illegally tapping I-25 light poles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for power. And in our special feature, The [COvid Chronicles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) revisits the first week of May 2020, when lockdown defiance ignited statewide rebellion.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** A federal Medicaid bill is [drawing fire in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for potentially cutting access to health care for undocumented immigrants. And in a sharp critique of Washington’s status quo, a new proposal argues the [federal budget process is fundamentally broken](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—and suggests blowing it up might be the only way to fix it.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** This week’s commentary takes aim at Colorado’s leftward lurch. CHEC’s Colleen Enos warns the 2025 legislative session marked a [radical values shift](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—from abortion mandates to eroded parental rights. Robert Sencenbaugh critiques how [DEI and CRT are lowering academic standards](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in schools, replacing excellence with ideology. And in Pueblo D70, an exposé reveals how the TRAILS SEL curriculum introduced therapy-style techniques and DEI messaging into classrooms—[without parental consent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, May 16, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[The COvid Chronicles May 1–7, 2020: Seven days that set the stage for open rebellion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
This third installment of RMV’s COvid Chronicles is divided into two parts — for good reason. The first week of May set the stage for something bigger: the breaking point. As pressure mounted and defiance spread, Colorado crossed from quiet frustration into open resistance. Part one captures the fuse. Part two will show the wildfire.
May began just like April ended – edicts from above, fear from the press and politicians telling Coloradans to stay home, shut up and stay six feet apart. But by the first week of the month, cracks were showing.
>From Castle Rock to Colorado Springs, citizens, sheriffs and small-business owners weren’t waiting for permission. They had bills to pay, kids to raise and a Constitution they weren’t willing to quarantine. These are the COvid Chronicles for May 1-7, 2020...
_**COvid Chronicles catch-up --**_
• [Introducing The COvid Chronicles: How fear and force reshaped Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
• [COvid Chronicles April 1-15, 2020: Fifteen days that changed Colorado forever](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
• [COvid Chronicles April 16-30, 2020: From tattletales to tyranny](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Notarfrancesco: TRAILS goes beyond SEL—it’s activism wrapped in therapy language](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Pueblo D70 implemented the TRAILS SEL curriculum, rooted in cognitive behavioral therapy and mindfulness—techniques typically reserved for clinical settings. Critics argue it's inappropriate for unlicensed teachers to conduct daily emotional assessments on students.
* TRAILS incorporates DEI-driven content, encouraging students to identify through intersectional lenses and engage in activism. Lessons are embedded across subjects, promoting social change rather than academic fundamentals.
* Parents raised concerns over emotional data being shared with political nonprofits, while test scores show over 70% of D70 students are below expectations in math—sparking debate over whether SEL should replace core academic focus.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Polis open to signing bill restricting local ICE cooperation as Colorado sanctuary debate heats up](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Governor Jared Polis signaled support for SB276, a bill that limits local cooperation with ICE detainers and bolsters legal protections for undocumented immigrants. He stated the final version includes "workable language" after earlier concerns.
* The bill clarifies definitions around detainment and restricts local law enforcement from delaying release solely for immigration purposes, unless directed by a judge. It also prohibits public institutions from collecting or sharing immigration status except under specific legal circumstances.
* The move comes amid a federal lawsuit, with the DOJ suing Colorado and Denver for alleged violations of the U.S. Constitution through "sanctuary" policies. Critics warn SB276 may weaken public safety and federal immigration enforcement efforts.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Sencenbaugh: DEI and CRT may sound noble, but they’re driving academic mediocrity in schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY ROBERT SENCENBAUGH****| COMMENTARY | MAY 15** _If you are on the left or the right, Critical Race Theory (CRT) and Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) in the average classroom does not look like one tends to believe. Both are far more subtle. Thus, any debate on these issues devolves into both sides yelling at one another with neither actually listening._
__
**[Denver approves executive pay hikes while facing budget shortfall and reserve drop](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | MAY 14** _A set of salary increases for top Denver officials is drawing criticism, as the city faces continued financial strain and modest pay growth for most employees. The raises are included in the 2025 budget—totaling $1.76 billion—which the Denver City Council approved on November 12, 2024._
__
**[McWilliams: Social-emotional learning teaches empathy—but through whose lens?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JENNIFER MCWILLIAMS | COMMENTARY | MAY 14** _Social-emotional learning (SEL) is championed as a way to instill empathy, emotional strength, and relationship building skills in students. Sounds perfect for K-12, doesn’t it?_
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🌴 DID YOU KNOW?** Fort Myers, Florida, is now the **fastest-growing city in the U.S.** , according to U.S. News & World Report’s “Best Places to Live” ranking. Nestled between Tampa and Naples on the Gulf Coast, its rapid growth is fueled by its appeal to retirees, sunny skies, warm weather, and stunning beaches.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "The government should not be a master over the people, but a servant to the people." – David Burnet

Lessons are embedded across subjects, promoting social change rather than academic fundamentals. Parents raised concerns over emotional data being shared with political nonprofits, while test scores show over 70% of D70 students are below expectations in math—sparking debate over whether SEL should replace core academic focus. | | Governor Jared Polis signaled support for SB276, a bill that limits local cooperation with ICE detainers and bolsters legal protections for undocumented immigrants. He stated the final version includes "workable language" after earlier concerns. The bill clarifies definitions around detainment and restricts local law enforcement from delaying release solely for immigration purposes, unless directed by a judge. It also prohibits public institutions from collecting or sharing immigration status except under specific legal circumstances. The move comes amid a federal lawsuit, with the DOJ suing Colorado and Denver for alleged violations of the U.S. Constitution through "sanctuary" policies. Critics warn SB276 may weaken public safety and federal immigration enforcement efforts. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ ROBERT SENCENBAUGH| COMMENTARY | MAY 15 If you are on the left or the right, Critical Race Theory (CRT) and Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) in the average classroom does not look like one tends to believe. Both are far more subtle. Thus, any debate on these issues devolves into both sides yelling at one another with neither actually listening. SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | MAY 14 A set of salary increases for top Denver officials is drawing criticism, as the city faces continued financial strain and modest pay growth for most employees. The raises are included in the 2025 budget—totaling $1.76 billion—which the Denver City Council approved on November 12, 2024. JENNIFER MCWILLIAMS | COMMENTARY | MAY 14 Social-emotional learning (SEL) is championed as a way to instill empathy, emotional strength, and relationship building skills in students. Sounds perfect for K-12, doesn’t it? __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🌴 DID YOU KNOW? Fort Myers, Florida, is now the fastest-growing city in the U.S. , according to U.S. News & World Report’s “Best Places to Live” ranking. Nestled between Tampa and Naples on the Gulf Coast, its rapid growth is fueled by its appeal to retirees, sunny skies, warm weather, and stunning beaches. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "The government should not be a master over the people, but a servant to the people." – David Burnet | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Shri Thanedar’s terrible, no good, very bad week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

TGIF for Congressman Shri Thanedar because that means his terrible, no
good, very bad week can finally come to an end.

First, Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib from the neighboring district endorsed
Donavan McKinney for Congress. She said the #1 reason why was because of
how terrible Shri is at the most basic function of their job as members of
Congress: constituent services.

Then, Shri immediately announced he would be introducing seven articles of
impeachment against Donald Trump and forcing a vote on them — as
progressives were focused on trying to stop the GOP from ramming a budget
bill that would defund Medicaid to pay for billionaire tax cuts.

After that, his colleagues said this about him:

* “This is the dumbest f***ing thing”
* “Utterly selfish behavior”
* What a dumbs**t”
* "a total distraction”

Finally, at the 11th hour, he pulled the plug on the vote after leadership
told him they would be voting against it.

There's no question Donald Trump has committed impeachable offenses, but
Shri’s political stunts were just that. Another multimillionaire playing
political games with constituents’ lives.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign to support my resolution commemorating the Nakba and demanding an end to U.S. complicity:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I’m reintroducing a resolution to recognize the ongoing Nakba and demand an end to U.S. complicity. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhE3KUtd-3AvUmQV2eqr7COdMDDYq9qKFneFY-QHht67QvNXpMxVvYSpJgC2_qcNI3PgdvmkLWVAAIwY1gp_tLvrQ_MpYMLKykYsnndcrC9C_CRNEM2CaOBlE0X6nkgOKfYOowTvEgN0vJC04s3tIS7wl3rAG1YNjlmK683J7kasTKct2Z31uTgQrhDD3mxYpjoNMFrUKj1pt6xzrY_bWqgh7VTd2ZgcCO6fyrTEbWTVEI-yBWPLbyrnTgdz9SQd1kNaJHEwRyoG4v6pSDokAZQKs2kHPH6q33CeLNist9b1l1m4BDH7qxQRzYnLa8FFvWe32iMgJfMPtgyADOm_yYg/4gj/vfN2k9MGRe2BWSItYAOuCg/h0/h001.BvDzOmYvBYrhPDd-x2Lm6b5SOyZlwpHRMhLPsUp9ouc)
---
Friend, Palestinians around the world commemorate May 15 as Nakba Day. Yesterday, we marked 77 years of an ongoing Nakba, or catastrophe, against the Palestinian people. The original Nakba happened in 1948, when the government of Israel destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages, killed tens of thousands of Palestinians, and ethnically cleansed hundreds of thousands more. **This brutal campaign to erase Palestinians from their homeland never ended.** As part of the escalating genocide in Gaza, the Israeli government has deliberately blocked all aid to Gaza for months. While aid trucks wait outside, 2.3 million Palestinians in Gaza are starving—half of whom are children. Last week I spoke out about this forced starvation on the floor of the House of Representatives. As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, I continue to demand my colleagues end their silence and end their complicity in these war crimes. Yesterday I reintroduced a historic resolution in Congress to recognize this ongoing Nakba and call for an end to U.S. complicity in the genocide against Palestinians. [**Will you sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor of my Nakba Day resolution and stand up for Palestinians’ human rights?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQ-Lxb3plpvXmO173aj918gD8JY3MtH1Q2-paToE6TiUAvHPYOtrBXjnUWDs1vmbQRmBEg7_linh3or9dyHMYA22WkB-0oYW2Kr-AhD98g-ACExlpVxrhIhTeiDU24otIJCpDZrVGp2hNEbWpMmMNzFGEjES9BLVJudYL4ZUPBVyzpKcSP34T9v-jSAZvVpUOZtRt0cwqQV4FBRifcZH4nEkRHIFfszEW9Vp1aq56MwR01dES-DbKl1kbmo8AOHeLiP3ou39U6CWUDgB2XG2m-hfqv0-x4JE1O_EahMecLXhr5nEHVayjzV_ezJ3fgkuPBQ16KEZApJ_FuKn7AtK7Wrp82W6IsSaYd3CG6EQU1pWrCjpf0IEtkdOXfRh4DlSZpGNugWTMUzey7Is4aVMsb9Nk4DNJH8DfF-1Qtqi2JRsCCPT3cz3barYKUQrqSNWAh/4gj/vfN2k9MGRe2BWSItYAOuCg/h1/h001.BrVlXn4C8a0bvORsu9MCOpyhLlKu8WJzrpHJNDEL954) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQ-Lxb3plpvXmO173aj918gD8JY3MtH1Q2-paToE6TiUAvHPYOtrBXjnUWDs1vmbQRmBEg7_linh3or9dyHMYA22WkB-0oYW2Kr-AhD98g-ACExlpVxrhIhTeiDU24otIJCpDZrVGp2hNEbWpMmMNzFGEjES9BLVJudYL4ZUPBVyzpKcSP34T9v-jSAZvVpUOZV1rqSJBFdn_Bzs5_PXC1dxfFdiP7mwWyFMdhdxi3-MgF00H0VHkEdu3SKKd6Sa3zB9Jyvm3zfyQCnNUhXi5XpbNUarIkxtivHoJgZv6OqtUpWPNGzK6-JXJzRAqtilj6KGSLUqPbt23Xisb785CuHRT7LWxrzhL8nnaM7a-p6bcnefdR9w2rz6Mm4wMLNJi3HyFMAsObifp9B6-lwg61uI4iqijv-CGzWevrktLf_piuhkMgrQimm900ZjpZ_LlH/4gj/vfN2k9MGRe2BWSItYAOuCg/h2/h001.durCLCwKYTbJtiOuUW_If69waV2SVh0u9d_SWoS4sSQ)
---
This week, war criminal Netanyahu’s cabinet unanimously approved his plan to seize and permanently control Gaza.
As Israel’s leaders have said out loud again and again, this was always the plan—to expel Palestinians and occupy Palestinian land. The Nakba never ended.
The world’s top court, along with most countries in the United Nations, have ordered Israel’s government to end its occupation and immediately withdraw from Gaza and the West Bank.
Instead of complying with international law, the government is openly heading in the opposite direction, including expanding the mass displacement of Palestinians in the West Bank.
The U.S. government is also violating international law by continuing to fund, arm, and shield Israel’s military from accountability. This genocide and ethnic cleansing isn’t possible without U.S. support.

Yesterday, we marked 77 years of an ongoing Nakba, or catastrophe, against the Palestinian people. The original Nakba happened in 1948, when the government of Israel destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages, killed tens of thousands of Palestinians, and ethnically cleansed hundreds of thousands more. This brutal campaign to erase Palestinians from their homeland never ended. As part of the escalating genocide in Gaza, the Israeli government has deliberately blocked all aid to Gaza for months. While aid trucks wait outside, 2.3 million Palestinians in Gaza are starving—half of whom are children. Last week I spoke out about this forced starvation on the floor of the House of Representatives. As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, I continue to demand my colleagues end their silence and end their complicity in these war crimes. Yesterday I reintroduced a historic resolution in Congress to recognize this ongoing Nakba and call for an end to U.S. complicity in the genocide against Palestinians. | This week, war criminal Netanyahu’s cabinet unanimously approved his plan to seize and permanently control Gaza. As Israel’s leaders have said out loud again and again, this was always the plan—to expel Palestinians and occupy Palestinian land. The Nakba never ended. The world’s top court, along with most countries in the United Nations, have ordered Israel’s government to end its occupation and immediately withdraw from Gaza and the West Bank. Instead of complying with international law, the government is openly heading in the opposite direction, including expanding the mass displacement of Palestinians in the West Bank. The U.S. government is also violating international law by continuing to fund, arm, and shield Israel’s military from accountability. This genocide and ethnic cleansing isn’t possible without U.S. support. Thank you for continuing to speak up with me as we demand human rights for all people and build a world where everyone can thrive. clean_body: The fight to protect Medicaid is far from over. | | | Peter, The fight to protect Medicaid and stop Trump’s cruel, billionaire-first agenda is far from over. Across the country, people like you are standing up to say: No cuts to care. No more giveaways to the wealthy. Now, as Congress prepares for critical votes, activists across the country are kicking off a national week of action starting this weekend to say loud and clear: Hands Off Our Healthcare! Here are two ways you can take part: 1\. Help turn up the heat by joining a canvass this weekend in one of the key congressional districts where this fight will be decided: 2\. Can’t make it to a canvass? You can make calls from wherever you are to help stop these cruel cuts. Every conversation counts — and all you need is a phone and an internet connection. Republicans in Congress are trying to gut health care to pay for tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations. These next few days are a big chance to stop them — and that means showing up in force and talking with the voters they’re trying to ignore. This is an opportunity to show Congress that everyone is watching — and no one is backing down. Every call made, every door knocked, every story shared can make a difference. Are you ready to get to work? In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Peter, the border crisis is just the beginning - what's at stake is the very fabric of our nation
