[ ](https://links.trump-emails.com/r?u=J8zLkuUXGPM2FSV8vQ7AMtLxYAL_pQxZK3wN_CKhjKwVSEoc6WueVVX1ax4KDxci8IPn4C8C55I3bFDPC3y3auep1Zhw5CO1631nN-YAJmTegr-47WHKNiy4HMKd5PqG4HUTnbMD9EiSJu7gKJVFCPiYY1pCroUAEqUl4eBEDmxAKlfTcmXeCCfJlHO2Ln5h9BIVpkuADG6BnXNHwnz4COGYUXDY7aIXRLZmQfKYwr0azi6DLJwRL9Ow5P8e2xIf60aFI2V5pszsLLQCWx8VQAHepyobv79Wb4WRJCfvaXZ2aNFSOnMl0ZiWsR2uE1j9OkU3D9KpRfvHUkJFrFq2gt0KmdEvxbm60RvkQ2C-3V7TeD3F_RydYELJQa9KbjTuoSezUtK3WRhTsMzBjFhViznBw_5moJ0FeNRpCInf4PmrD8NFfUoW0IHBMZEij6vHdI8UhhlwPn7jscz6T71EJt6dILR0Vp2oq8z4GVsrjuyisZOHVzAZJ7Z85unfU239PAqsoBEEmsPNGjS9cbtcmA&e=842ef65ef8d85782fb1e56d6aceaa22a&utm_source=hdtsajfc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_3cd08e87441c1126e740ab60be2&n=2) Dear Peter, The headlines today are a **[wake-up call](https://links.trump-emails.com/r?u=J8zLkuUXGPM2FSV8vQ7AMtLxYAL_pQxZK3wN_CKhjKwVSEoc6WueVVX1ax4KDxci8IPn4C8C55I3bFDPC3y3auep1Zhw5CO1631nN-YAJmTegr-47WHKNiy4HMKd5PqG4HUTnbMD9EiSJu7gKJVFCPiYY1pCroUAEqUl4eBEDmxAKlfTcmXeCCfJlHO2Ln5h9BIVpkuADG6BnXNHwnz4COGYUXDY7aIXRLZmQfKYwr0azi6DLJwRL9Ow5P8e2xIf60aFI2V5pszsLLQCWx8VQAHepyobv79Wb4WRJCfvaXZ2aNFSOnMl0ZiWsR2uE1j9OkU3D9KpRfvHUkJFrFq2gt0KmdEvxbm60RvkQ2C-3V7TeD3F_RydYELJQa9KbjTuoSezUtK3WRhTsMzBjFhViznBw_5moJ0FeNRpCInf4PmrD8NFfUoW0IHBMZEij6vHdI8UhhlwPn7jscz6T71EJt6dILR0Vp2oq8z4GVsrjuyisZOHVzAZJ7Z85unfU239PAqsoBEEmsPNGjS9cbtcmA&e=842ef65ef8d85782fb1e56d6aceaa22a&utm_source=hdtsajfc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_3cd08e87441c1126e740ab60be2&n=3)**. As we celebrate our recent victories, we're reminded that our work is far from over. The radical left is already plotting to undo everything we've achieved, and it's up to us to stop them. Just look at what happened at our southern border. The crisis was _[spiraling out of control](https://links.trump-emails.com/r?u=J8zLkuUXGPM2FSV8vQ7AMtLxYAL_pQxZK3wN_CKhjKwVSEoc6WueVVX1ax4KDxci8IPn4C8C55I3bFDPC3y3auep1Zhw5CO1631nN-YAJmTegr-47WHKNiy4HMKd5PqG4HUTnbMD9EiSJu7gKJVFCPiYY1pCroUAEqUl4eBEDmxAKlfTcmXeCCfJlHO2Ln5h9BIVpkuADG6BnXNHwnz4COGYUXDY7aIXRLZmQfKYwr0azi6DLJwRL9Ow5P8e2xIf60aFI2V5pszsLLQCWx8VQAHepyobv79Wb4WRJCfvaXZ2aNFSOnMl0ZiWsR2uE1j9OkU3D9KpRfvHUkJFrFq2gt0KmdEvxbm60RvkQ2C-3V7TeD3F_RydYELJQa9KbjTuoSezUtK3WRhTsMzBjFhViznBw_5moJ0FeNRpCInf4PmrD8NFfUoW0IHBMZEij6vHdI8UhhlwPn7jscz6T71EJt6dILR0Vp2oq8z4GVsrjuyisZOHVzAZJ7Z85unfU239PAqsoBEEmsPNGjS9cbtcmA&e=842ef65ef8d85782fb1e56d6aceaa22a&utm_source=hdtsajfc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_3cd08e87441c1126e740ab60be2&n=4)_ , with illegal crossings reaching record highs. It was a national security threat, a humanitarian disaster, and a stark reminder of the consequences of liberal policies. But then President Trump stepped in and got the border secure. And that's why Republicans need your support now more than ever. Trump’s actions have made him as unpopular as he’s been since his first term, so let’s show him how **UNPOPULAR** he continues to be!

Friend,

As the son of Vietnamese refugees, a small business owner, and a proud Army veteran, I know what it means to serve – and to fight for a better future.

That’s exactly what I’m doing in Congress: fighting to lower healthcare costs, protect reproductive freedom, and ensure every family has a fair shot at the American Dream like mine did.

But here’s the reality:
* **We flipped this seat by just 653 votes** , and Republicans have already put a target on my back. GOP super PACs spent over $17 million in 2024 to stop us, and we’re being hit by NRCC attacks earlier than ever – and we expect more to come.

* **Tonight marks my critical mid-quarter deadline.** How much we raise now will define our ability to protect this important seat for the House majority.

Unlike many in Washington, I’m not taking a cent from Big Pharma or Oil. I’m in Congress fighting for a better future for you and your families, and right now I need your support:

**[Can I count on you to chip in with a donation of $3 or any amount before tonight’s deadline? My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cb722d87b25d4c388f6636a16a7193b3&_e=DAjLjpKtKaqvooQROmp9CcqDI76jNrQGk13CvLJoR4rTNxpxESKfV9JaWnfWGkc3gJ7JlWTHcCPu-Qfg01SQj-lpITkQ-cHz49uWFs9iOXkMDygUIzpI6s4zOOak1rTo4bSam77DkHYIdR9zIWCEACZXeYFf1VfmP5n5BpkeuCp381yQGjUNaN5bU30XOD75PLC7gs8jVwEoQ_03k14UdsfDTExEeloP1EcwMIArJYdcTKl87oOw2fHqI_nRuJdg_jCex4k8ruOr246kh75NOBpA7FZAyDktXvUky8IlGbN5WFDkSaPRoD0QRgorgC9WvGLfz-RrDpEFi_lhT_WUNuLCH7imusF6KLoJ4rEMoxA%3D)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cb722d87b25d4c388f6636a16a7193b3&_e=DAjLjpKtKaqvooQROmp9CcqDI76jNrQGk13CvLJoR4rTNxpxESKfV9JaWnfWGkc3gJ7JlWTHcCPu-Qfg01SQj-lpITkQ-cHz49uWFs9iOXkMDygUIzpI6s4zOOak1rTo4bSam77DkHYIdR9zIWCEACZXeYFf1VfmP5n5BpkeuCp381yQGjUNaN5bU30XOD75PLC7gs8jVwEoQ_03k14UdjFts0Z0qldZ6qdp6H0kjBLCiAhgedQ_egNjzEGQB_iNEOl8C8am6Q3dbr6yDAk1NqfyN6zmCyvcYz3MxdzI9RT8GL2nb3Qgqw4N_frUibpAcC2TuutR4XnHeMyU4O1ewQVEIRNcwrxtVNNEQKA9ncM%3D)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**

**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cb722d87b25d4c388f6636a16a7193b3&_e=DAjLjpKtKaqvooQROmp9CcqDI76jNrQGk13CvLJoR4rTNxpxESKfV9JaWnfWGkc3gJ7JlWTHcCPu-Qfg01SQj-lpITkQ-cHz49uWFs9iOXkMDygUIzpI6s4zOOak1rTo4bSam77DkHYIdR9zIWCEACZXeYFf1VfmP5n5BpkeuCp381yQGjUNaN5bU30XOD75PLC7gs8jVwEoQ_03k14Udi2TMy3aWj2BCIa5OWFbqto6-8RX8sG-qE8NXisthrPOMa5Wau3JpVqj4mud45tOPxNXX7b0SBBS9fCei6v1HIzD4RBM_mER6LXGgdSD-CeqhbuNlqqELspxmZ0QS_lqAzvi3HeQ50a69KtLhG_2Org%3D)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cb722d87b25d4c388f6636a16a7193b3&_e=DAjLjpKtKaqvooQROmp9CcqDI76jNrQGk13CvLJoR4rTNxpxESKfV9JaWnfWGkc3gJ7JlWTHcCPu-Qfg01SQj-lpITkQ-cHz49uWFs9iOXkMDygUIzpI6s4zOOak1rTo4bSam77DkHYIdR9zIWCEACZXeYFf1VfmP5n5BpkeuCp381yQGjUNaN5bU30XOD75PLC7gs8jVwEoQ_03k14UdrQK2T-jJWAZ-bG2zVED5crZydBYjeTjh9Au6jqXw265-pBIsypvmJ5Dn16EiMOrJ5yp4UQ4VM_0N4meHw_XhmRrPWBYuS4FJVimJXrVd8djLt9wE3QV1RLBQ86tztavOAcJ9BTK_MPVOqZ38i60ELY%3D)**

Thank you and God bless you today!

| | Dear Peter,
---
| | The Lord opened a massive door for us to worship in the Rotunda of the U.S. Capitol. But the enemy throws up roadblocks and tries to deter us. That’s _EXACTLY_ what happened last night. name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: October 2001
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c1ff8bf23a64e27b76ad33264a4569a&_e=B86uDNwdrD8nFIvJG0PrRoegVWlnhYp4k-QyQo538PE0TpDKCJ9nyp9ar70NoKyKMh1fmyCB32-l0L70JQ4TDc9VvLSHSnpwpTq9k94Sep4SRNX32ARTuDWD6du3g860yx7yc-FkQRCslZMIuKzUcdw8bHggnm6jURigIMWKZ2kiLf3ZH27uGvo4Orz_80ltuw-lzkTn1GEzliTJ9RKBsk9yzKPAUi7jkK2gOlO4etrwaZhsI59WYR2Jof5X2JYBODidcE-uxwwMb1Pp-V2tqK-rFEO1OK1m0RLq6CFZfqmPIPoz2B2CePz5N-TxVlWI3sJ_mKyWNGx2SdELruWm1z850UA1ZrOOpkQml7JKVINT0e5NCw3S7BqQgqldUkSQAMwCvhr7jMOR5YT2jYJfcJyzZQRD2BDEkbvZCZ2wPaAiSdz8qt7k47wPdbCFGjB2Ejq6h4ikdYyebz66fntozSe1PhSICHWRcZXR2_vz2zONHG7PTmYmUFVBTO3I0SThzIamL9OiouUOFkB3uvB_dv39KV1zgH_jFPKnskuwqgXrC10MKfXESB2FCn2kJBK6kfVUlRCi4Uzqy-1Fr7jyrcbXaNa82qFu5jhl6nL1usoCSLn05qL9VMm3G_16hTN2zKdly3p5OEhYfWBefRlgk_LCLNYBnSkoA7I8JVpmmxSLoR1erqFUQrnMO1UVYA81sscZb_LqK9RmV3peKg1PUgghMaavud9PjzIolrihH3v_S_dIAImARC2MyaXMlxe3Stm1_yM3A5hVxpNDdvUbSg%3D%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c1ff8bf23a64e27b76ad33264a4569a&_e=B86uDNwdrD8nFIvJG0PrRoegVWlnhYp4k-QyQo538PE0TpDKCJ9nyp9ar70NoKyKMh1fmyCB32-l0L70JQ4TDc9VvLSHSnpwpTq9k94Sep4SRNX32ARTuDWD6du3g860yx7yc-FkQRCslZMIuKzUcdw8bHggnm6jURigIMWKZ2kiLf3ZH27uGvo4Orz_80ltuw-lzkTn1GEzliTJ9RKBsk9yzKPAUi7jkK2gOlO4etrwaZhsI59WYR2Jof5X2JYBODidcE-uxwwMb1Pp-V2tqDI--JbX3LbfFuEkKP_yF63We00G0jchkl2RraWpixwU2ni2m8UukWUfonQ_X65XIy5i-pWkpJ0cll2AxAIV-GBPZhKbTlPskBVQEGONNU0jDoqiXvK9jhEAGvLkzfqyQsarr9gY-mB_eIuqcTLryKZXur1QA2C0GLcf9ajIjKBbmxx2ViC317_c83OsUtynqt8oavR9e4QCtgd3FEc465F8iYcM-7ZZtQ7EWbuTiCMcf-TF-lBJn3Lackpsi2nGg_TQ_Y1Zv2VFS_N0D5-0EPs5kkzaixGvcFG4DTi4f3jyihgjQyQvRAqgQLmP9t4pCcNzkNebw6t2eLzbJZN3oYiIeleMuxvHrv5KnV_oNmZ5iNzG3_TEqoNSQgXC-kNW4e9OTGpYGQQSOW7ACfsUx0CGV7dchy3B9BeHGwsriVF5U7LTgsebyWdGOExkf9CbL_PZnV5c4AVVlIWF1YUPy6hK7HM6BfQYJn2DthzW_m7z7sp48F_4Y8r-s5gkuPFjRA%3D%3D)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c1ff8bf23a64e27b76ad33264a4569a&_e=B86uDNwdrD8nFIvJG0PrRoegVWlnhYp4k-QyQo538PE0TpDKCJ9nyp9ar70NoKyKMh1fmyCB32-l0L70JQ4TDc9VvLSHSnpwpTq9k94Sep4SRNX32ARTuDWD6du3g860yx7yc-FkQRCslZMIuKzUcdw8bHggnm6jURigIMWKZ2kiLf3ZH27uGvo4Orz_80ltuw-lzkTn1GEzliTJ9RKBsk9yzKPAUi7jkK2gOlO4etrwaZhsI59WYR2Jof5X2JYBODidcE-uxwwMb1Pp-V2tqLQh7XVbQAd8nzkfB9GBaD40R2G-_arxzkPVoFM5tR3VS_JzOWT8o95y4CQq5sWItRHwB_chorUsJ4qaJtbw5pkRxP66I01jXaih_ihGr1G2THojt0zhF2-TgeRT4HoX73PI4XjBaU_380wYGJMr-WZ2r_do7-Bj1aCbUWjNyqVjD4hgKLoFNSvle-pSErEw99YXIVsgh1PXi1S9d-SNTnmC9FVXP0ca98MCKJWCo12DhasNXcBxZztXPTEOCORJD3InOiHG5aT4o2SLzQo3dYLLLbeW38kdBoZ3MmpsIhuiCKlMvibpQIsT2X0O8W8p9MUG72t8rqdDK93dOYSRYzeGbXn_oj56DlruG3iA_QeRTl0QH9O7lYqoXhmx3eKLa7iR6umttWZ-QWxJWXoxO_sO1_V9YhDo6ybw9ZnMRN1ZuLjtoGEzcVU_FaPPJuCSmFZJvX2JcosX0prr0hTaneJqySHU7owVDV_QTeONXxFr7yhN_ZI7dr1wWPNIAzTEow%3D%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c1ff8bf23a64e27b76ad33264a4569a&_e=B86uDNwdrD8nFIvJG0PrRoegVWlnhYp4k-QyQo538PE0TpDKCJ9nyp9ar70NoKyKMh1fmyCB32-l0L70JQ4TDc9VvLSHSnpwpTq9k94Sep4SRNX32ARTuDWD6du3g860yx7yc-FkQRCslZMIuKzUcdw8bHggnm6jURigIMWKZ2kiLf3ZH27uGvo4Orz_80ltuw-lzkTn1GEzliTJ9RKBsk9yzKPAUi7jkK2gOlO4etrwaZhsI59WYR2Jof5X2JYBODidcE-uxwwMb1Pp-V2tqNzpvNwPfaUl9YpJWbxOitc1ZW9AeqmrNHKPoEO6GSPgwz-UCh9XHlB8x0iLVY_8eOVNgOZgbxyLcWBjz3hYGSYbDCnjWMJ4jI-wKRmJBO7pNu3JZGldh_4wDbTgYJu_37Q0yx1Ph0cFRPNXzxSqWa9MDGeyLBM1eO5vqUmowzyGC5JtPQi-W_wMjDTKOOeWW1W0GCdEOXS-J6y34cBry69-gy6soVXN2PJuB9adjYf-4xR8CAarFE4w9AUZ6Xhmgaj5TLikvmRsOG1pJbp0aHeh0fMTj3bPcr6XrLxfAhNv4bWYKqcJKpuyQmkTaaJszCtTMogRj5F-5ycRP0rrUXHCS0HS36uQ9iUVF9H8kSPVTha6rVBB7tQQfyYQpm2T_h8QwB3rIXrfCOwVKJnqnXIobWSUKHaTK803uZnyvAYl9BePYcpuzrLLlVXQC9HnEpM_JOGrX4_a3ublrHBvtV6y1zYpPZAiBYS4gxI2JJLAzd3-A3kBTWYmms9F_4gW_w%3D%3D)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c1ff8bf23a64e27b76ad33264a4569a&_e=B86uDNwdrD8nFIvJG0PrRoegVWlnhYp4k-QyQo538PE0TpDKCJ9nyp9ar70NoKyKMh1fmyCB32-l0L70JQ4TDc9VvLSHSnpwpTq9k94Sep4SRNX32ARTuDWD6du3g860yx7yc-FkQRCslZMIuKzUcdw8bHggnm6jURigIMWKZ2kiLf3ZH27uGvo4Orz_80ltuw-lzkTn1GEzliTJ9RKBsk9yzKPAUi7jkK2gOlO4etrwaZhsI59WYR2Jof5X2JYBODidcE-uxwwMb1Pp-V2tqEQL3p_SGpJf3se8j7g7H0tQtGR2YRfpDfe2cWUwicBiz5uEyVe7p0z016VvQ5yWNV1CTWf_A7mmTpB1jBkeb3d6ZtssCJ9Dv8Y6ILTRlrbRtC-wnbrb2-lz2nJbF8VKHcGosaQll6mPb-HQ6kKzm5adUE9Q60fk30KVHMoGwAiHjMU9ok5fla50b32t3VeCJ7Fm_rQM2NGvjfA0wqGA1BBSYL7gAfE13cVamVnm4gZyCqlgXa68u2IrrxaSo9I-Fwp5Vxo22GyMGWxNJqHGCTgYZTEi0BXqlP8RCZFqh6VuECySLZ_UmWK6u-DdjRVH806b2KYJ15jv9tEoSwNmCNnfFSimCUCEw7-eIo9esQZ_9_CZcXM6nsLxYTeLgmpHk3ojMmDn3BN5L34jPG_goW7VRXe81GjI64_OcTaqe8bKr2TBRnUSzRX8MWvhP5rxzBQyi0FYONGZSGb5mPLL_yxyb7CHSMDflkI6z6ZCdCwFd4KT0F7Oskov-pAAn_4h4A%3D%3D)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

clean_body: I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

| **MARCELL STRBICH OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN KICKOFF EVENT!
MAY 21, 2024 at 7:00 PM • MEDINA, OHIO**
We have a grassroots, patriot, combat veteran who has stepped up to selflessly run for Ohio Secretary of State in 2026, Marcell Strbich. Many of you know Marcell. You've heard him on the radio with Bob Frantz, Jack Windsor, and Brian Thomas. You've seen him on video with Emerald Robinson and Steve Stern. You've seen him testify at the State Capital on election integrity legislation. He can and will do the job to secure Ohio's elections and clean up Ohio's registered voter rolls, which contrary to what you hear from our current Secretary of State, are a MESS. Many of you know Marcell and personally endorse him. For those of you who don't, once you get to know him we're confident he'll have your endorsement too!
**Marcell is officially kicking off his campaign the evening of May 21st in Medina. It's a FREE event and all are welcome! Come meet Marcell, ask him questions, and get answers!**
**To learn more about Marcell Strbich, go[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=50bbebf9b6&e=5c740fa3e2) or click on the image below.

subject: This will drive the Left INSANE…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Conservative Battleground Fund PAC (conservativebattlegroundfund
body:
Peter,

Washington sends billions overseas every year.

_**\- Foreign aid.
\- War zones.
\- Corrupt governments.
\- Open borders.**_

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250516-zombie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250516-zombie]
Team,
Donald Trump is at it again—this time pushing to pardon Tina Peters, a former county clerk who was convicted of several felonies for compromising voting equipment in Colorado.
Tina Peters compromised her own voting equipment to try to prove Trump’s Big Lie. She was convicted by a jury of her peers in a conservative Colorado county and sentenced to 9 years of incarceration. She is no political prisoner. She is a criminal, just like the thousands of criminals Trump pardoned for trying to steal the election on January 6th.
I joined MSNBC to make one thing clear: This isn’t just about one case. It’s about Trump’s plan to rewrite history, erase accountability, and pave the way for future attacks on our democracy.
Watch the interview and donate to my campaign for Attorney General here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250516-zombie]
Trump has weaponized the Department of Justice, and it shows just how far he will go to protect the election deniers, extremists, and lawbreakers who support him. This is why we need leaders who will stand up to him and protect our democracy, no matter what.
I’ve stood up to Trump before, even when it meant receiving death threats. And as Colorado’s next Attorney General, I won’t stop fighting.
But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in today to help me stand up to Trump, defend the rule of law, and protect free and fair elections in Colorado? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-msnbc?refcode=250516-zombie]

clean_body: [] Team, Donald Trump is at it again—this time pushing to pardon Tina Peters, a former county clerk who was convicted of several felonies for compromising voting equipment in Colorado. Tina Peters compromised her own voting equipment to try to prove Trump’s Big Lie. She was convicted by a jury of her peers in a conservative Colorado county and sentenced to 9 years of incarceration. She is no political prisoner. She is a criminal, just like the thousands of criminals Trump pardoned for trying to steal the election on January 6th. I joined MSNBC to make one thing clear: This isn’t just about one case. It’s about Trump’s plan to rewrite history, erase accountability, and pave the way for future attacks on our democracy. Watch the interview and donate to my campaign for Attorney General here. [] Trump has weaponized the Department of Justice, and it shows just how far he will go to protect the election deniers, extremists, and lawbreakers who support him. This is why we need leaders who will stand up to him and protect our democracy, no matter what. I’ve stood up to Trump before, even when it meant receiving death threats. And as Colorado’s next Attorney General, I won’t stop fighting. But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in today to help me stand up to Trump, defend the rule of law, and protect free and fair elections in Colorado? subject: Republicans are fast-tracking the Republican Rip-Off
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Republicans are using reconciliation to fast-track the Republican Rip-Off budget.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107826085/545947798/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjdkY2UxYy03YjMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHkUOJXD_29yyMKffMOh-Vq4OkblXXVpx1L1rJYNib4=&emci=262b2b63-472c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d27dce1c-7b32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Republicans are using a procedural tool called "reconciliation" to fast-track the Republican Rip-Off budget; the budget that is going to cut access to health care through Medicaid, nutritional food, and ultimately use those dollars to pay for a five trillion dollar tax cut for the richest corporations and Americans.** The way Republicans are choosing to move forward right now is a departure from the regular process, and we have to keep fighting for our values here in Northwest Washington. As part of the reconciliation process, I began the fight for our values as the ranking member on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee. Unfortunately, the work we had to do as a committee was a departure from the regular, bipartisan work. Everyone on this committee agrees we need to support the Coast Guard, improve our air traffic control system, and keep surface transportation investments going. Unfortunately, the Republicans' reckless budget cuts this committee off at the knees as we look to continue historic funding for transportation, water infrastructure, clean energy, and stronger, healthier communities. Me and my fellow Democrats on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee voted no against the Transportation part of the reconciliation process because of all the harm it will do to hard-working Americans. **There will be other opportunities in the future to work on transportation in a bipartisan manner, as we regularly do.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107826368/545948742/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQxMzg5MS03YjMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Xt2NS32gl0b0Uif5YgqAmxupSDmi2ceQm8Sz3fhifM=)
---
Peter — Last week, reporters asked Speaker Johnson his thoughts about the Qatari government offering a plane to Donald Trump. His response? He said it’s “not in his lane.’ The Speaker of the House claimed that the Constitution of the United States isn’t his lane. Every member of Congress makes a sworn oath to the Constitution. The powers of the House are the FIRST thing defined. Holding the president accountable is literally “in his lane.” As House Democratic Whip, I know how critical it is for our leaders to uphold the Constitution and fight for the people we represent. Speaker Johnson apparently doesn’t have the same priorities, which is why it’s more important than ever that Democrats take back control of the House and protect the foundation of our democracy. **[We've got a long road ahead of us, and many battles to go, but our fight to take back the U.S. House has already begun. clean_body: | = Peter — Last week, reporters asked Speaker Johnson his thoughts about the Qatari government offering a plane to Donald Trump. His response? He said it’s “not in his lane.’ The Speaker of the House claimed that the Constitution of the United States isn’t his lane. Every member of Congress makes a sworn oath to the Constitution. The powers of the House are the FIRST thing defined. Holding the president accountable is literally “in his lane.” As House Democratic Whip, I know how critical it is for our leaders to uphold the Constitution and fight for the people we represent. Speaker Johnson apparently doesn’t have the same priorities, which is why it’s more important than ever that Democrats take back control of the House and protect the foundation of our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Peter — we can’t do this without you. — Katherine Clark Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

Peter, it’s Emma.

**As Valerie’s campaign manager, I hate to share that we *just* fell short of our mid-quarter fundraising goal last night.** Before I explain how we can go forward from here, [will you chip in $10 or any amount to help us make up that gap and give us a head start on the next fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107826364/545948736/-1734282297?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_051625_MM_180DO_D1_S5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QxMzg5MS03YjMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxjpLp4JEhKJuYSXe6iExkrwKRgJxRjLZB8KLqEQEYk=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107826365/545948739/-1734282297?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_051625_MM_180DO_D1_S5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QxMzg5MS03YjMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxjpLp4JEhKJuYSXe6iExkrwKRgJxRjLZB8KLqEQEYk=)
---
I’m not going to tell you that the sky is falling because we missed one fundraising goal — I know that we can bounce back. But here’s the truth on where we stand currently:
* **The good news** is that grassroots supporters are continuing to chip in to Valerie’s campaign at a steady rate and last night might have just been an outlier.
* **The bad news** is we can’t afford to miss any more fundraising goals, especially with national Republicans eyeing North Carolina and looking for any weaknesses in Democratic fundraising.

[So if you’re still with us, will you chip in $10 before midnight tonight to help us get back on track and power Valerie’s campaign for the months ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107826366/545948740/-1734282297?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_051625_MM_180DO_D1_S5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QxMzg5MS03YjMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxjpLp4JEhKJuYSXe6iExkrwKRgJxRjLZB8KLqEQEYk=)

I'm told my reputation precedes me.

I hope that's a good thing.

I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.

So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.

My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.

That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!

_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal._

It'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. _**[We've only got DAYS 'til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=81f80caa434e492399a74ef7cb1c61ec&_e=hsKXK3Q5fqSLt18DU5Wd6V3yG2aN45LMdmCIk_uHrwu0PnZgQp3a4G8s5Yq6gi8dst7SXrXXH7P2gGD0h2P5B8Iz7NmBsZHU3kCkNgnATF7iv6JKrMeU24ikauQ6oASyDH40oIGWTdvuz3Mzf-hWaa3T_I5k24KBkayz_sV7_bgwyysgYmuC919qnCtY-xLqDs1ZvH1lbFqykht1m9RIH7CNr-lk-tlJ4wI7wkbrzzsCDrqSPQJeYr5AtYm6nGew2l4Ng69-R54-7i35N8n7dkOvvna3RRxiikCQNSj0o_DkXOrT2gm7Xy98ygNR4HIspQ_79iBHPnF5U7gxaLaQonS0qeJNxPaIhSDoRkZIvmWtiPdiuEeAiJLUpP3dM3opz6qLky_BnyfKReQpDfrVmQ%3D%3D "We’ve only got DAYS ‘til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?")**_

I know we still have the Senate and White House but it could all be over for us if we don't dig deep and help SAVE the House Majority. That's why:

John Kennedy

Our Health and Human Services Secretary, RFK Jr., recently plunged into a sewage-contaminated creek with his grandchildren, showcasing an astonishing lack of judgment for someone in a public health role. This reckless act not only endangered his family but also set a perilous precedent for others. Despite the National Park Service's ban on swimming and wading due to the creek's rampant bacteria and infectious pathogens, RFK Jr.'s actions highlight an urgent need for leaders who prioritize informed and cautious decisions to protect our health. In light of these alarming events, supporting Able Dems has never been more critical. **Our mission is to elect Democrats with disabilities and allies committed to safeguarding public health. We need leaders who grasp the gravity of responsibility and the importance of caution, especially concerning the health and safety of future generations.** [**Will you join us in our mission to DEFEAT MAGA miscreants and elect representatives who make sound decisions, protecting the wellbeing of all citizens, especially the most vulnerable among us?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8Qh9jkKzoHgDlenfIyxDNP3VIqIIBg_ij0O2bOlg-Mfp0O_S3HHFZxsyAu_QiWbvqpyuvlrGtXjoeHyH16T2JoVOAHuEghFjHCIWgAlLvntVtmOTW7KZWfkfUGG-8EHHRa8bWjH3Y90gEje4l02A_iCJsQpEeUj8Kp3iJzN4J9Tm4rxlnHLmzdfrcCnKEQL9DhYBE4uhMVdVqfVyUHJjmJOJx7Qkqg4lY0V_PiYLLeMW5gQX1R4v3uxcuXceL6iEDoXQ81yU68QaWvw_SBT-6rYP1lxFV95qHBvZD_iGjHL2W/4gj/YdEul31US72yzoT50TBkyg/h2/h001._A3281O4NP3WDZAY4XfQ5qoeO0yswLkhknto9l79CJQ) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Nancy Northup
subject: 🚨ALERT: We’re in court Monday to protect abortion
body:
Peter-WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107826830/545950221/2141984067?sourceid=1150687&utm_campaign=25emama-0502aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA0MWQ3ZS03YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkLiSA30_HZmt6P0_EUx3Z6Ka-kyTCf35s0LZ5GPt0=&emci=1175d43b-ae31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c4041d7e-7c32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107826832/545950223/2141984067?sourceid=1150687&utm_campaign=25emama-0502aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA0MWQ3ZS03YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkLiSA30_HZmt6P0_EUx3Z6Ka-kyTCf35s0LZ5GPt0=&emci=1175d43b-ae31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c4041d7e-7c32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

[**This Monday, we’ll be in federal court fighting to ensure that mifepristone—a vital, life-saving medication—is accessible to everyone who needs it.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107826834/545950225/2141984067?sourceid=1150687&utm_campaign=25emama-0502aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA0MWQ3ZS03YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkLiSA30_HZmt6P0_EUx3Z6Ka-kyTCf35s0LZ5GPt0=&emci=1175d43b-ae31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c4041d7e-7c32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

Earlier this week, HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. suggested that President Trump will use his control over the FDA to decide the future of mifepristone, a safe, effective, FDA-approved abortion medication used in more than half of all abortions nationwide.

But we refuse to let that happen. | [**Peter, JOIN US**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107826842/545950227/2141984067?sourceid=1150687&utm_campaign=25emama-0502aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA0MWQ3ZS03YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkLiSA30_HZmt6P0_EUx3Z6Ka-kyTCf35s0LZ5GPt0=&emci=1175d43b-ae31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c4041d7e-7c32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
We’ll be in Charlottesville, Virginia making the case that scientific evidence—not politics—should guide medical care. For over 20 years, mifepristone has been proven safe and effective, but anti-abortion extremists continue to deny the science and seek to stigmatize this essential health care. [**Thanks to support from people like you, Peter, we’re fighting back hard.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107826845/545950235/2141984067?sourceid=1150687&utm_campaign=25emama-0502aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA0MWQ3ZS03YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkLiSA30_HZmt6P0_EUx3Z6Ka-kyTCf35s0LZ5GPt0=&emci=1175d43b-ae31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c4041d7e-7c32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)
[**FIGHT WITH US**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107826846/545950238/2141984067?sourceid=1150687&utm_campaign=25emama-0502aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA0MWQ3ZS03YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkLiSA30_HZmt6P0_EUx3Z6Ka-kyTCf35s0LZ5GPt0=&emci=1175d43b-ae31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c4041d7e-7c32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "FIGHT WITH US")
---
We're going to court to defend the facts:
✅ Mifepristone is safe
✅ It's been used for over 25 years
✅ People deserve access, no matter their zip code

[**We're ramping up our legal strategy and preparing for a long fight. But we can't do it without _you_.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107826848/545950239/2141984067?sourceid=1150687&utm_campaign=25emama-0502aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA0MWQ3ZS03YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hkLiSA30_HZmt6P0_EUx3Z6Ka-kyTCf35s0LZ5GPt0=&emci=1175d43b-ae31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c4041d7e-7c32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

**This moment is critical—and together, we can work to protect the future of abortion care.** Thank you for your unwavering partnership, and your commitment to reproductive freedom.

In solidarity,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

subject: STAND WITH US: A Night to Celebrate Freedom & Fuel the Future
body:
Hamilton for Delegate!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/6bPRPveHr/c?w=-r83aEa-iJ-H8OJe8mso-vsTXwXVUKOIgyPmdn-vUI0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYW1pbHRvbmZvcnZpcmdpbmlhLmNvbS9zby82YlBSUHZlSHI_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | | |
---
| | STAND WITH US: A Night to Celebrate Freedom & Fuel the Future
---
| | | |
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/6bPRPveHr/c?w=hwcXoFugPNP6ZYagNwwqYQfIiaUoTjaMW04PrdkWixQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9XV1cuSEFNSUxUT05GT1JWSVJHSU5JQS5DT00iLCJyIjoiNTJkYWZmODctNzM3Yi00NjcwLTk5NzMtY2FmODM2YjQ3YTQwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0)
---
| | | |
---
| | Dear friend, We’re excited to invite you to a very special evening, one that’s built on the values that make this country strong: service, community, and patriotism. JOIN US for a night of celebration and momentum as we rally support for the next phase of our campaign. This event is more than a fundraiser; it’s a call to action, and we want you there. You can expect an energizing program featuring guest speakers like Delegate Phil Scott, Supervisor Yesli Vega, live music, refreshments, and a room full of supporters ready to move our mission forward. Every ticket, every donation, and every handshake brings us closer to victory. We can’t do it without you! Your presence will help us build the campaign that HD-62 DESERVES, one grounded in principle, driven by people, and ready to fight for this district. If you’re able, we invite you to contribute at one of our SPONSORSHIP LEVELS! It's a powerful way to amplify your support and be recognized as a friend of the campaign. Details are available on the above flyer (open in browser) or by contacting palmer@hamiltonforvirginia.com. To RSVP for this event, please go to https://secure.anedot.com/hamilton-for-virginia/fundraiser and contribute the amount of either a ticket or, if you'd be so inclined, a sponsorship level. EVERY DOLLAR COUNTS! We’re ready to stand STRONG to defend our Conservative values. Are you with us?

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: Virtual event this Sunday with Katie!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39728%2E3422442%2EKSHOE6)
Dear Derek,
We didn’t want you to miss the virtual discussion Katie’s hosting this Sunday, where she’s going to put her law professor hat on and break down the recent Supreme Court case about birthright citizenship.
Here are the full details:
**[Office Hours with Professor Porter](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250516_1_ak?refcode=em20250516-39728&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39728_3422442_KSHOE6&akid=39728%2E3422442%2EKSHOE6)**
Sunday, May 18
4pm PT / 7pm ET
Zoom link provided with donation of any amount*
We hope to see you there!
—Team KP
*The event link will be provided to you automatically in your ActBlue receipt when you donate.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39728&t=3&akid=39728%2E3422442%2EKSHOE6)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39728)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39728&t=4&akid=39728%2E3422442%2EKSHOE6)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/bolJgX9DXwhbLJzsuLfQ5c45tlw5Pk6rIBenTi1ZxBuzm-LofF2flE1JY1XQNBlfoA9JQmgqT8N51KyFAxWP0XdLdZ10CdHTscGBdV9ZGavNdfs8UPXnEc8AS367bNVhx2idE1kQdrgv4CvC2idBmUm8Ui65YD9G1iJlRzK2mOdjYpbbRyKfs0w4-NU2uQdZv3TiHcNEo2Z1Zt53rfD1R0UCXltKin5zhZUH56Im5oOWcBTw2cwCGvMcpYaWkTVwJaTu_jZnU3MI-Ay9CgcIm-P3GdL8nO_88yX_QcyTmrA1RF1d_9WXzWj0Mldo_L3mfEjEBshnQhyZXmcTplLYttO7og18o95KJCfBEKMDXebCdLaiPRSgCv3sNBU9KWje51jPIaM704U-IAktlw9A1WVamSpL5Rk6AugJ-17p6KxzQ-wfDQK37lyKG8MocjLt-cU-qEVoW3twnx_JdUmleMloNJnZxXXNZ5UpRqR1iV-mq_b-Py8yHWI1nldZXY0R4ZQY5fxR6mgND1C8EH-zjevpNfWKGu-3bG1vpIahUndx1sSgbeAdMuqktKFNS7x4Go2cpRAPAI_31BYftTcLm7bhdisEmXxYjku_PZaI3lQJhIrpHL8TTo-AcB2dhXCF2RUrbm8X7NL_GV-TkzrggVUAP7gdOxzbg0Oj53e7JIJM4sVfhS9ITplW3I1RusnPnIarYzJuLyClRyiFwXQ9862EbBSqavvQ4h1OqnrLaNqKAEKom4Y9vhkWBzhUwF4OIPIzjPogmQlirgTVLJaQ/edTFr3uBC9STJrBB3gIhzk-7t4IntBLZ/9) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden's Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that "white supremacy" is "weaved into [America's] founding documents and principles." Can you imagine being told that America's glorious founding principle--the principle that "all men are created equal," endowed by God with "unalienable rights"--embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America's United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation's history is essentially a history of injustice--that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called "critical race theory" and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted--liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left's dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope--we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. ** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope."** And I'm asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/hk1eGDGG670UoyOTrgDDfYO8WnhmHSNF3XEyoVSAjG3pYCKSGRVdY2_PCGw4A8pnf8Vg-RFtON-zT-25FyBjtgqwsithdxUSkDr2JlnYyEVBigW3T71aQKgrxxZiEtXfnRSi48egLxSop6lgjrpMhvGHhT41NdWRZESuwK-0w_6KQfFag7kxY6ECmv9wiDzYoJZAPoqHMwZFk1ExLiOaaoPaNMdkzc-BM7bVtbQ4uEh-IMhrJfxcR9OBs-1BMrafspG6grs7jK2Lm--Sm6kKuOLBA-sQ3Jj6h_hNoKXVHgCp4QSqsnXAdGOHRwMVHfT6R3DOixAVFI36inVjAa16mKXmppcpiWT_bWFkH-BTIaE4hFQbGw7Xb8bJYlKkRkdwcN5aRMGBIwtG7XFNNWlClcA_xuEi6nNi4NOHs0DpCXAFz13viRWMLPdx9iBWTaGfBGmT3XDJj72U-x29enAXZvzlm6hUX6smMhxFDWVBeMAheQqqby71mZxwJDxJ3YxvnSILu0xWKdgfDl6Gq2i0RyE3hG_6gneNvhAY6HFp44QPBj_d2IJOvtWwvrRN0xYWU5XrqZmZmNQgo4LYGYhjcG56-Fsr-wT_fWI4Z-XF8YElsD0g6d9NlGzdoOq9xVlB8gx4Z4bKVTkyqZtlquy78lzBUS2zJKUBzRcs6FOQPWDXhVU6Kec2cXnZv6Sp_vnGPx7e7HApF9mx4IlYxLioRISz_1CQrWdAm40yQPrAM3mzSJb_KhC-jO-sEkD2KdbK5wYp9xHRax_o65DgpGni/1p4lP926VhhCMLXS-4iAQHgo6N0e9IhP/9)** Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty--which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project," which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources--and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"**--but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That's why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more? ** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/jpzoZYQgO0MdLGhi99d_g3IBRMDbJE3SE9gpNiR_AO6yI21saKI3c4cfrIPlXXP1llTF2V-XspM0-AyDd81yfsSRaNDkNX2TKDYW2FvSMHnIvBsQkE1yD1lSkxINUwLWnj0k9v5x-Bx8JbtBt7Ki4E-IoU9teW09Umq3L4FFWh7Z12z0wEYFsoOMjGdNm1YayNEd1cZmAaSwMRWDTF3XHibtGkjoMynqDgh6pn68qyUBArWNaK_ZVfqt5rYVHceOxst9ol6oCtaQuT3PrtOKAq30VdvhPp1ngS_aPmeikK6qE2DBJTp4tkuTl0tsQCl7qcNbFyRlVQZRLadhcuTHT3TGpwA2DZVP8gPoQBSSzw1AJL9j3bWLj_N3WdM9uwK6rmotq-zaAJqjbrpCWCsw5zpqZgCXGQ8cReQXQdhyHycY1DaFCoya2VwAr3tN23zzEaaFylsB_9SegzpsfKOr194KrJ-j15n-LA0u_e3s3NeS9lQs1gQZerR25aksEOceArHwAxqpQtoMW7JC70FGs03Zx_qOmAq5BJ88fS7s8P0kmJz2gfVH3aL41aqQ8WeVAkoMy63f43NQ4prLIMxh7olbJGcJtA3tRXdkFcFTEEnA_ij5_D_gpuwyqzABz6MBvbFzA16O2oOilZGZH48e3B0hNYPee2ITpD24C1lbf7dRq2prLFsNKh8MNLk1Npi_1f7UBU1dY-oJAstSnDd2vkIPH8-B5I8DpDeeJ-1y32h1B1BZTOpY17_YhTzHnn1Eqful9W3rpSsy6RBPRekz/mBnoui4zP1j_6m0_oFp917cCi7QrvTIv/9)** We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving free government. name: Royce White
subject: Just Fifteen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This will be short and sweet
|
---

Peter,

I won't take too much of your time here.

[**I’ll be upfront from the get-go – I’m asking for just $15.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c5122708f99545478079567e0af2dc6e&_e=8piAL3T7Idj6p1_Y3t2-aEK69EAWP8M3iUeE3UG0fmGeVNyyH8ybQFq2WS43LIuLbjUuDncgMKnCkseiXS2X2Q-_2z3aSQy8XwXP8y-9_3mWCHVgT_OaKM_88YnYcO2h0qUV5tATG8cjW2RimGDH3m9Clbg4DWj2OF9SGZ1VtOf2uTOhR7YrCDSMfVlYNqpgPDQHgnSGS_IjWcP5NK51TwWIujEvlcLbB9m6QjG8Bk3W0k_x60201xs2eujXHDAsGo7AVK4CfAKhfYIS-eXiyBQACp3TQXarB8EWQMm0Q-5FYm-4nJZOfaeBz5m1ZKVSjz7Me8CHI4VUcgRBUFf2U7OQw5nntTNx_SvXz9z19QYPUc1AE-bR7oeRdbK_NdbsLXWGn2-5fRZyKXV9jOOcHaFpcFVKUIbgHarubL_cD5dozR5_dLff4W5Dm51bifBwIRnNGB4HmUIKaEeHyVuJDEr3gx6bYWIrtWOFy61moC6lhUqSDdwdosx3FdSov30Sy64RNzQuxXern-cs8Kdj68EWSNo15WeQUVwhY8x6QyHlXTKyCeLblh02ECk_rM6Z)

It may not seem like a lot of money, but $15 will go a lot farther for my campaign than you'd think.

Every dollar, every cent, and every prayer to God helps me continue fighting. Our nation is in trouble, led by corrupt career politicians who try to herd us like sheep while they line their pockets. I'm working every single day, hour, minute, and second to save our United States of America from hellfire.

[**If you can chip in just $15 to my campaign and help me become Minnesota's first ever Black Senator, please CLICK HERE or use the button below.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c5122708f99545478079567e0af2dc6e&_e=8piAL3T7Idj6p1_Y3t2-aEK69EAWP8M3iUeE3UG0fmGeVNyyH8ybQFq2WS43LIuLbjUuDncgMKnCkseiXS2X2Q-_2z3aSQy8XwXP8y-9_3mWCHVgT_OaKM_88YnYcO2h0qUV5tATG8cjW2RimGDH3m9Clbg4DWj2OF9SGZ1VtOf2uTOhR7YrCDSMfVlYNqpgCTlIk9a-A5OUpPFy1ficKAutAF4rzMLhBTZEd4pp1Juho-r4XaRaZpqplCyZec9XC_rRlS9sVpmhbVa8ecHPn9UoKoCKE1SoQXxoJkYFmkMO1liVsEhVCHnpIhaggC4MxbUuKa-YlFyoIOj-dLm71nurfIp7s6Bi4e3ae5HSpMGIilC6iq-4deTHQLNZWTWi51VOt3RUhG5rAroQJlR1fyy0otNIPbY6jRDYrlOPo19Hy8b9VEgU_cGpltCU-Zijvnh3jIAT03nYtVTKjpTIKMTKuaoSnK2_bh47F8gl_KnXCGUTGt5_AEs1Slc3OfUYI19427FBZtqFlsam-LYArIYeyQE5LfkM2jTv9egdLwgFqj0xlA6lvXvAg8Lswfyj)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: An update on the 8th Circuit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=]
Democracy Docket: New Ruling Cuts Off Key Tool to Protect Minority Voters [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=]
Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit on one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
A federal appeals court this week cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue.
This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years.
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=15&amtOpts=&recurringAm=15&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=YVQt7kDSzSHV0pPWeBib71g07rd34l151Ck9pgVsYNI=&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25&amtOpts=&recurringAm=25&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=YVQt7kDSzSHV0pPWeBib71g07rd34l151Ck9pgVsYNI=&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=YVQt7kDSzSHV0pPWeBib71g07rd34l151Ck9pgVsYNI=&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=YVQt7kDSzSHV0pPWeBib71g07rd34l151Ck9pgVsYNI=&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250&amtOpts=&recurringAm=250&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=YVQt7kDSzSHV0pPWeBib71g07rd34l151Ck9pgVsYNI=&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this new appellate ruling is not overturned by the Supreme Court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=DpQn3Ox2lOEONLY5UfNMPB8vsCTcbn9fFOSJmyck7sJKrsjFoAdSV0a8LGFkuOeD2T/7R0b/PjAiijtoyA3UaKoCmC1UkWDwk5uiH6biVeg=]

name: David Hogg
subject: We’ve got a trust problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
If we don’t fix this now, we’ll lose our future.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250516-1&t=1&akid=2144%2E587540%2ESw1g32)
Let’s skip the fluff, Peter:
**Voters don’t trust the Democratic Party.**
They don’t think we understand their problems.
They think we’re too judgmental, too out of touch. And they haven’t heard a vision from us that speaks to the future they want for themselves and their families.
That’s not just a messaging issue – that’s a **_credibility crisis._** One we have to fix if we want to win again.
At **Leaders We Deserve,** we’re not making excuses. We’re building the change.
We’re replacing out-of-touch politicians who have grown too comfortable with the status quo. We’re investing in young leaders who listen more than they talk.
And we’re giving voters something they haven’t seen in a long time: **a reason to believe again.**
If you’re frustrated with the state of the party – good. Let’s channel that into action.
We’re powered by the grassroots – people like you who are ready for change that’s real. **[Want to help fix what’s broken? Chip in $5 now to support a new generation of young leaders who actually get it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250516_1_trust?refcode=em20250516-2144&amount=5&refcode2=2144_587540_Sw1g32&akid=2144%2E587540%2ESw1g32)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250516_1_trust?amount=5&refcode=em20250516-2144&refcode2=2144_587540_Sw1g32&akid=2144%2E587540%2ESw1g32)**
Talk is cheap. Trust is earned. Let’s rebuild it – together.
In solidarity,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve

clean_body: If we don’t fix this now, we’ll lose our future. Let’s skip the fluff, Peter: Voters don’t trust the Democratic Party. They don’t think we understand their problems. They think we’re too judgmental, too out of touch. And they haven’t heard a vision from us that speaks to the future they want for themselves and their families. That’s not just a messaging issue – that’s a credibility crisis. One we have to fix if we want to win again. At Leaders We Deserve, we’re not making excuses. We’re building the change. We’re replacing out-of-touch politicians who have grown too comfortable with the status quo. We’re investing in young leaders who listen more than they talk. And we’re giving voters something they haven’t seen in a long time: a reason to believe again. If you’re frustrated with the state of the party – good. Let’s channel that into action. We’re powered by the grassroots – people like you who are ready for change that’s real. Talk is cheap. Trust is earned. Let’s rebuild it – together. In solidarity, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

name: GIFFORDS Alert
subject: Tell the Trump admin: Restore funding for critical resources
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

**Alert: Donald Trump cut hundreds of millions of dollars for gun violence and addiction prevention. This will cost lives. **
[**Sign GIFFORDS’s petition: Tell the Trump administration to restore funding for these critical programs.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_restore_funding_may2025//?source=em250516-1-b&refcode2=10443.3935704.9oz4sX&akid=10443%2E3935704%2E9oz4sX)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_restore_funding_may2025//?source=em250516-1-b&refcode2=10443.3935704.9oz4sX&akid=10443%2E3935704%2E9oz4sX)**
This is a new low.
The Trump administration canceled more than $800 million in grants to local gun violence prevention and crime reduction groups -- calling it “wasteful” spending. This will have devastating impacts.
Republicans and Democrats alike support reducing crime. And that’s exactly what these community violence intervention programs are doing.
The money from these grants went to helping young people get mentors. It went to supporting survivors of crime and abuse. It went to getting local police departments and cities more public safety resources.
And it worked!
Last month, Baltimore had the lowest number of homicides it has ever seen. Philadelphia reported its lowest homicide rate in a decade. Detroit, too -- the lowest in more than 50 years.
But now, these Trump cuts are going to set back all of our work. And when asked of future cuts, the administration said there are “more to come.”
No.
If we want to break the cycle of gun violence and incarceration, then on-the-ground organizations need our help right now.
[**Please add your name to GIFFORDS’s petition: Tell the Trump administration to restore funding for these community violence intervention programs ASAP.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_restore_funding_may2025//?source=em250516-1-b&refcode2=10443.3935704.9oz4sX&akid=10443%2E3935704%2E9oz4sX)
**[ADD MY NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_restore_funding_may2025//?source=em250516-1-b&refcode2=10443.3935704.9oz4sX&akid=10443%2E3935704%2E9oz4sX)**
Thank you,
— GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=10443%2E3935704%2E9oz4sX) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

---
We’ll cut straight to it.
Our mid-May fundraising numbers aren’t where they need to be right now, and we only have until tomorrow at midnight to close the gap. **[Can we count on your first donation of the year to help us get back on track?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107829705/545959897/2105508926?refcode=ea.bef583f6-8132-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.bef583f6-8132-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlZjU4M2Y2LTgxMzItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yjb_q3lEoQ5J2BVqbMU_r3D8eurD60SC4TsXPniqbQs=)**
This fight is bigger than any one of us. It’s about building a movement strong enough and brave enough to stop the fossil fuel agenda in its tracks.
Donald Trump and his allies aren’t wasting a second. They’re rolling back historic climate protections and auctioning off our environment to the highest bidder. **They’re even coming after ActBlue — the very platform millions of grassroots donors use to participate in democracy — because they know people-powered movements like ours are a real threat.**
So we don’t have time to play it safe. Our planet is on the line. Our democracy is on the line. And we need bold climate champions in office now. That’s why we’re turning to you, one of our most dedicated supporters in Cresco.
**We can take on Big Oil and win, but we have to work together. And we’re counting on you to chip in for the first time this year to help us do it. Here’s the link one more time:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107829707/545959899/2105508926?refcode=ea.bef583f6-8132-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.bef583f6-8132-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlZjU4M2Y2LTgxMzItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yjb_q3lEoQ5J2BVqbMU_r3D8eurD60SC4TsXPniqbQs=)**

clean_body: A movement like this only works if you're in it. | | Your 2025 JanePAC Supporter Record Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2025 Donor Status: No donation — yet! Suggested Action: Make your first donation of the year before midnight! | = We’ll cut straight to it. Our mid-May fundraising numbers aren’t where they need to be right now, and we only have until tomorrow at midnight to close the gap. = This fight is bigger than any one of us. It’s about building a movement strong enough and brave enough to stop the fossil fuel agenda in its tracks. Donald Trump and his allies aren’t wasting a second. They’re rolling back historic climate protections and auctioning off our environment to the highest bidder. They’re even coming after ActBlue — the very platform millions of grassroots donors use to participate in democracy — because they know people-powered movements like ours are a real threat. So we don’t have time to play it safe. Our planet is on the line. Our democracy is on the line. And we need bold climate champions in office now. That’s why we’re turning to you, one of our most dedicated supporters in Cresco. We can take on Big Oil and win, but we have to work together. And we’re counting on you to chip in for the first time this year to help us do it. Here’s the link one more time:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We couldn’t do this without you. Real climate progress won’t come from billionaires writing big checks behind closed doors. It happens when thousands of people come together to demand better. – Team JanePAC P.S. Team, We know you're busy, so we'll keep this email short and sweet: we just passed the midpoint of May (if you can believe it), and we're pacing below our fundraising goals for the month. **[Read on for three reasons why our race is one of the most important battlegrounds in the country, or if we've already convinced you, you can give here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107829769/545960019/-200729754?refcode=250516_hq_mm1_l1&ms=250516_hq_mm1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2EyMGE1MTktODIzMi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y3Ntrh5qmNeAbh6OxudlXIMDOHeJLWH2tjnkQCF7L0s=)** 1️⃣
Mike Johnson and the NRCC have already started attacking Nellie — since her very first vote. They're poised to spend millions of dollars to defame Nellie with lies and flip this seat. 2️⃣
Republicans in competitive seats have raised more than Democrats in aggregate this year, and that doesn't bode well for us. We need to reclaim that energy and momentum heading into next year's midterm elections if we hope to regain our House majority. 3️⃣
NJ-09 is critical to all pathways to securing our House majority, and Nellie only narrowly won last November in a district Trump won. **[Ready to make an impact? name: Governor JB Pritzker
subject: Hey there, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|

Hey there, Peter — Illinois Governor JB Pritzker here. I wanted to reach out on Yassamin’s behalf because the work she’s doing for Arizonans and people across the country cannot be ignored. Yassamin has kept pressure on the Trump administration to follow the rule of law. She even went all the way to El Salvador to ensure Kilmar Abrego Garcia’s safety and urged the embassy to safely return Mr. Garcia home. As leaders, she and I both swore to uphold the Constitution, which means that _everyone_ has a right to due process of law. **Yassamin is _exactly_ the kind of Democrat we need right now, one who isn’t afraid to stand up to this administration and call out injustice whenever and wherever it happens. _**[Will you pitch in right now to support her work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107830074/545961134/1386253589?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjEzMWQ2NC04MjMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmawJp3RowlLy4VzyotWcsMKsJ-vzImznfsQywRw7_c=)**_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107830075/545961135/1386253589?express=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjEzMWQ2NC04MjMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmawJp3RowlLy4VzyotWcsMKsJ-vzImznfsQywRw7_c=)
