name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Join our Monthly call Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Will these be the last closed primaries in PA?

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_may_monthly_call_invite&n=1)
---
|
### **Our Monthly Call is just in time**
Join us May 19th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uwl9pDp8g-rX1WnI3QBeNAyiZA3e9JmFtj4slpppItIV_3m0ilCPMsUjst4lUmcTHw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_may_monthly_call_invite&n=2) Monday is the day before the 2025 Primary Elections. Let us know if there's a race in your area that we should be aware of. Once again, the major parties will benefit from tax payer funded elections to choose their nominees. Once again voters not registered with one of these two parties will be blocked from voting in these tax payer funded elections. And once again, Pennsylvania will be one of the worst states in the country for independent voters. All this as we're celebrated as the swingiest of the swing states cycle after cycle. There is [real momentum behind repealing closed primaries](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=b6GkgcRzF2USU66qy28VruAZ-_WhBVa-bJDeohOXJ1_eIhj8N4EuY0wO7iqDEPhIVmoUm3_JFTRW3RIzL9O17_5Poe3OsbxvG5ZAKvYM3MjNuQduf-oBq4KzqdRwyzzpoOfjCFVHZsQEgTU2_0A7v-MqVI8PDA8IUieURi2b9hjWcjH4NDiVj3hCsK40KSpOGhcmNFsq4LXAFxxGKoRMXKhWBV0SmzEvHAmKiXRp63I&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_may_monthly_call_invite&n=3) and the details of what system we adopt matters. Make sure you're paying attention and letting your voice be heard on this issue.
* * *
### **Support your Pennsylvania Forward Party!**
Our system is designed to keep the major parties alive and fighting forever. We're trying to change that and we need your help. You can support us in many ways.
* Attending a call or event and sharing your perspective.
* Voting for a Forward Candidate.
* Telling your friends about what we're doing.
* Running for local office yourself.

All of which you should do. But if you have the means, you can also support us financially. We don't need a lot, we are a volunteer organization and we keep costs to a minimum. But more people giving a few dollars a month creates a base of funds that we can rely on for things we want to do. Renting a table at a fair, printing materials, legal and bank services, all these things add up and we appreciate the people who contribute. We have big plans for this year and next, your contribution can help us make them happen. Any donation made on our website gets spend in our state and helps directly. clean_body: Will these be the last closed primaries in PA? | | | Our Monthly Call is just in time Join us May 19th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. Monday is the day before the 2025 Primary Elections. Let us know if there's a race in your area that we should be aware of. Once again, the major parties will benefit from tax payer funded elections to choose their nominees. Once again voters not registered with one of these two parties will be blocked from voting in these tax payer funded elections. And once again, Pennsylvania will be one of the worst states in the country for independent voters. All this as we're celebrated as the swingiest of the swing states cycle after cycle. There is and the details of what system we adopt matters. Make sure you're paying attention and letting your voice be heard on this issue. Support your Pennsylvania Forward Party! Our system is designed to keep the major parties alive and fighting forever. We're trying to change that and we need your help. You can support us in many ways. Attending a call or event and sharing your perspective. Voting for a Forward Candidate. Telling your friends about what we're doing. Running for local office yourself. All of which you should do. But if you have the means, you can also support us financially. We don't need a lot, we are a volunteer organization and we keep costs to a minimum. But more people giving a few dollars a month creates a base of funds that we can rely on for things we want to do. Renting a table at a fair, printing materials, legal and bank services, all these things add up and we appreciate the people who contribute. We have big plans for this year and next, your contribution can help us make them happen. Any donation made on our website gets spend in our state and helps directly. Please consider contributing today. | "Become a PA Forward Donor" Click below to see more** And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Oregon GOP
subject: For Immediate Release: Oregon GOP Urges Voter Turnout in Critical School Board Elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Chairwoman Connie Whlelchel urges Republicans to vote by May 21st to fix Oregon schools.

| |
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/20p9hde-myFV/UW5TcERPTmRGL3Mvc2lzZ3ZhclQyRHNlajQxc2tYeVRHN2xyc2ZSZkdJbkJLZUQ4UWFNUUQzYVcxZkR1bGpBUk1uTWxmUlpRR1pHUDhGOXA5NGk2aU9ISHh3M3FHa1ljUS9mbVVTdUtWY0U9S0/)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
CONTACT:Oregon Republican PartyLaJuana Decker, Communications Chaircommunications.chair@oregon.gop
Release Date: May 16, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: **SALEM, OR —****** With ballot returns lagging in key local elections, Oregon Republican Party Chair Connie Whelchel is calling on Republicans statewide to make their voices heard by returning their ballots by the May 20th deadline – especially in school board races where leadership decisions will have a direct impact on Oregon's struggling education system. “Oregon has become a national embarrassment when it comes to public education,” said Chair Connie Whelchel. “We rank near the bottom in the nation for reading and math proficiency. Less than half of our students can read or do math at grade level. It doesn’t help that the Oregon State Board of Education has eliminated the requirement for high school students to prove proficiency in reading, writing, and math as a condition of graduation. We need leaders on our school boards who will work hard to improve these outcomes – not just protect the status quo.” School board elections across the state are seeing extremely low voter turnout, as too many school boards remain focused on divisive political agendas instead of academic excellence, school safety, and parental rights. “Republicans cannot afford to sit this one out. Local elections matter – and they can be decided by just a handful of votes,” Whelchel said. “If we want better schools, safer streets, and more accountability, we have to show up and vote.” “If every Republican who gets this message votes and encourages one or two others to do the same, we can change the outcome of this election – and help shift the direction of our schools and the success of our students,” Whelchel added. Ballots must be postmarked by Tuesday, May 20th, or dropped off at an official ballot box by 8:00 p.m. that evening. Voters can find official drop box locations at [_https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/drop-box-locator.aspx_](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/V3YAs3Lr_4J2/UW5TcERPTmRGL3Mvc2lzZ3ZhclQyRHNlajQxc2tYeVRHN2xyc2ZSZkdJbkJLZUQ4UWFNUUQzYVcxZkR1bGpBUk1uTWxmUlpRR1pHUDhGOXA5NGk2aU9ISHh3M3FHa1ljUS9mbVVTdUtWY0U9S0/) ####

name: Your 60-second update from OTS
subject: 3️⃣ ways to fight back this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
It can be difficult to keep up with the news cycle right now — so we want to take 60 seconds to fill you in on what’s happened this week under the Trump administration: 👇

1️⃣ House Republicans pushed forward on their dangerous budget this week, which would make **extreme cuts to the Medicaid and SNAP food benefits** that low-income folks rely on to survive — while providing major tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans.

2️⃣ Under anti-vaxxer Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s leadership as Secretary of Health and Human Services, the Trump administration announced that they will **no longer recommend routine COVID vaccines** for children and pregnant people. This comes after RFK Jr. appointed a fraudulent “doctor” who endangered children to lead autism and vaccine research.

3️⃣ Trump is continuing his **reckless trade wars,** announcing that his administration will send letters to countries within weeks to notify them of new tariffs the U.S. will be imposing. This is expected to be the highest tariff increase since the 1930s, and experts warn that it could have **disastrous impacts on the economy.**

If you’re ready to fight back, please [**_call your representatives_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107831012/545964332/-303636128?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.16_OTS-60-Second-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2NmNmVlMi04NDMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISWuihNje2mnoNVVkPHxGspWYeOFiNlIEZk71125JAg=&emci=58aba829-7b32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5ccf6ee2-8432-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029) and urge them to take action against Trump and the Republican majority’s agenda.

We’re in this together,

clean_body: It can be difficult to keep up with the news cycle right now — so we want to take 60 seconds to fill you in on what’s happened this week under the Trump administration: 👇 1️⃣ House Republicans pushed forward on their dangerous budget this week, which would make extreme cuts to the Medicaid and SNAP food benefits that low-income folks rely on to survive — while providing major tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans. 2️⃣ Under anti-vaxxer Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s leadership as Secretary of Health and Human Services, the Trump administration announced that they will no longer recommend routine COVID vaccines for children and pregnant people. This comes after RFK Jr. appointed a fraudulent “doctor” who endangered children to lead autism and vaccine research. 3️⃣ Trump is continuing his reckless trade wars, announcing that his administration will send letters to countries within weeks to notify them of new tariffs the U.S. will be imposing. This is expected to be the highest tariff increase since the 1930s, and experts warn that it could have disastrous impacts on the economy. If you’re ready to fight back, please and urge them to take action against Trump and the Republican majority’s agenda. We’re in this together, Off the Sidelines PAC P.S. = | | = © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Josh Harder
subject: Millions of Americans will lose healthcare if Republicans pass this bill.
body:
It’s cruel. It’s heartless. And it’s shameful.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107831186/545964827/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVjZTQwM2ItODUzMi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fwnAhGqqRV-7Tsjj-ZfS6-ofHMrM8zBEU7hEWxTGAVA=) | Peter, I first decided to run for Congress in 2017 when Republicans were trying to rip healthcare away from millions of people, including my own brother. I was furious. And I knew I had to do something. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107831187/545964828/-1855827435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVjZTQwM2ItODUzMi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fwnAhGqqRV-7Tsjj-ZfS6-ofHMrM8zBEU7hEWxTGAVA=&emci=e605b656-d831-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ece403b-8532-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6455652)** Together, we fought back. Our voices were so loud that it became too politically unfeasible and ultimately John McCain gave the iconic thumbs down. We protected healthcare for millions of Americans and saved countless lives. But now, they’re at it again. Republicans are back in power and plowing forward with their new plan to kick millions of Americans off Medicaid, just to hand another giant tax break to billionaires like Elon Musk. I’m terrified about what this will mean for thousands of people in my community who rely on Medi-Cal for lifesaving care, prescriptions, and doctor visits. If this bill passes, they won’t be able to afford healthcare. **It’s cruel. It’s heartless. And it’s shameful. We can’t let it happen!** [_**The GOP is trying to push this through the House before Memorial Day. I am a NO vote, but we need to do more. We need to raise our voices loudly and clearly, just like we did last time! Will you please sign my petition and tell Congress to reject this terrible bill?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107831188/545964829/-1855827435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVjZTQwM2ItODUzMi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fwnAhGqqRV-7Tsjj-ZfS6-ofHMrM8zBEU7hEWxTGAVA=&emci=e605b656-d831-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ece403b-8532-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107831189/545964830/-1855827435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVjZTQwM2ItODUzMi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fwnAhGqqRV-7Tsjj-ZfS6-ofHMrM8zBEU7hEWxTGAVA=&emci=e605b656-d831-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ece403b-8532-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6455652) This isn’t just about politics. It’s about people’s lives. Thanks for taking action, \- Josh

body:
Donald Trump is doing this from inside the White House.
#
We can’t make this up.
Donald Trump launched a $TRUMP crypto meme coin and made more than $150 million off of people desperate to get close to power.
He’s accepting a $400 million luxury jet from the royal family of Qatar. _Yes, a foreign government giving gifts to a sitting president._
Now, Trump’s pushing a “big beautiful” tax scam that will kick millions off insurance and take meals out of people’s mouths — just to make his billionaire friends even richer.
**And he’s doing it all from _inside_ the White House.**
**This is corruption, plain and simple.**
**Sarah is working every single day to fight back and make government work better for all of us — for folks like you and your family.** And she’s doing it with the support of _thousands_ of regular people chipping in whatever they can.

Neither do we, because that is the sht authoritarian dictators like Vladimir Putin and Kim Jung Un do, not American presidents. As Trump’s regime slashes programs that sustain our country, jails dissenters, and travels on the taxpayer dime to make personal business deals with dangerous despots, they are also spending $184 million on huge Trump banners to hang on federal buildings. In the early stages of fascism, symbol and spectacle matter as they internalize the primacy of the Dear Leader and subserviency to an inescapable culture. Trump wants to break us. He wants us to believe he is everywhere and omnipotent. He’s NOT! He’s impeachable and convictable (again)! We're launching NEW IMPEACH billboards this summer, like this one coming to Atlanta...and we need your help to expand to MORE CITIES! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. MAGA says they do it in North Korea and China to show respect for their Supreme leaders, so why shouldn’t we? Convicted felon, adjudicated sexual offender and conman Donald Trump is the LEAST among us, not some superhuman myth that his effort to saturate public spaces with his face, brand, ideas, and name would have the more gullible among us believe. We must not let Trump lead our nation down a very dangerous dystopian path that will destroy our freedoms, our democracy, and our lives! **** ****It starts with banners. name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: Ruben’s working to save Medicare and Social Security
body:
Know how long Elon Musk paid his Social Security and Medicare taxes this year? Probably just a few minutes! Seriously.
#

Peter,
It seems like every day there’s another story about how Republicans in Congress are looking to destroy programs like Medicare and Social Security under the guise of “saving” them.
Ruben isn’t falling for the spin.
That’s why he’s backing the _Medicare and Social Security Fair Share Act_ — a bill the GOP absolutely hates.
Why? Because it does one simple thing:
**It makes the richest people finally pay their fair share.**
Let’s put this into perspective a bit. You probably pay your Medicare and Social Security taxes on every paycheck. You pay a fraction of your wages into the program, and you keep doing that until you retire — when you start to receive the benefits you paid into. That’s how it works.
But billionaires like Elon Musk? They stop paying into these programs partway through January — because there’s a cap on how much they’re required to contribute. Once they hit it, they’re done.
We can fix this and keep Medicare and Social Security afloat for the long run by lifting the contribution caps for people making over $400,000 a year, increasing their Medicare tax rate, and closing a loophole that lets them avoid Medicare taxes.
And those people making over $400,000 a year? That’s about 5% of the total population of the United States. Only the wealthiest folks will pay a bit more, and everyone benefits.
If we do that, we keep these programs paying out what we pay into them for the next 75 years.
Sound good? We think so. That’s why Ruben signed on, and it’s why we’re writing to you today.
[**Do you agree that the wealthiest people in the country should pay their fair share into Medicare and Social Security just like the rest of us? Add your name if you do!** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_txt_medicare_social_act/?source=em250516-1-90&akid=3869%2E734936%2ESSW6U7) Ruben’s fighting to protect what we’ve all earned — and to make sure these programs are there for us, our parents, and our kids. Thank you for helping him do it. Team Gallego

# BIG SKY REPORT:
An Update from Senator Daines
---
| Fellow American,

May is off to a busy start, and I want to share with you some of the key initiatives and community outreach activities I’ve been working on to keep Montana and our nation strong.

I hope you enjoy this edition of the _**Big Sky Report**_.
---
|
### Policy Achievements: Advancing Montana’s Priorities
#### Halt Fentanyl Act
My “Halt All Lethal Trafficking (HALT) of Fentanyl Act” passed the Senate recently, permanently classifying fentanyl and related substances as Schedule I drugs. This law will help curb the devastating impact of fentanyl in Montana communities, protecting our families from this deadly epidemic.
#### Supporting American Hydropower
I led a bill to support American hydropower, allowing the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission to approve six-year extensions for projects licensed before 2020. This ensures reliable, clean energy for Montanans while creating good-paying jobs across our state.
#### Protecting Jobs at Bull Mountains Mine
I urged the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee to pass my S.362 bill, which keeps the Bull Mountains Mine open in Musselshell County. This legislation protects jobs and strengthens energy security—a lifeline for that community and our state’s economy.
---
|
### Community Engagement: Listening to Montanans
#### Legacy in the Land – My interview with _Explore Big Sky_
I was proud to sit down with _**Explore Big Sky**_ to discuss my personal history with conservation and my outlook on the future of our public lands. [**Click below to learn more.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=de8e40b06d054b379c64fe585a33b55e&_e=keJNOhUnydJttixi9IV8IJ5ktlgaWFr1FX6gjKEGHCU578P_sSG0naDBpNSv4wyIOg_PIFKbeDUZkkFc0xlr0WUXFEyV52H7ez-js7mRsF0lFsd0FqR4lOW0V1AZdiANm5Y6uo8DbDmL2ZWtJDn6zRzEP8U0q55W6ttiIJjtJA-0Ja4HXAL2D09oz0B3tlpy_5gK2rCe-gGUhRJlXyRFTiskMQY0kyxrkpP97iqOOVgCmUz2nAhpJq9PD7oDJ5W6) [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=de8e40b06d054b379c64fe585a33b55e&_e=keJNOhUnydJttixi9IV8IJ5ktlgaWFr1FX6gjKEGHCU578P_sSG0naDBpNSv4wyIOg_PIFKbeDUZkkFc0xlr0TdY1mL-qUrw9MSqKzxOTxI07hAgnX-8sOjjSE83_4uTy3TMVPQ3ns6wEgKdRrh34hl1zshKjuJvy8o3UIPLnNiomC9S4MOY8xAL833EZgi2eszX4Uju3kdnt-85lZ51k9CUTgv_qX1wG8MyQoO8bNEOlGrZYWQeFshlJTrps1kD)
#### Meeting Future Montana Leaders as they visit our Nation’s Capital
I was thrilled to meet with Montana’s future leaders from Gallatin Gateway School and Anderson Middle School as they take on D.C.!
#### Honoring our Nation’s Finest during National Police Week
This week during National Police Week, I was glad to visit with Sheriff Dutton & his team from Lewis and Clark County. The Treasure State will always **Back the Blue!**
---
|
### Looking Ahead
As I work to deliver for Montana, I’m reminded every day of the strength of our communities and the importance of your support. [**If you’d like to help me continue this fight, please consider a contribution of any amount to my re-election campaign.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=de8e40b06d054b379c64fe585a33b55e&_e=keJNOhUnydJttixi9IV8ICzZ6vSPsbvuliWt3AoRaEdk5aaIFPJhzimhJPCCya6sM9q-igCG0zuy_8I0YGg85-GvpBA3lJfDAy9JdIhqUtybyGjzH37f_BeVHE5YFtNbsp7OoegF2de66B71c-iDUPG4srZQA7WfPIOTGmiuMTIW3zWx5oAync2XA_CG4XydqJvqppflOlwNyBv_UHHZBll7LqgtGpyweW5sx8JSxbuqZtwD4XwbcZbYce2eRHIajEcrElicfM_seDWUn98bq0CUXFjVexLuW2pnDulcZd-10IOyuyPexgPKCoxryfoZ6qDy3QmAK2V93jwjm37OWjCWtvd9hc6KJWfYir7ETxiP8SwwsmmIdUDptj0cbKS9JCMTMliFe-U1FdS_qd4J10jopl3zIYLUjN4GzyxpVKT9L1L8yfiM2MOGCy1d7SR0)

|
#### ABOUT SENATOR STEVE DAINES
_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track._

This legislation protects jobs and strengthens energy security—a lifeline for that community and our state’s economy. | Community Engagement: Listening to Montanans Legacy in the Land – My interview with Explore Big Sky I was proud to sit down with Explore Big Sky to discuss my personal history with conservation and my outlook on the future of our public lands. Meeting Future Montana Leaders as they visit our Nation’s Capital I was thrilled to meet with Montana’s future leaders from Gallatin Gateway School and Anderson Middle School as they take on D.C.! Honoring our Nation’s Finest during National Police Week This week during National Police Week, I was glad to visit with Sheriff Dutton & his team from Lewis and Clark County. The Treasure State will always Back the Blue! | Looking Ahead As I work to deliver for Montana, I’m reminded every day of the strength of our communities and the importance of your support. For Montana, Senator Steve Daines | ABOUT SENATOR STEVE DAINES Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Glad I caught you, friend.
body:
|
#
I’m glad I caught you before we break for the weekend, Friend. I wanted to take a moment before midnight tonight to give you a quick update on where things stand with our campaign, and why your [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107833252/545971485/846650059?refcode=em-5.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBhN2Q1YS04OTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qqKAQUTnZ53lPXB4SrIYoYk9hOwWPfaTKu_3g_geBGE=) support is so important. **One:** This week marks our halfway point of our second FEC fundraising quarter. We had to spend every dollar in our bank account to win this last election, and what we raise now will set us up for success in 2026. **Two:** Republicans are _already_ launching attacks against me – a full year before the election. A GOP dark money just dropped $300,000 in attack ads against me, and you can bet more are on the way. After all, Republicans spent more than _$12.5 million_ to defeat me last November. **Three:** Winning this race was not easy – it took over 1,000 volunteers knocking on 260,000 doors, and over $6 million dollars spent directly communicating with voters. With the GOP already launching attacks on us, we know we have to be just as strong – if not stronger – this time around. That’s why I’m personally asking: [**Can you please chip in $3 to support our people-powered campaign? body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=051625_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=051625_2]
Peter,
You might be asking, does my donation really matter?
Yes. Every dollar raised will help support Democrats preparing for voter outreach, ad buys, and turnout operations in THREE upcoming House special elections that could RETURN POWER back to Democrats.
THAT’S why we reach out so much. THAT’s why your donation matters so much.
So, we’re asking... can you chip in any amount you can right away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=051625_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?express_lane=true&refcode=051625_2&amount=5]

And SO MUCH is at stake right now. Hakeem Jeffries recently put it best:
"House Republicans pretended not to know about Project 2025 last year. Now they are implementing it."
Republicans are openly embracing Trump’s authoritarian playbook. They’re pushing extreme abortion bans, gutting LGBTQ+ rights, and attacking democracy itself.
If we lose these three upcoming special elections that will determine control of the House, Trump’s MAGA allies will have free rein to implement their radical agenda... and America as we know it will be OVER
We can’t let that happen.
If you care about democracy, voting rights, reproductive freedom, and everything else we’ve fought for, now is the time to act.
Every donation is a statement - we are NOT going to roll over and let them destroy our country. We WILL help Democrats take back the House. Can we count on you to chip in any amount you can?
Donate now to flip the House → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=051625_2]
Thanks for stepping up,
Real Texas PAC

1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Susan Daggett Bennet
subject: Friend, I’d love if you joined this team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250516_susanbennetsend_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250516_susanbennetsend_act]
Hi friends,
It's Susan, Michael’s wife. I wanted to reach out about what’s driving Michael to run for governor.
I’ve known Michael for more than 30 years. In that time, I’ve learned that he has a deeply held sense of responsibility to Colorado, this country, and the world.
As a result, he’s always been tireless in his effort to address issues, fix problems, and take action that will better the lives of those around him, especially Colorado’s kids.
Because of his drive to make a difference, Michael has a history of taking on jobs with tough—some would say impossible—challenges. When our daughters were young, Michael left a job in the private sector to work for the brand-new mayor of Denver and finally fix the city’s budget crisis.
Then, he took on the job of Superintendent of the Denver Public Schools, where he led one of the most significant educational reform initiatives in America that dramatically improved outcomes for kids.
Michael never expected to become a Senator, but he knew that being in the Senate was an opportunity to make an even bigger impact on Colorado and the next generation. He has spent the last 16 years traveling every inch of Colorado—studying the challenges Colorado communities face, the forces that threaten to pull us apart, and the values that promise to bring us together.
Now, Michael is running to be the next Governor of Colorado—because he knows the solutions to our most pressing challenges will come from right here at home.
Michael believes that Colorado is where we can build the future. Working together, we can create more affordable housing across the state, make healthcare and childcare more affordable and accessible, modernize our education system, support our small businesses, and continue leading the fight against climate change.
I’ve never been more proud of Michael, and I know he will be an extraordinary Governor of our extraordinary state.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you, friend. This campaign relies on thousands of small-dollar donations to keep it moving forward. If you can, please consider chipping in $25, $15, or even $5 today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250516_susanbennetsend_act]

clean_body: [] Hi friends, It's Susan, Michael’s wife. I wanted to reach out about what’s driving Michael to run for governor. I’ve known Michael for more than 30 years. In that time, I’ve learned that he has a deeply held sense of responsibility to Colorado, this country, and the world. As a result, he’s always been tireless in his effort to address issues, fix problems, and take action that will better the lives of those around him, especially Colorado’s kids. Because of his drive to make a difference, Michael has a history of taking on jobs with tough—some would say impossible—challenges. When our daughters were young, Michael left a job in the private sector to work for the brand-new mayor of Denver and finally fix the city’s budget crisis. Then, he took on the job of Superintendent of the Denver Public Schools, where he led one of the most significant educational reform initiatives in America that dramatically improved outcomes for kids. Michael never expected to become a Senator, but he knew that being in the Senate was an opportunity to make an even bigger impact on Colorado and the next generation. He has spent the last 16 years traveling every inch of Colorado—studying the challenges Colorado communities face, the forces that threaten to pull us apart, and the values that promise to bring us together. Now, Michael is running to be the next Governor of Colorado—because he knows the solutions to our most pressing challenges will come from right here at home. Michael believes that Colorado is where we can build the future. Working together, we can create more affordable housing across the state, make healthcare and childcare more affordable and accessible, modernize our education system, support our small businesses, and continue leading the fight against climate change. I’ve never been more proud of Michael, and I know he will be an extraordinary Governor of our extraordinary state. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, friend. This campaign relies on thousands of small-dollar donations to keep it moving forward. If you can, please consider chipping in $25, $15, or even $5 today. >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Susan [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. body:

My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
| | [ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7000ab5803ac41aeb12ae2e43a59f425&_e=8uqbgKMPSETV86T0tbLsvo0y5VySX1zKMKrx1rd7qMLe8onbBVbwLpLVjCN3NmfzEi-lHOLzLQaspoHbfXMdh-Cz0JtNr113JYxmtFc-xO8HstYpH9VZFd1NZnIE_16MGy3YrCS-AmZiX-BcWTMfN7UQEVjYd-rIM-dXypeBaz-KmgtUWDAIpvdGebz-9G2UOyTRi34dV_nEGTstQ2AFJftM0MeL69WWDqr2i--co4mSn2KcSyi0DtpxBpEEK9FwkCta_1BAPj2RELtDplxgLTgJ0HmvhXWWoNO0aG2DM7No-Fb6JlwV2dPC4S5J954ZTpDffV5w3URybjPX1qDKWqu5pwk3XvnHpWXJsprbaGcSaLdplEKqIfvIVT35hWu-uyD8tn_WSNXKT10o3Yg__3plToLIyfNIBBGhLRDOnBgQABfxPirN3MHZIJUxhQYTaoXFGBFMgvLEn0__huFEMA%3D%3D)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. **[I'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7000ab5803ac41aeb12ae2e43a59f425&_e=8uqbgKMPSETV86T0tbLsvo0y5VySX1zKMKrx1rd7qMLe8onbBVbwLpLVjCN3NmfzEi-lHOLzLQaspoHbfXMdh-Cz0JtNr113JYxmtFc-xO8HstYpH9VZFd1NZnIE_16MGy3YrCS-AmZiX-BcWTMfN7UQEVjYd-rIM-dXypeBaz-KmgtUWDAIpvdGebz-9G2UOyTRi34dV_nEGTstQ2AFJftM0MeL69WWDqr2i--co4mSn2KcSyi0DtpxBpEEK9FwkCta_1BAPj2RELtDplxgLTgJ0HmvhXWWoNO0aG2DM7OrH511C9jMPrbFtpCoZNUKUUiM161pPLWFKjUEYxTMC0P8DD1W9oChgN2tNA1AIJ2kofqiBnQn28CAHOv1FQ1240keznXKuQUfoVYofKD-mnpAnRbIOS9B_7kTBoB-9ZCVHD11YdrQ-_jfrEijqozT3UwBTp75--cxWC5RydCP9g%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don’t make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. | | | My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: Rep. Janelle Bynum put the pressure on Speaker Johnson
body:
Meanwhile, the Republican-controlled U.S. House is doing... almost nothing |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107833836/545973421/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE536_20250516_LowerCosts_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056181&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZkZGRjNy04YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNkutjyBhHSutbepl1oMhT_qrMDAhJG0b8BJCNVoxF4=) Peter,

While Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans would rather cut taxes for their wealthy friends than cut costs for American families, EMILYs List-endorsed freshmen are putting the pressure on.

**Rep. Janelle Bynum** (OR-05) is not only leading 32 other Democratic House freshmen in demanding that legislation be brought to the floor to lower costs, create jobs, and improve our quality of life — but she went straight to the speaker with her plan. ****[**Donate today to support Democratic pro-choice House incumbents who can DEFEAT Republicans in 2026:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107833837/545973439/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE536_20250516_LowerCosts_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056181&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZkZGRjNy04YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNkutjyBhHSutbepl1oMhT_qrMDAhJG0b8BJCNVoxF4=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107833838/545973440/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE536_20250516_LowerCosts_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056181&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZkZGRjNy04YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNkutjyBhHSutbepl1oMhT_qrMDAhJG0b8BJCNVoxF4=)
---
This is exactly why electing Democratic pro-choice women is so important. Women know how to step up for the American people.
**"I'm consistently hearing from my constituents that their paycheck doesn't go as far as it used to — something that as a mother of four, I understand all too well. I came to Congress specifically to address rising costs and to deliver results on what is my and many of my constituents’ top priority." — U.S. Rep. Janelle Bynum **
She's not alone. Other EMILYs List champions are standing with her, including: **Rep. Yassamin Ansari** (AZ-03), **Rep. Lateefah Simon** (CA-12), **Rep. Luz Rivas** (CA-29), **Rep. Laura Friedman** (CA-30), **Rep. Sarah McBride** (DE-AL), **Rep. Sarah Elfreth** (MD-03), **Rep. April McClain Delaney** (MD-06), **Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet** (MI-08), **Rep. Kelly Morrison** (MN-03), **Rep. Maggie Goodlander** (NH-02), **Rep. Nellie Pou** (NJ-09), **Rep. Maxine Dexter** (OR-03), **Rep. Julie Johnson** (TX-32), and **Rep. Emily Randall** (WA-06).

Meanwhile, the Republican-controlled House is doing... almost nothing. Instead of lowering costs or fighting Trump-era tariffs, they're wasting time renaming a body of water and fighting over bathrooms.

****[**We only need to flip THREE House seats to take back the chamber in 2026, and EMILYs List women will be key to securing a pro-choice majority. Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women TAKE BACK the House next year:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107833839/545973441/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE536_20250516_LowerCosts_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056181&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZkZGRjNy04YTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNkutjyBhHSutbepl1oMhT_qrMDAhJG0b8BJCNVoxF4=)****

clean_body: Meanwhile, the Republican-controlled U.S. House is doing... almost nothing | = Peter, While Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans would rather cut taxes for their wealthy friends than cut costs for American families, EMILYs List-endorsed freshmen are putting the pressure on. Rep. Janelle Bynum (OR-05) is not only leading 32 other Democratic House freshmen in demanding that legislation be brought to the floor to lower costs, create jobs, and improve our quality of life — but she went straight to the speaker with her plan. **= | = This is exactly why electing Democratic pro-choice women is so important. Women know how to step up for the American people. "I'm consistently hearing from my constituents that their paycheck doesn't go as far as it used to — something that as a mother of four, I understand all too well. I came to Congress specifically to address rising costs and to deliver results on what is my and many of my constituents’ top priority." — U.S. Rep. Janelle Bynum She's not alone. Other EMILYs List champions are standing with her, including: Rep. Yassamin Ansari (AZ-03), Rep. Lateefah Simon (CA-12), Rep. Luz Rivas (CA-29), Rep. Laura Friedman (CA-30), Rep. Sarah McBride (DE-AL), Rep. Sarah Elfreth (MD-03), Rep. April McClain Delaney (MD-06), Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet (MI-08), Rep. Kelly Morrison (MN-03), Rep. Maggie Goodlander (NH-02), Rep. Nellie Pou (NJ-09), Rep. Maxine Dexter (OR-03), Rep. Julie Johnson (TX-32), and Rep. Emily Randall (WA-06). Meanwhile, the Republican-controlled House is doing... almost nothing. Instead of lowering costs or fighting Trump-era tariffs, they're wasting time renaming a body of water and fighting over bathrooms. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. # [#]
Peter, you can help us build a more progressive future in Texas right now by participating in our $5 challenge!

CHIP IN $5: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=5&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_051525_5CHALLENGEFWD_90DO30MO_D1_S1

Just a little generosity goes a long way. When you chip in $5, we can keep up our organizing efforts to elect leaders who will represent all Texans and fight for a future where we can all thrive. It’s possible with your help!

Will you take on the challenge by chipping in just $5 to make sure we meet our mission-critical goal tonight?

CHIP IN $5: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=5&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_051525_5CHALLENGEFWD_90DO30MO_D1_S1

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team TOP PAC
Date: May 15, 2025
Subject: $5 challenge
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter, did you know that with just $5, you can help us fight back against MAGA extremism?

Every time you chip in $5, or whatever you can, our team here at TOP PAC is able to keep up our critical work.

We’re mobilizing Black and Latino communities to elect change-making leadership who will represent ALL Texans with true integrity. That’s how we’re building a progressive future for Texas, but we need your help!

I’m sure you know about the deadlines we have to meet each month to make sure we’re on track to finance and accomplish our goals. This month, we’re trying something new: We’re just asking for $5 in the face of our deadline.

It might not seem like much, but if everyone reading this email chipped in $5, we would be able to reach our $2,000 mid-month goal in no time.

Every $5 we raise adds up fast, and when we meet our deadlines, we’re able to keep doing the work we need to do to make tomorrow a future that works for ALL Texans – no matter our age, race, gender, or ZIP Code.

We need grassroots donors like YOU to step up and make sure we can meet our goals and keep doing the work on the ground. So what do you say, Peter? Can you chip in just $5 to help us create the progressive Texas we need?

CHIP IN $5: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=5&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_051525_5CHALLENGEFWD_90DO30MO_D1_S1

Thank you, Peter!

Team TOP PAC

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-footer-24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-footer-24] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. For more information, visit toppac.org [https://organizetexas.org/about-top-pac/] .

name: Rob
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250516&t=1&akid=1791%2E1088799%2EwLh-jJ)
Hi,
Believe it or not, May is halfway over, leaving us just two more weeks to reach our grassroots fundraising goal before the month ends.
I have to be honest: I haven’t had much time to think about fundraising for our re-election campaign ever since Donald Trump returned to the White House.
**For the 22nd time in 16 weeks, my office has sued this administration for, yet again, breaking the law.** In the President’s first term, California sued Trump’s administration about 120 times. This time, California is currently on pace to hit _100 lawsuits in just two years._
It goes to show just how busy we are working to uphold the rule of law and protect Californians from being harmed by the MAGA agenda.
With all of that in mind, I’m hoping you can help me and my team out today. The more we raise from emails like this one, the less time I have to spend making calls to ensure we reach our fundraising goal.
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford to support our people-powered campaign while I stay focused on holding Trump accountable?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250516?refcode=em20250516-1791&amount=5&refcode2=1791_1088799_wLh-jJ&akid=1791%2E1088799%2EwLh-jJ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250516?refcode=em20250516-1791&amount=5&refcode2=1791_1088799_wLh-jJ&akid=1791%2E1088799%2EwLh-jJ)**
I can’t thank you enough.
— Rob
* * *

body:
another day living under this reckless Trump administration

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107834234/545974636/-677879382?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Chaos_250516_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDY2NDI3MC04YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QDr1NYmZLTelYckGK8A5byz_vt__-vZFksXGS_UoCeo=) Derek,

I don’t know about you, but I’m sick and tired of another day of chaos in a Trump administration that’s jerking around lives and livelihoods with absolutely no plan to deliver for the Americans who voted for them.

Americans elected Trump because he said he would bring down costs. It’s as simple as that. Instead, he’s taken corruption to a whole new level.

[_**If that’s all you need to hear and you want to join my fight to hold this reckless administration accountable, chip in to my reelection campaign now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107834235/545974637/-677879382?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Chaos_250516_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDY2NDI3MC04YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QDr1NYmZLTelYckGK8A5byz_vt__-vZFksXGS_UoCeo=)

Trump caused prices to skyrocket with his reckless tariffs and left working families to foot the bill. He’s paraded around the Middle East and made shady deals, accepting gifts from foreign governments. He’s poised to accept a $400 million private jet from Qatar while his latest big bill in Congress proposes kicking _millions_ of folks off of their health care to keep funding big tax giveaways for billionaires like Elon Musk.

Don’t even get me started on the fact that he still refuses to hold Pete Hegseth accountable for his sloppy handling of classified information that put the lives of our servicemembers at risk and made our country less safe. Or that Elon is using his access to the White House to cut big deals for his companies.

**My point is Derek, next year’s election will have consequences, to say the least. We _need_ to protect my seat and take back the Senate for Democrats so I can keep up the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable.**

But I can’t win this fight alone, especially considering Elon Musk spent $288 MILLION to help his allies in the last election, and he’s already dropping the big bucks again.

If you’re able, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to support my reelection campaign. You can donate here at this secure link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250516-trump-chaos**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107834236/545974638/-677879382?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Chaos_250516_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDY2NDI3MC04YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QDr1NYmZLTelYckGK8A5byz_vt__-vZFksXGS_UoCeo=)

The fight continues,

Mark Warner **********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107834237/545974639/-677879382?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Chaos_250516_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDY2NDI3MC04YzMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QDr1NYmZLTelYckGK8A5byz_vt__-vZFksXGS_UoCeo=)**********

body:
After 584 harrowing days in Hamas captivity, Edan Alexander, 21, was freed Monday and reunited with his family in Tel Aviv in a tearful hospital rooftop embrace. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOGyEQhJ-G67BgwZxdUKS57k-b8rRnFh8JsBYQO_f20eUV0oxGGunTzPz4Wr8w5VSf37GQj8-4jshrpU_PNAa1FQuXvv9-bsy_-uBGHWtAUGoFBVeprlK7NWDKx2qn4CMRkJnI69nOFqxWt2n3xswaSFvQm73b-22-WX0zG0RlHOBGU_InTV2103dzVe6i7tvDOTLxYZ0BcMIqCmlwu_zkVMdOMR_8pnZ5cJmy38d4dWG-CVgELPV4cR9nJGA5wQIWdYoGAcuHWw7ynChgoYBVYqY_WAM1uXMOXVLhkbhilg_MWX7S2GXhIg-kfBqqo0uMg5pslAk7ydi4yB0LntCp-fD6pJxTd7Ow6lkw5X9Nx39f_PbwNwAA__-_MpBy).

# Friday, May 16, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** What does home mean to you? For 21-year-old [Edan Alexander](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOGyEQhJ-G67BgwZxdUKS57k-b8rRnFh8JsBYQO_f20eUV0oxGGunTzPz4Wr8w5VSf37GQj8-4jshrpU_PNAa1FQuXvv9-bsy_-uBGHWtAUGoFBVeprlK7NWDKx2qn4CMRkJnI69nOFqxWt2n3xswaSFvQm73b-22-WX0zG0RlHOBGU_InTV2103dzVe6i7tvDOTLxYZ0BcMIqCmlwu_zkVMdOMR_8pnZ5cJmy38d4dWG-CVgELPV4cR9nJGA5wQIWdYoGAcuHWw7ynChgoYBVYqY_WAM1uXMOXVLhkbhilg_MWX7S2GXhIg-kfBqqo0uMg5pslAk7ydi4yB0LntCp-fD6pJxTd7Ow6lkw5X9Nx39f_PbwNwAA__-_MpBy), after 584 days in Hamas captivity, it's more than just a place--it's a heartbeat, his mother's voice, and a long-awaited hug. This week, he finally made it home, collapsing into his family's arms on a Tel Aviv rooftop. Read more below. This afternoon, we're sponsored by [Organixx](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkUFv3CAQRn8NvrHCYGPvwYdWK_e0UaVE6hGNh8GmxWAZdpP8-2pTZaW9VcqVx3uHb36dzRl88HF-gpUGNztTXDKRXnOgUmg3sKY1L5d5SulPLmmnDNGCFMJIIVsuWl5rY8GHd9NUdnBEklRFQ901XSObWvTVMrgW9dT37STpiB1Oyrmmc9g5qN0EdV_54VYTba3ro2qFPojjhFqTcthoJaVmjSDrS9oPv5OPZSEX3tOV9gOmtQrDUsqWmfrG5MjkmPYZon97u0EmRwwEked02ZEsxxQCzBQzv0qmRjCTt0ydHLpJdgKZ1LBuTH0HAx8glx2ivT9fymr-pZg6gXM-eCj0gFey_rIydcINHwCmWCiWm8hk_xk-3v9YKCCZOn1uwV_G8cfIn575y_P5J8eMfEnAcYO7ggvE_zKqfbDbqw_BZ92xRswr-PCxXvny2a-D_BsAAP__w3G97A), offering health advice to keep your skin, nails, and hair healthy.
|
---
## American-Israeli Reunites With Family
After 584 harrowing days in Hamas captivity, Edan Alexander, 21, was freed Monday and reunited with his family in Tel Aviv in a tearful hospital rooftop embrace. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOGyEQhJ-G67BgwZxdUKS57k-b8rRnFh8JsBYQO_f20eUV0oxGGunTzPz4Wr8w5VSf37GQj8-4jshrpU_PNAa1FQuXvv9-bsy_-uBGHWtAUGoFBVeprlK7NWDKx2qn4CMRkJnI69nOFqxWt2n3xswaSFvQm73b-22-WX0zG0RlHOBGU_InTV2103dzVe6i7tvDOTLxYZ0BcMIqCmlwu_zkVMdOMR_8pnZ5cJmy38d4dWG-CVgELPV4cR9nJGA5wQIWdYoGAcuHWw7ynChgoYBVYqY_WAM1uXMOXVLhkbhilg_MWX7S2GXhIg-kfBqqo0uMg5pslAk7ydi4yB0LntCp-fD6pJxTd7Ow6lkw5X9Nx39f_PbwNwAA__-_MpBy). Edan, a New Jersey native who moved to Israel at 18, was just 19 and serving in the Israel Defense Forces when he was captured during Hamas' Oct. 7, 2023, attack. His mother, Yael, wept with joy as they spoke for the first time since his capture, while his father, Adi, recalled their [desperate efforts to bring him home](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAUBOCnwR0WHDDeLSgiRe42TRSltI7NwSaLjQXs39tHvq9w65FG883f23jDEMO-_MKNrF_8WH0ad3qVSLVSHnFLW1kfy5TSvdSUqeDuEIQYQUDHRcelGR2G-Bl146wnAlINWdnrXoOW4tKsFqWnaeon6oW-KhRoOucvpuukl2Am3QR7tolOGnlVnTCtuE6zMaT8rI0CMEwLcqGm3P5LYa8r-fhJT8rtnLYm2rXWozD1g8HAYMBpPgXtks6YwfDnN4PBZyLHH4WvqVRciJPDnWOkN-6OcuEHZtpr4eUgvHN6z_FRwpMYDCf8w9QQHFM_Jcje9FLIJlt3vEKMoZieabFsGOLXoPrtJ58W_gcAAP__9GaIfA)--"knocking on every door, on the president's door, the previous one, this one," until it worked. Now recovering from months of torture, malnutrition, and isolation, Edan shared [his first Instagram post](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2y2yAQhZ8GdXhgkbBVUKRR57QpNSuxSCT8eADb8dvf4b7Cbb5md7455_y5r3f0wafjN0Yy7nBrc3lN9K6BWqOyYsyxns9jy_lfbblQxWQRhFhBwMTFxKVeLfrwWcfBGkcEpAYy8jpeRxiluA2n2fS8bXDbpRXzPqv9tqOSm1SzQmvdPA3edJuYpJazmoS-iHnbtSbl9lErAM1GQda3XC5_s0_tJBc--UXlsuc4BHO29qhM_WKwMFjS55Fr6ycGSxczWESH7HhW3vsxWFwhsvzMteFBnCwmjoH-Y7JUeFdUXt9EjfvUXwpGHqlWPIjBMhRjH28fgq_6ykZxRPThO0778Y4vA18BAAD__1bwh8M), smiling with a beer in hand, captioned _" Home Sweet Home."_
## After Transplant, Mother and Daughter Graduate
In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, mother Nija Butler and daughter Ambrealle Brown achieved a powerful milestone together--[graduating from nursing school](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OnjAQxJ8GOqPFGJMrKNLQXdqUyB9e_8nZ3pO9gL63j8grpBlN8dPMaH5_7p8mplj8L5Nxdd7t7GgveLeEzFh3kym3cPoX0VdjqthMsUYC7BLkLGAWo96tiem9q96uDlHi1OM6LmpRUo3wow_rcUg1O6nnaQF4OQTrABapYMIFrJv7uD5pMI96_Jhm0AN8vA6tcXKH0pOUulOANjLV4Q_FwgFdetOFdTgo92kNzN-tm352cuvkdt_3QBU9lRQvfJBObgFN4tDJ7Wnq5AaPZOKAVVhz-sCPOUn4auxpGEU5a4vFi3YEoiSMe4hMWVgqhtGKr2gLvgWTaOZCEbAOgXPq62q_75hSbHrpFPhsYvo3lP_74WuVfwMAAP__OxySVg) after Nija donated a kidney to save her daughter's life. Ambrealle had [struggled with kidney disease for years](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2upCAUhJ8Gd3TwiPR1wWI27u5sZ2loOSAjPx04avrtJ84r3E2lki_5Uqk_38u3CTFk_9sk1M67hVxZMl4tIhHWxaSS2nb4Vyl7o1KxmWwNCLGAgJGLkfdqsSbEzyI7qx0i4NCh7p_yKUH24qvbtHUAoldGDtCDG-24Kqvk12sa5CQnEF3Qt02MveqnYRTqIabXqhQObpVqAFBMCrSBSn38LSHThi5-yon1sZbURb0RvRsbfjGYGczXdT32nc4bMphvNYNZyLvf0Tbk3pzIE_IYHHK6woo8lcStOfxGWLmvxh6GkOejtpA9b-tWSuTG3XQPNuOHUzW5vaPJxGDuqrbvK8QYmnoyKXwyIf7fRz8-9tTwLwAA__917o01), facing organ failure before her mother donated a kidney in Louisiana's first robotic kidney transplant procedure. The surgery gave Ambrealle a second chance and allowed both women to pursue their nursing dreams. In April, they graduated from the Baton Rouge General School of Nursing, with Brown starting in a burn unit, and Nija continuing her work in psychiatry.
## Zookeeper Raises Baby Gorillas
Alan Toyne, a former zookeeper at Bristol Zoo, has released a new memoir, _Gorillas in Our Midst_ , sharing the extraordinary story of how he became a stand-in dad to two baby gorillas rejected by their mothers. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMiPTNoYJCC4h20svRG3chr419sj2Lpr5-hP3CxtVUirVe38-1g_kwHH_jSfNfvdr9WmNdJVAtVJe8UxnOb52m9JnqSlTwegQpFxBwiDkIHqzOuTwWnXrZk8EpFqa-1GPGnQvp_aYNQ7owQKh26TXzjhNEyHah7Nqcq7l-V6TQ2_6hxqk6eTDbsaQ8ps2CsA0WpLjmnL3N3GsB_nwSt-Uuy2dbZiPWp-lUb8aWBpYruvqNq78plgz269Id62B5ea6AyuniKGB5Z3SJ9GTsjgwOpGRCxVh0b7EnjKHgEVwFJHINbBgrrwFWrVH65REQVoZMVjnxYSbF3Y0MJl-gFFhd9QztHl2z4tD4GLGRsv9RA7_P9cfy_6e4V8AAAD__41LlgY). After complications during birth left the infants in need of care, Alan brought them into his home, feeding them, teaching them to climb, and even eating dinner side by side. The hands-on approach was a first in the U.K., helping the young gorillas grow up among their kind with the social skills they needed to thrive. clean_body: After 584 harrowing days in Hamas captivity, Edan Alexander, 21, was freed Monday and reunited with his family in Tel Aviv in a tearful hospital rooftop embrace. . | | | | | | Friday, May 16, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! What does home mean to you? For 21-year-old , after 584 days in Hamas captivity, it's more than just a place--it's a heartbeat, his mother's voice, and a long-awaited hug. This week, he finally made it home, collapsing into his family's arms on a Tel Aviv rooftop. Read more below. This afternoon, we're sponsored by , offering health advice to keep your skin, nails, and hair healthy. | American-Israeli Reunites With Family After 584 harrowing days in Hamas captivity, Edan Alexander, 21, was freed Monday and reunited with his family in Tel Aviv in a tearful hospital rooftop embrace. . Edan, a New Jersey native who moved to Israel at 18, was just 19 and serving in the Israel Defense Forces when he was captured during Hamas' Oct. 7, 2023, attack. His mother, Yael, wept with joy as they spoke for the first time since his capture, while his father, Adi, recalled their --"knocking on every door, on the president's door, the previous one, this one," until it worked. Now recovering from months of torture, malnutrition, and isolation, Edan shared , smiling with a beer in hand, captioned " Home Sweet Home." After Transplant, Mother and Daughter Graduate In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, mother Nija Butler and daughter Ambrealle Brown achieved a powerful milestone together-- after Nija donated a kidney to save her daughter's life. Ambrealle had , facing organ failure before her mother donated a kidney in Louisiana's first robotic kidney transplant procedure. The surgery gave Ambrealle a second chance and allowed both women to pursue their nursing dreams. In April, they graduated from the Baton Rouge General School of Nursing, with Brown starting in a burn unit, and Nija continuing her work in psychiatry. Zookeeper Raises Baby Gorillas Alan Toyne, a former zookeeper at Bristol Zoo, has released a new memoir, Gorillas in Our Midst , sharing the extraordinary story of how he became a stand-in dad to two baby gorillas rejected by their mothers. . After complications during birth left the infants in need of care, Alan brought them into his home, feeding them, teaching them to climb, and even eating dinner side by side. The hands-on approach was a first in the U.K., helping the young gorillas grow up among their kind with the social skills they needed to thrive. During their chat, she shared that she was a single mom raising a 3-year-old daughter and hoped to one day return to school to become a nurse. name: With Honor Action
subject: Join us at the AI+ Expo & Save AmeriCorps District Days 📆
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e7c0b816852d/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14052752?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=9e07fdf132&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=dc655e28df&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Friends,

As we let you know a few weeks ago, With Honor Action is excited to be a part of the Special Competitive Studies Project's AI+ Expo in Washington, D.C. Last year, the event brought together over 10,000 attendees, 150 exhibitors of cutting-edge AI-driven technology, and 440 speakers over two days.

The event this year promises to be even larger, and we hope that you'll join us for our first announced speaking engagement: "Beyond the Battlefield - The Veterans Shaping National Security Policy," which will feature our Vice President of Government Affairs, Sean McClintock. The fireside chat is currently scheduled for Wednesday morning, June 4th. Stay tuned for more announcements in the coming weeks!
---
| [Register Here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=7c6b939a28&e=33f53a5b1a "Register Here")
---
|
---
|
---
| **Save AmeriCorps District Days with Voices for National Service**
---
| Over the past few weeks, the cuts to AmeriCorps have been felt in communities all across America. More than 40% of AmeriCorps grants have been terminated, all of the over 2,000 AmeriCorps NCCC/FEMA Corps members have been demobilized, and nearly 85% of AmeriCorps' agency staff have been laid off.

But the response, from people in local communities to lawmakers in Washington D.C., has been overwhelming and bipartisan. And now, we want to help make your voices heard directly with our friends at [Voices for National Service](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=3b3931cf0b&e=33f53a5b1a).

**From June 2nd through 6th, we are asking you to organize local office meetings or site visits with your lawmakers' local staff.**

These meetings will be an opportunity for you to speak directly with District or State Directors who are high-level Congressional staff and advisors to lawmakers, and help them understand what cuts to AmeriCorps look like in your community.

Visit [this page](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=ec03e961c2&e=33f53a5b1a) for more information on how to get involved. If you are ready to schedule a district meeting, please fill out [this form](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=1de85b1d89&e=33f53a5b1a) so that Voices for National Service can share resources to make the most of your meeting.
---
|
---
|
---
| **This Memorial Day, #TogetherWeServe**
---
| In the days leading up to Memorial Day, the veteran Members of Congress from the For Country Caucus and With Honor Action will come together to clean the Vietnam Veterans Memorial Wall. Joined by others who have pledged to serve with integrity, civility, and courage, these leaders cross the aisle in the spirit of unity, as they always have, to honor those who made the ultimate sacrifice. Together, we serve — an enduring philosophy for With Honor Action and the For Country Caucus.

With Honor Action has put together a [social media toolkit](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=eebabf9f02&e=33f53a5b1a) that you can use to share this moment of reflection with us in a small but meaningful way.
---
|
---
| **ICYMI: With Honor Action & the For Country Caucus in the News**
---
| 📜 [The For Country Caucus endorses 16 With Honor Action priorities](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=7550d6482d&e=33f53a5b1a) for the National Defense Authorization Act, including efforts to modernize defense acquisition and rebuild America's shipbuilding capacity.

🇺🇸 🇬🇧 For Country Caucus Co-Chair Rep. Don Davis and caucus member Rep. Patrick Harrigan [speak to CNN from the London Defense Conference](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=3320265fcc&e=33f53a5b1a).

💬 [With Honor Action Senior Vice President Allan Filip's interview with Great Britain News](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=4d8e66624c&e=33f53a5b1a) and the role of bipartisan, veteran leadership in today's world.
---

and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.

subject: this ain’t a typo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I hope that’s a good thing.
| |
---
| | | Folks - it's John Kennedy.

---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fe1ac4722680489c9b2f1221fc4a4156&_e=e1FXdgDxaVG_idph_jRHveBBbHaW08VlcOO9eEOTsPeu_8A8NmGSdx98g3wacHcgzjBUC9p1oaSOEpDI3pRbAiYMa2Sgsr8jPgENP1d-ZGrarHmIQ03x8Zm5Xllpb3IJOpQpuJE42nHSNOfJyC3yrC6TPYXgNMBKOFQopU6MM07eC-IlSw2epm2gO6GwfyqL37N7235ra4meVCJTxxPsPTD8rZWVbEidJUjNS2uoAxyxG9lmJL-D3BS_1y3TaYgqdHRJ7JhGCBPIZPLIHPJBdwaabHOURYvqMSsoKYYTFqbCFmUNS3EYGVeYYu1BYEc9gJ4jivr7011EjNkX3kfcCCGymtHVvNHEO1ClBj3zRlMniZHJJ_sI0znHvrR2Hecx "John Kennedy")
---

I'm told my reputation precedes me.

I hope that's a good thing.

I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.

So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.

My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.

That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!

_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal._

It'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. _**[We've only got DAYS 'til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fe1ac4722680489c9b2f1221fc4a4156&_e=e1FXdgDxaVG_idph_jRHveBBbHaW08VlcOO9eEOTsPeu_8A8NmGSdx98g3wacHcgzjBUC9p1oaSOEpDI3pRbAiYMa2Sgsr8jPgENP1d-ZGrarHmIQ03x8Zm5Xllpb3IJOpQpuJE42nHSNOfJyC3yrC6TPYXgNMBKOFQopU6MM07eC-IlSw2epm2gO6GwfyqL37N7235ra4meVCJTxxPsPTD8rZWVbEidJUjNS2uoAxzJgWlQdlrz_wXHtK15L-_zVSiuOXzC67yubHU8yeCjr-p-XrISf6f2KxIxepPYteV6_0qlLePNZQX7BWsmwD5DWh8iiSwee8ZY15DeTCglcDXdmqYkDRQerJjkf4a5rKxxviBjPgnaShHJ0zzlNoE7 "We’ve only got DAYS ‘til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?")**_

# **Both Sides, Book Deals, and Bullsh*t: The Jake Tapper Story**
Jake Tapper and those like him are a cancer on our democracy. The worst predictions of the film _Network_ come to life. The Ronan the Destroyers of free, fair & honest distribution of information, vital to the survival of any democratic republic.
You're likely being inundated by Tapper & Friends right now, with robo-regurgitated pablum and other hysterical wagon circle-jerking. I.e. [Tapper's corporate-media pals ](https://substack.com/redirect/013df690-f83f-469e-a262-f3ae351270a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)telling us _we must_ snort his sensationalistic, bank-account padding opus on Joe Biden's *cognitive challenges* before he dropped out of the presidential race. No, I won't link to it, or bother sharing its name.
You see, this is what happens when a member of the Big Six--_yes only six_ --[monopoly- media conglomerates](https://substack.com/redirect/c5fa4bf3-a645-4b92-a0d4-816aed85f856?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that control ~90% of what you see, hear, read or play, has one of it's *stars* write a book _of no actual news value_. One that won't solve any challenge or expose any crisis. You will, however, get the usual suspects tweeting out "OMG must read" (thanks, but I decided the _Twilight_ series wasn't for me) missives that've waded through more horseshit than RFK Jr's grandkids on a picnic in Rock Creek Park.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99d43e1d-2caf-485e-bf63-720512fe366a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's get this outta the way: I proudly wrote ads for then-candidate Biden in 2020, as we defeated the feral quadruped occupying the Oval Office. I didn't work for him after. While I think he was one of the three or four most consequential domestic policy Presidents of the past 125 yrs, passing an amazing array of legislation with small majorities as mouth-breathing MAGA Morlocks were perpetually on the prowl. Yet, if you think this is about my past work for Biden: I didn't think, at the time, he should run for reelection due to age and actuarial charts (science, if you will).
So, no, this has zero to do with my work for Biden, or feelings about his presidency. It's about Jake Tapper writing _this tome, at this moment_ , _on the cognitive state of a guy_ _who isn 't fucking President, _while [we deal with a maniacal-numbnuts president who says he needn't follow the Constitution](https://substack.com/redirect/c38d0b89-948c-4e91-af2f-f1cae860fd05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Trump's saddled us with a self-inflicted recession via DOGE, deportation and illegal tariffs, cruelly ignored the plight of Kilmar Abrego Garcia and is clearly just an ornament on Putin's Christmas tree. But, sure, write a book about the former guy! How courageous, Jake! [[See, Real Thing](https://substack.com/redirect/44eb9968-f396-4c5b-b75b-ece349ff10d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)]
As for "cognitive issues," funny Tapper has nothing to say about a pathological weirdo obsessed with sharks, batteries & toilet-flushing, who thought he was running against Obama (said publicly more than once) and thought Nikki Haley ran security at the Capitol Jan 6th. **A convicted felon. An adjudicated rapist.** He would've gone to trial for stealing state secrets and storing them in the same Mar-a-lago room where Jake's book belongs.**** Nope. No book on that guy.
All's well in corporate-media land. They're going to Disney! (part of one of the six conglomerates who control our information! Soon, Space Mountain will give you ear buds that repeat the message that space travel was invented by Elon and mountains are for mountain-top mining as you're on the ride).
Tapper is, in fact, what happens when you blend smug self-satisfaction and boundless ambition with corporate cowardice and slap a CNN logo on it. He struts around like he's play-acting reincarnated Edward R. Murrow, but let's be honest, some mix of Charlie Chaplin and Father Coughlin would be more to the point. The guy didn't just sell out; he held a clearance sale on integrity.
Tapper was once..not this. He did press for a Democratic Congresswoman. I know his past, via friends, even met him back in the day when I lived in DC. He was a 20-something writer for Salon, but oh man did he want tv-career fame and status. So he left for VH-1, made his way to ABC and CNN. When President Obama called Fox propaganda, and tried to shut down its reporters to protect democracy against disinformation, there was Tapper, to belch out Fox-obsequious disapproval that Obama dare do this to "their sister station." [Insert Barf Emoji]
More recently, in 2024, there was his Trump/Biden debate-moderating fiasco where Tapper refused to fact check Trump's machine-gun lying. [David Shuster, in our conversation about this on our livestream](https://substack.com/redirect/b310ba43-a663-411e-8db6-fd8a928939a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), let us in on the fact that Tapper wanted to fact check. But CNN said no. So instead of walking away, like someone with any honesty would do--see Shuster or Jim Acosta--Tapper said, "ok."
I imagine it went like this:
**Jake:** I'd like to fact check at the Trump/Biden debate **CNN Corporate:** No **Jake:** ) No problem! Can I still moderate, pretty please? My speaking fees and book advances depend on it! First Amendment, First Schma-mendment, right!?
Tapper couldn't be more emblematic of why you should support indy media and kick the monopoly-media habit. While Jake's blaming Biden for Trump being president, he should try a mirror. Nobody wants Jake to be "liberal" or a "Democrat." Just to be faithful to his role under the Constitution to inform the public. To tell the GD truth--instead of harping on a past president to give Chris Cillizza a stiffy.
If Tapper spent half as much time investigating Trump's ongoing coup as he did the mental acuity of a former POTUS, we might have a functioning press. But that's not the game, is it? Brand building! Access! Selling books to the same Beltway cocktail crowd that's been asleep at the wheel for a decade as a fascist pathogen spread right under their inebriated noses. **Tapper isn 't informing the public--he's laundering mediocrity for elite approval and bank.**
And don't forget--Tapper isn't just a symptom, but a willing participant in the rot. The dunderheaded Biden book? It's not journalism, it's PR for authoritarianism. While our country--his country--teeters on the edge, he's polishing his 30 pieces of silver and angling for his next book deal, all while pretending to be "fair" and "balanced." Spare me. Tapper's not holding the line in the battle against autocracy.
Unless, of course, it's the Maginot Line.
