# Scott Jennings EXPOSES CNN hypocrites who don't want South African refugees to come to U.S.
Scott Jennings **[called out Democrat CNN panelists](https://substack.com/redirect/b3566f82-3352-4e05-a70b-fff9ba06f7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for opposing the Trump Administration giving 59 South Africans refugee status in the U.S. as they flee a black nationalist dictatorship consuming their homeland.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b3566f82-3352-4e05-a70b-fff9ba06f7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b3566f82-3352-4e05-a70b-fff9ba06f7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Why are Afrikaners being allowed in who are white?" CNN's Ashley Allison asked, parading on the falsehood that the Trump administration is racist, especially in relation to its crackdown on the southern border immigration crisis.
Scott Jennings, former George W. Bush special assistant and conservative commentator, refused to play CNN's game.
"We're talking about fifty-something people, and the people who are angriest about this today **[had NO problems with twenty million coming here.](https://substack.com/redirect/b3566f82-3352-4e05-a70b-fff9ba06f7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Some of the worst people in world coming here," Jennings said.
"They reformed their constitution under the great leader of Nelson Mandela. That allowed for a racial reconciliation, one that this country has yet to do," Allison returned.
Allison, vehemently against the South African arrival, then completely shifted, catching herself in her own hypocritical web.
"They are being given special treatment when there is not a genocide happening in South Africa and they just don't like the law of the land!"
**["If the Afrikaners don't actually like the land, they can leave that country!"](https://substack.com/redirect/b3566f82-3352-4e05-a70b-fff9ba06f7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Jennings fired back.
"They are! They're leaving. They're coming here."
**[Watch the CNN spat here:](https://substack.com/redirect/b3566f82-3352-4e05-a70b-fff9ba06f7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b3566f82-3352-4e05-a70b-fff9ba06f7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The Politico journalist continued to insist that Abrego Garcia did not receive due process before being deported to El Salvador. "I think that transparency as to why that designation is given to a certain person is important," she argued. "The letters 'MS13' on their knuckles doesn't help?" Gorka asked sarcastically. This is why you are fake news and gutter press!" Watch the explosive interview here: | | POLL Is Politico a trustworthy news source? | ? ? ? A Message from Dr. Ron Paul... " Do This ONE THING Before July's Rio Reset!" | | ---|---|--- In July, the BRICS nations will meet in Rio de Janeiro to unveil their most ambitious plan yet: To create an alternative to the dollar-based financial system that has dominated global trade for 80 years. People are calling this financial revolution the "Rio Reset." Hi, I'm Dr. Ron Paul. For decades, I've warned about the consequences of unrestrained money printing. Now, the worst-case scenario is unfolding before our eyes. Why Is This Important For Americans? When the dollar loses global demand, its decline directly affects: Bank accounts and cash savings Most IRAs and 401(k)s Social Security benefits Pensions and fixed income investments The signs of this coming shift are already visible. Central banks worldwide are buying more gold than ever. If they're preparing, don't you think you should too? The Wealth Diversification Plan Americans Need Now Throughout my career, I have advocated for gold. And now, more than ever, I urge you to consider gold - before the Rio Reset in July. My trusted friends at Birch Gold Group can help you move your IRA or 401(k) into a Gold IRA with no taxes or penalties. The Rio Reset represents a pivotal moment for the global financial order, and I want as many Americans as possible to be prepared. Take action now, before July's Rio Reset! Scott Jennings EXPOSES CNN hypocrites who don't want South African refugees to come to U.S. Scott Jennings for opposing the Trump Administration giving 59 South Africans refugee status in the U.S. as they flee a black nationalist dictatorship consuming their homeland. "Why are Afrikaners being allowed in who are white?" CNN's Ashley Allison asked, parading on the falsehood that the Trump administration is racist, especially in relation to its crackdown on the southern border immigration crisis. Scott Jennings, former George W. Bush special assistant and conservative commentator, refused to play CNN's game. "We're talking about fifty-something people, and the people who are angriest about this today Some of the worst people in world coming here," Jennings said. "They reformed their constitution under the great leader of Nelson Mandela. That allowed for a racial reconciliation, one that this country has yet to do," Allison returned. Allison, vehemently against the South African arrival, then completely shifted, catching herself in her own hypocritical web. "They are being given special treatment when there is not a genocide happening in South Africa and they just don't like the law of the land!" Jennings fired back. "They are! They're leaving. They're coming here." | | POLL Should the U.S. accept the South African refugees? | ? ? ? * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. **➤➤ BREAKING: Lawsuit Exposes MAGA’s Voter Suppression Machine** friend, in a moment, we’re going to ask you to chip in [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107840188/545994855/-209663064?refcode=em-5.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjQ0MWExYy1hMTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_7ACYHTLelwFESoC8OUXV-rnYDWfpwwrm1r6PY06hc=), but first let us explain why your support is so important: A new lawsuit is pulling back the curtain on just how far MAGA operatives are willing to go to suppress the vote, **and the evidence is disturbing.** This case, brought by voting rights groups, reveals a coordinated effort to challenge _thousands_ of legal voter registrations based on nothing but bad data and partisan intent. **The goal is clear:** create confusion, cast doubt, and throw up roadblocks for everyday Americans trying to exercise their fundamental right to vote. A recent example? The North Carolina State Supreme Court election, where Allison Riggs just won her seat by just 734 votes after a **6-month legal battle.** Through the courts, Jefferson Griffin tried to overturn his loss by challenging over 65,000 votes — including those cast by his opponent’s parents. **They tried to change the rules of the game after it had already been played.** We’ve already seen this play out in places like North Carolina, where new voter suppression laws — including voter ID and restrictions on mail voting — were greenlit by a far-right state Supreme Court after conservatives flipped the bench. Those laws are now being challenged in court, but let’s be honest: _the outcome could hinge on who’s wearing the robe._ And there’s more on the horizon. North Carolina’s Supreme Court race in 2026 could determine whether extremist lawmakers are held in check or given a blank check to pass even more anti-voter laws. Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard. They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress. We CANNOT let them get away with it! Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [] Thanks for taking action, Team RTP [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. name: Sandra Bishop
subject: Enough is enough!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Emerge women are on the frontlines fighting back, speaking truth to power, and protecting our most vulnerable communities.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107840847/545997018/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyYTM4NDUxLWEzMzItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2N91SOV_-RLiF36HR0mhHX_J935vrqdL78uRW8dDfG0=)
---
| Peter,

Instead of addressing the real challenges facing our nation, the House Oversight Subcommittee on Government Operations and Efficiency (DOGE) held a hearing on transgender participation in school sports.

This hearing wasn’t about government oversight. **It wasn’t about government efficiency. It was about using transgender people’s lives as a political weapon.**

Emerge alum **Rep. Melanie Stansbury** called out the GOP’s political stunt and forced a vote to adjourn the hearing after questioning why the committee tasked with investigating government inefficiencies was being used to attack a marginalized community. This is what true leadership looks like!
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107840848/545997019/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyYTM4NDUxLWEzMzItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2N91SOV_-RLiF36HR0mhHX_J935vrqdL78uRW8dDfG0=)
As Republicans continue to attack transgender people across the country, we need more voices willing to stand up and say: _enough is enough!_ Emerge women are on the frontlines fighting back, speaking truth to power, and protecting our most vulnerable communities.

Together, we can change the face of power and build a government that truly represents us. clean_body: Emerge women are on the frontlines fighting back, speaking truth to power, and protecting our most vulnerable communities. | = | Peter, Instead of addressing the real challenges facing our nation, the House Oversight Subcommittee on Government Operations and Efficiency (DOGE) held a hearing on transgender participation in school sports. This hearing wasn’t about government oversight. It wasn’t about government efficiency. It was about using transgender people’s lives as a political weapon. Emerge alum Rep. Melanie Stansbury called out the GOP’s political stunt and forced a vote to adjourn the hearing after questioning why the committee tasked with investigating government inefficiencies was being used to attack a marginalized community. This is what true leadership looks like! = As Republicans continue to attack transgender people across the country, we need more voices willing to stand up and say: enough is enough! Emerge women are on the frontlines fighting back, speaking truth to power, and protecting our most vulnerable communities. Together, we can change the face of power and build a government that truly represents us. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 1001 Connecticut Ave NW Washington, DC 20036 United States | = =

State legislative races are historically underfunded and overlooked, but grassroots Democrats like you have helped bridge the gap year after year. Can we count on you? | | |
---
| |
---|---
Our emails aren’t random; they’re intentional and meant for you. Here’s why we’re reaching out:
* You’ve been a member of this people-powered movement since **2022** , giving our party the vital grassroots support it needs to elect state Dems nationwide. With a powerful team of online partners, we can give our candidates the resources they need to win even the most competitive races.
* State legislative races are historically underfunded and overlooked, but grassroots Democrats like you have helped bridge the gap and even level the playing field. You, among over a million online supporters, have given us the resources we need to invest in competitive chambers early and often to defeat extreme Republicans.
* State legislative results impact us all. State legislators make key decisions on abortion rights, gun safety, LGBTQ+ rights, and even when and how you vote. These decisions must be made by Democrats who will work to preserve our fundamental freedoms.

[We all have a role to play in this movement. Friend,

As of 05/16/2025, we’ve attempted to contact you **TWICE** about your appointment to our House Advisor Committee.

To be honest, we’re concerned. It’s incredibly urgent we start putting together our 2025 House Majority Strategy and figure out how to rebuild after the 2024 Elections.

This gives us hope: The GOP only has a 5-seat majority — the narrowest majority in nearly 100 years. If we start working together now, we have a real chance to take back the House.

But first, we need survey responses from **real Democrats** like you. This data is critical to formulating an effective plan.

**[Please help fill out data for your city. Complete the 3-minute survey right now to help write our 2026 House Strategy.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61183?t=7&akid=23065%2E4449941%2EkEDeXH)**

Our data for your city is incomplete so I’m asking once again. Can you take 3 minutes to help us formulate our 2026 House Strategy?

Fight for Reform

[**I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying entirely on people like you to power this campaign. It's Raul. Donald Trump promised he wouldn't cut Medicaid. That was February. Now, just a few months later, he’s throwing his support behind a House Republican budget blueprint that would _slash_ Medicaid by **$800 billion over the next decade.** This is not what Donald Trump ran on. This is not what he promised the American people. During the 2024 presidential campaign, he said he’d fight for working families — but at this moment, Donald Trump is siding with billionaires and his extremist allies to gut the lifelines millions of Americans rely on to stay healthy, safe, and secure. America was duped — **but it’s not too late to change course.** We have a real chance to stop Trump’s destructive agenda by flipping the House in 2026. Districts like CA-25 will decide the balance of power, and we can’t afford to fall short. [Will you chip in $10 before Sunday at midnight? The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Raul. Donald Trump promised he wouldn't cut Medicaid. That was February. Now, just a few months later, he’s throwing his support behind a House Republican budget blueprint that would slash Medicaid by $800 billion over the next decade. This is not what Donald Trump ran on. This is not what he promised the American people. During the 2024 presidential campaign, he said he’d fight for working families — but at this moment, Donald Trump is siding with billionaires and his extremist allies to gut the lifelines millions of Americans rely on to stay healthy, safe, and secure. America was duped — but it’s not too late to change course. We have a real chance to stop Trump’s destructive agenda by flipping the House in 2026. Districts like CA-25 will decide the balance of power, and we can’t afford to fall short. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being in this fight with us, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. 72 million Americans rely on Social Security to make ends meet.

This includes seniors, veterans and people with disabilities.

Now, unelected billionaire Elon Musk and wannabe dictator Donald Trump are gambling with their lives and attempting to gut Social Security to provide massive tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans.

Meanwhile, Democrats are fighting to expand it — by increasing annual benefits by $2,400 and ensuring it’s funded through 2096!

PLEASE RESPOND TO OUR LIVE POLL BY 11:59 P.M.: | | | | | | | | 72 million Americans rely on Social Security to make ends meet. This includes seniors, veterans and people with disabilities. Now, unelected billionaire Elon Musk and wannabe dictator Donald Trump are gambling with their lives and attempting to gut Social Security to provide massive tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans. Meanwhile, Democrats are fighting to expand it — by increasing annual benefits by $2,400 and ensuring it’s funded through 2096! | | | | | | | | Thanks for your input, Team Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: ICYMI on Newsmax: "Bobby Jindal On Newsmax: "Big companies profit when people stay sick—it doesn’t have to be that way"
body:
| | | [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1b368066b4c142a5aa768b1b96ab4ea4&_e=UheNMkXhVHjMK9jtNcZ2Ox8a2uu-fColpULdpTuPSzT2Ej7si7arpyc3owvAXBzXIxt0fJSdkRhOr_KcaEtE0G8PBZKrgNNiIbRxjbgVW5qwQFMwCCO2zWbLCvqv3ep1A1EkCu_4WEu0eqYYYgQzofmquYlJD_KHtw6hWI6FwMQ13kU0FbtZQV06vPXZnX6uN4UJ-GwIXJLv4D1r646PTg%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
Friends,
---
What a difference a change in leadership can make! The Trump Administration trusts the American people, wants transparency in healthcare, and knows we can make our own decisions working with our doctors. But they’re being fought at every turn—a lot of people are making a lot of money off the status quo.

I joined Newsmax to talk about the courage of President Trump and Secretary Kennedy as they stand up against crony capitalism, against big business, and against big pharma—and stand up for American patients! _**WATCH THE VIDEO⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1b368066b4c142a5aa768b1b96ab4ea4&_e=UheNMkXhVHjMK9jtNcZ2O6gQ9i55d46ovn6o8kC8e4_D7YmOYkcCFHm4Y0pyYR3-lIbhR0mNqjgoxtG4FfbeOElebSpnEuh8SJXXVrFa0lvKg0WDeaHn7Hsscmp7dYpkLTz6yhaKW21MvLbz6xAuwwVb8hSsC3dONVyzcs6nfMoH4cGZJwtzg-mm0sOENvPr54t2hH-SEpcnDQnBjHClJmNLf1ooXqgIGtaSOlILFrw%3D "Bobby Jindal On Newsmax: ")
Here's a great quote from the interview: _"I think it’s phenomenal that we’ve got a president and a health secretary saying, 'Why not prevent disease? Why not promote wellness? Why not promote healthier children, a healthier population?'

It’s good for healthcare outcomes. It’s good for our quality of life. But it’s also good for our economy and national security."_
---
God Bless, Bobby
---
|

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Our new reality
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| MAGA is committed to eliminating Democratic seats in Congress so Trump can continue his “revolution” without domestic opposition.
Hey Derek, it’s Adam. My friend, Jon Ossoff, is running in a tough re-election campaign and needs our help. Read his note, and then **[chip in to support our campaigns today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250516_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=8587%2E5257348%2E_6L9y5)**

* * *
_Our new reality —_
From classrooms to boardrooms to local governments and the press, Americans now fear political retribution from their own government.
Think of the CEO who bends the knee after public threats of prosecution. Or the newspaper owner who decides it’s safer to bury editorial criticism of the President.
The President and his lieutenants relish the power of intimidation. _And they’re using it._
***
Before my election to represent Georgia in the U.S. Senate, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminds me of countries where dissent is silenced by intimidation.
_“We don’t want any trouble.” “We’re not sticking our necks out right now.” “We don’t need an investigation.”_
**These things should never be said in the United States.**
***
_Just consider this —_
The U.S. government — our government — is deploying masked federal agents to snatch and lock up foreign students _legally_ in the United States who dare disagree publicly with the President’s foreign policy.
This President is so weak, so fragile, and so cowardly that he cannot tolerate dissent, and uses force to suppress it.
Just think of the message that sends to the world.
Are we surprised tourists don’t want to come to America anymore?
Are we surprised the best and the brightest don’t want to study and start businesses here anymore?
***
Derek: only by regaining Congressional power can we reverse this.
Remember: in 2026, I’m the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won.
MAGA needs me defeated and gone.
**_Help me defeat them in a landslide. Help fight back._**
[**Please split $10 between my campaign and Adam Schiff today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250516_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=8587%2E5257348%2E_6L9y5)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Jon Ossoff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=abs-em-ossoff.X_jd0I&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250516_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=8587%2E5257348%2E_6L9y5)

This President is so weak, so fragile, and so cowardly that he cannot tolerate dissent, and uses force to suppress it. Just think of the message that sends to the world. Are we surprised tourists don’t want to come to America anymore? Are we surprised the best and the brightest don’t want to study and start businesses here anymore? Derek: only by regaining Congressional power can we reverse this. Remember: in 2026, I’m the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won. MAGA needs me defeated and gone. Help me defeat them in a landslide. Help fight back. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433**. body:

# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39732%2E3422442%2EkritA4)
Dear Derek,
Every few months, I like to call some Porter Supporters to say thanks. That’s because my campaign is truly grassroots funded, without contributions from corporations or lobbyists. **I can’t do this without you.**
Recently, we sent an email telling you that some of you would get a call if you chipped in. While I wish I could call all of you... here’s how a few of the calls went!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250516_2_ak?refcode=em20250516-39732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39732_3422442_kritA4&akid=39732%2E3422442%2EkritA4)
I love these calls because I get to hear directly from voters about the issues on their minds. The job of an elected official is to represent people, and you can’t do that if you aren’t listening to them.
**[Will you chip in to our campaign today? There’s always a chance you’ll get a thank you call from me!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250516_2_ak?refcode=em20250516-39732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39732_3422442_kritA4&akid=39732%2E3422442%2EkritA4)**
Keep your ringer on,
Katie

name: Ken Mitchell for Virginia
subject: Ken Mitchell is ready to lead—and fight for Virginia families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
body:
Ben Cline gave billionaires a $314,266 tax break. Ken’s fighting for you.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=599b8ea109&e=0fced71d8c)
| | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=08fa41e9b9&e=0fced71d8c)
| Ken Mitchell has spent his life serving others—24 years in the military, a small business owner, and an infrastructure expert delivering results across Virginia. Now he’s running for Congress to do what Ben Cline refuses to do: **fight for working families.** Cline and his MAGA allies just rolled out a budget that gives away **$7 trillion** to billionaires and big corporations—and **makes you pay for it.** Here’s what that means for our district:
---
|
---
| 🚨 **Medicaid coverage ripped from 188,992 Virginians** , including
— **88,441 children
** — **16,000 seniors

** 🚨 **Health insurance premiums up 64%** for ACA recipients
— That’s **$810/year more on average
** — Or **$12,417/year** more for a couple nearing retirement

🚨 **SNAP food assistance slashed for 89,000 people
** 🚨 **School lunch programs endangered for 451,117 children statewide
** 🚨 **Pell Grants at risk for 13,019 students** trying to afford college
🚨 **Nearly 11,000 federal workers in our district face layoffs** All while the richest 0.1% walk away with a **$314,266 annual tax cut**.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [DONATE NOW – STAND WITH KEN]](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=5de7f62f38&e=0fced71d8c)
---
| While Ben Cline votes to dismantle the very programs that keep families going, Ken Mitchell is focused on solutions:✔️ He’s helped deliver critical infrastructure projects across Virginia
✔️ He’s expanded broadband to underserved rural communities
✔️ He’s fought for working families because he _is_ oneKen Mitchell doesn’t answer to billionaires. He answers to the people of Virginia—and that’s exactly who he’ll serve in Congress.
---
|
---
| But we need to build a grassroots movement strong enough to go up against Cline’s MAGA donors and dark-money backers.👉 If you believe Virginians deserve health care, opportunity, and a representative who actually shows up for them, chip in now.
---
|
---
| [➡️ [DONATE – HELP KEN WIN VA-06]](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=666c16408e&e=0fced71d8c)
---
| The billionaires and Trump have Ben Cline. **Ken Mitchell has you.** Let’s win this—together.
---
| Ken Mitchell is ready to lead. Let’s give him the support to get it done.
**—Team Ken Mitchell**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The CBO estimates 13.7 million people will lose their health care if the GOP has their way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
The Congressional Budget Office (CBO), the nonpartisan budget office that provides budget and economic information to Congress, just released their report of the GOP budget plan.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107842368/546001686/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTVmNTA3Zi1hOTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lja7Z4v97CPEsR9AKYw5gc2weZkbF15vOjuVn6znd_A=&emci=345f40bc-9732-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fe5f507f-a932-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | The nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office (CBO) just released its report on the GOP budget plan to Congress. What they found is shocking, deep cuts to Americans' health care. **Here's what the CBO laid out: the GOP budget plan will knock**** _13.7 million_****people off health insurance rolls in exchange for huge tax giveaways to the wealthy.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107842369/546001696/-2122444374?refcode=2025-05-16-cuts&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fe5f507f-a932-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTVmNTA3Zi1hOTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lja7Z4v97CPEsR9AKYw5gc2weZkbF15vOjuVn6znd_A=) Don't buy the Republican spin. The disastrous budget resolution they're pushing would deliberately kick MILLIONS off of their Medicaid coverage — kids, seniors, folks in rural areas, people with disabilities. | I wanted to express my gratitude for your support of this campaign.

Over the past four months, we have seen a breakdown in the democratic institutions that keep seniors, working families, veterans, and many others secure.

Through all of that, I have committed myself to fighting back through legislation (introducing the CLEAR Act) and information (I’m the only representative from West Michigan hosting town halls right now).

[_**I’m working to maintain that momentum, but to do so, we need to keep our fundraising efforts strong. I’m hoping I can count on your support as we work to fight back and protect this district in 2026.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107842351/546001582/-57715865?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-05-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzVmNTA3Zi1hOTMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lIrDydxeQhBdXavfBTx4SNvIjjXmdEX4FqenUqho5LU=)

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: National Referendum on the Administrative State
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204obq7wmke9l1ja0667xspwmcmh3lyk9r2m3bb5m57v7cwj1ytc81p46wm7arux0vh0c28zhc17nitzjb5&__stmp=swdn9e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swdn9e&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja43dawk22rnwjgu5pqdhdupkg98chc7ac3rlgqi96iu7eagri2ojg2lh7vdf6cct03srzmugo3cg9j3wn76qq3hdbnjq2b568a57avwn3yfbtlz40wvw5x2jdxtsgy8rxdae960ofe1vj4aoj9j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swdn9e&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swdn9e&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swdn9e&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swdn9e&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja43dawk22rnwjgu5pqdhduq8tnakza2szmhb0evrvup23qe63bv4pvu1czt9e5eoj5es6cpilk26pykpsn210pysy4in1052lv026w6zvao0rag5ja6757oyahqja5edht1wbf07htd1y7lmxbf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swdn9e&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swdn9e&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Steve Roberts
subject: Republican Lawmakers Just Overrode the Will of the People
body:
| | | | Statement on the Repeal of Abortion Rights and Paid Sick Leave
---
| |
# **STEVE ROBERTS**
# **St. Louis**
---
Weekly Update - May 16, 2025
---
| |
---
**Republican Lawmakers Just Overrode the Will of the People** _Statement on Repeal of Abortion Rights and Paid Sick Leave_
Last November, Missourians made their voice clears at the ballot box. Nearly 52% of voters approved Amendment 3 to ensure women had control of their reproductive healthcare while over 57% supported Prop A and ensured workers earned paid sick leave for hours worked. These weren't narrow victories, nor were they confined to Democratic strongholds. Republican, Independent, and Democratic voters supported these measures because they believed in what they stood for.
Yet, this week, Missouri's Republican lawmakers repealed both initiatives without negotiation, compromise, or respect for the people's will.
Citizen-led ballot initiatives are a cornerstone of Missouri's democratic tradition. They give ordinary people the power to shape laws when the legislature refuses to act. But what happens when politicians decide the outcome doesn't suit their agendas? If they can overturn the results they don't like, we're no longer living in a government by the people--we're living under a government that answers only to itself.
This isn't a partisan issue. Many Republican-majority districts supported Amendment 3 and Prop A. The people spoke, and they were ignored.
To make matters worse, those same lawmakers also refused to vote on a $500 million budget bill that included critical funding for cancer research and housing assistance for homeless veterans. These issues transcend politics. They should be moral imperatives. Instead, they were treated as political collateral. At a time when trust in government is already fragile, these actions send a clear and disturbing message: Your vote doesn't matter unless it aligns with the priorities of those in power.
If a handful of elected officials can so easily discard the results of a democratic election, what are we left with? Who do they serve--party leaders and powerful organizations or the people of Missouri?
My democrat colleagues and I will continue to fight for the will of the people, even if our colleagues on the other side will not. Missouri voters will have the opportunity to **reject** the republicans' attempts to ban abortion when it appears on the ballot in November 2026. We will also fight to re-instate paid sick leave, whether through the legislature or the initiative petition process.
Missouri voters are smart. They understand what is best for themselves and will not be fooled by any attempts to undermine their will.

---
|
---
**About Steve Roberts**
Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities.

clean_body: | | | | Statement on the Repeal of Abortion Rights and Paid Sick Leave | | STEVE ROBERTS St. Louis Weekly Update - May 16, 2025 | | Republican Lawmakers Just Overrode the Will of the People Statement on Repeal of Abortion Rights and Paid Sick Leave Last November, Missourians made their voice clears at the ballot box. Nearly 52% of voters approved Amendment 3 to ensure women had control of their reproductive healthcare while over 57% supported Prop A and ensured workers earned paid sick leave for hours worked. These weren't narrow victories, nor were they confined to Democratic strongholds. Republican, Independent, and Democratic voters supported these measures because they believed in what they stood for. Yet, this week, Missouri's Republican lawmakers repealed both initiatives without negotiation, compromise, or respect for the people's will. Citizen-led ballot initiatives are a cornerstone of Missouri's democratic tradition. They give ordinary people the power to shape laws when the legislature refuses to act. But what happens when politicians decide the outcome doesn't suit their agendas? If they can overturn the results they don't like, we're no longer living in a government by the people--we're living under a government that answers only to itself. This isn't a partisan issue. Many Republican-majority districts supported Amendment 3 and Prop A. The people spoke, and they were ignored. To make matters worse, those same lawmakers also refused to vote on a $500 million budget bill that included critical funding for cancer research and housing assistance for homeless veterans. These issues transcend politics. They should be moral imperatives. Instead, they were treated as political collateral. At a time when trust in government is already fragile, these actions send a clear and disturbing message: Your vote doesn't matter unless it aligns with the priorities of those in power. If a handful of elected officials can so easily discard the results of a democratic election, what are we left with? Who do they serve--party leaders and powerful organizations or the people of Missouri? My democrat colleagues and I will continue to fight for the will of the people, even if our colleagues on the other side will not. Missouri voters will have the opportunity to reject the republicans' attempts to ban abortion when it appears on the ballot in November 2026. We will also fight to re-instate paid sick leave, whether through the legislature or the initiative petition process. Missouri voters are smart. They understand what is best for themselves and will not be fooled by any attempts to undermine their will. | About Steve Roberts Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities. | | Steve Roberts P.O. Box 771671, St. Louis, MO 63177

| | **Katie Britt: Not extending Trump tax cuts would cost Alabama families thousands more every year – ‘actual insanity’**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=bd70fbb5084f43ceb0fff1925e626cb0&_e=M4DOCuGhl8jv7Q9UVNL55O1aRvJaIlvMbDKV0nkkSau3KIOVgjXM2r2mLJA-W7dIi3YCAzkBMaLfIUJ-lJuvSEsugL8mfvv_dXx1fcF-i0edfCcZMRhNCbe0et9UtoSViCInzC-bNgdQR5B1WniBCT-Qt_viaA9ObQ3wOnI4xLj2i1AMEWoTRT4Riys_Fj-cm6o9tHyLhtc74RjEI_KqS-5OF9_MirC5_XU53kLX2YTxyUO0XVfcjYMZVlzf6U-jQcdF_ZkWWABukucirHJXYQm9LDJCQARsmwBFtuqAHc2HbD0INti5JAM4l8q3gVgzJb_0ZcsPVd3MQtidbM6AG0Utt25MEkLNjzK4j6BDA3s%3D)

As the ‘Big, Beautiful Bill’ continues to make its way through Congress, U.S. Senator Katie Britt believes one of the most important priorities needs to be extending President Trump’s tax cuts. “You’ll hear a lot about the extension of the TCJA, that’s the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, that’s Trump in his first term, which was passed in in 2017, obviously we’ll be working to extend those cuts,” Britt said. “If we don’t do that, that will ultimately be about a $4 trillion tax increase in 2026 on the American people. So we have to extend these.”
---

U.S. Senator Katie Britt, a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, joined a bipartisan group of lawmakers this week in introducing multiple Senate resolutions in recognition of National Police Week, held from May 12 to 17. These efforts aim to honor the nation’s law enforcement officers and promote increased support for their safety and well-being.

Senator Britt, along with Senator Bill Cassidy and 10 other Senate colleagues, introduced a bipartisan resolution recognizing law enforcement officers for their service and commitment to public safety. The resolution also calls for enhanced health and safety measures for those working in law enforcement.

Thursday at a U.S. Senate Appropriations Subcommittee on Transportation, Housing, and Urban Development hearing, U.S. Sen. Katie Britt urged U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy to consider several Alabama priorities, including widening Interstate 65.

Britt cited Trump's 2023 comments regarding the widening of I-65, Alabama's most prominent north-south corridor, which stretches from Interstate 10 in Mobile to the Alabama-Tennessee state line near Ardmore in Limestone County.

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Katie Britt: Not extending Trump tax cuts would cost Alabama families thousands more every year – ‘actual insanity’ As the ‘Big, Beautiful Bill’ continues to make its way through Congress, U.S. Senator Katie Britt believes one of the most important priorities needs to be extending President Trump’s tax cuts. “You’ll hear a lot about the extension of the TCJA, that’s the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, that’s Trump in his first term, which was passed in in 2017, obviously we’ll be working to extend those cuts,” Britt said. “If we don’t do that, that will ultimately be about a $4 trillion tax increase in 2026 on the American people. So we have to extend these.” | | Senator Katie Britt Joins Bipartisan Effort to Recognize Law Enforcement During National Police Week U.S. Senator Katie Britt, a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, joined a bipartisan group of lawmakers this week in introducing multiple Senate resolutions in recognition of National Police Week, held from May 12 to 17. These efforts aim to honor the nation’s law enforcement officers and promote increased support for their safety and well-being. Senator Britt, along with Senator Bill Cassidy and 10 other Senate colleagues, introduced a bipartisan resolution recognizing law enforcement officers for their service and commitment to public safety. The resolution also calls for enhanced health and safety measures for those working in law enforcement. | | Watch: Katie Britt makes pitch for Interstate 65 widening to U.S. Transportation Secretary Duffy Thursday at a U.S. Senate Appropriations Subcommittee on Transportation, Housing, and Urban Development hearing, U.S. Sen. Katie Britt urged U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy to consider several Alabama priorities, including widening Interstate 65. Britt cited Trump's 2023 comments regarding the widening of I-65, Alabama's most prominent north-south corridor, which stretches from Interstate 10 in Mobile to the Alabama-Tennessee state line near Ardmore in Limestone County. | | | | | | | | | | | Gulf of America Hat Celebrate conservative leadership and show your patriotism with this unique, high quality, Made-in-America hat. | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 By texting KATIE, you consent to join a recurring SMS/MMS text messaging program that will provide alerts, donation requests, updates, and other important information. name: Emily Randall
subject: I’m still in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107844052/546006001/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.05.16_PlannedParenthoodNWHW_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDcxYTQ3ZC1iMDMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G0MNe9P7xyS7ffx8Net0QOaySrlFKQKo91mEZrvclV8=&emci=7971a47d-b032-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8071a47d-b032-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) | Peter— This week is National Women’s Health Week, where we aim to highlight women’s health issues and acknowledge the work still ahead to ensure women everywhere have access to the care they need. This is especially meaningful to me. Before I ran for office, I worked for Planned Parenthood, traveling all over the country to raise funds to protect health care access for millions of Americans. I saw that in so many areas of this country, Planned Parenthood clinics are one of the only sources of affordable health care—and not just abortion care. They are a critical lifeline to poor people, queer and trans folks, communities of color, and those living in isolated rural communities. I also saw the unnecessary and cruel barriers to care in Republican-controlled states. In states that didn’t expand Medicaid, the need for affordable care at clinics was (and still is) overwhelming. While not lifting a finger to improve healthcare access, right-wing politicians used Planned Parenthood clinics and their staffs as scapegoats and political punching bags. Before the _Dobbs_ decision, when they couldn’t ban abortion outright, they piled regulation after regulation on clinics that made operating nearly impossible, forcing many to close. When Trump was elected in 2016, I couldn’t stop thinking about the real, terrifying impact that he would have—on _Roe v. Wade_ , on women’s rights and LGBTQ+ freedom, and on the people I’d met around the country seeking safe, affordable, lifesaving care. That’s when I decided to run for office in Washington state. I’m proud of all we achieved in Olympia to protect and expand access to reproductive health care, and now I’ve brought this fight to Congress with Trump in the White House once again. Our work is far from over. This week Republicans are barreling forward with a plan to gut Medicaid women’s health nationwide. But this week and every week, I remain committed to safeguarding women’s health and defending and expanding reproductive freedom for all—and I hope you’ll stand with me. —Emily [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107844053/546006002/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.05.16_PlannedParenthoodNWHW_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDcxYTQ3ZC1iMDMyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G0MNe9P7xyS7ffx8Net0QOaySrlFKQKo91mEZrvclV8=)

body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after...
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1TwjAQhn9NeqOTbNLUHnIAsTqiDsg4Dsd8NLSS0DYp7fDvHRC57j677zOv9J1r7FmgfIEA6sZEBIDoHAH0u8mH049fPc8Wa85mPf_w2WULjzd0hDt81HJ_WGw36vuriHy5e3mr-s1I7vhw7qo7fAtNKy8bd5nmy8QIag1mSSVIznJGiwweklpYa7QlVmkguGC5qsAapawslCKF1CppBGDIcEY40AwwT5XBklLDiSw055lCDF9zUumr0GhJ4jDJENrWp7r1iRP1MHTxKlYiKKfQpseTdtUp_p3p1iMob8oIyhFBef7st5v3-vC6RrS8lkaXT24dIpurVRKE6abGuSbyHDG8_3-TjAJ-AwAA__8sQ3Bg)

| | | | [****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEz8GO0zAQBuCncW6J7LE9oYccKFFBAiFWCKE9rSaxNzVkktRxWvXtkaOqHD3zWf_8xMsY3u-NqI8C4BzcKgCE_igALq83jtsf_vq5PP5AU17wO9u8hU8PeoUnnnoa_h5_vnS_fx1WbF-_fPOXl6t68nRf_BM_QivPFMY8rdvCNfrdSVP4RtWmNvpg4UNxbgAtOXJKoVPOG0TjLRKQ05IsuLoIDUiw0ioEbUFi1TlJWjtUdOgRbSeM3HMqYh9DT2pNN4pxnrnqZy7G5pzSsu6HnQScVt9v0Vc0eTenLAScxtD5mO7lsFF0-T2UTNMUJiq5K3ci9GlL_LbOW-y90O1_IgDzhr0LGwvdZr5PeuKFwjAJ3XInAInnbUpCt2AfIvmYf4A0qN5uURWxccstjGNYsRZGDnuv3OLawL8AAAD__9bFjWs)
[****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEz8GO0zAQBuCncW6J7LE9oYccKFFBAiFWCKE9rSaxNzVkktRxWvXtkaOqHD3zWf_8xMsY3u-NqI8C4BzcKgCE_igALq83jtsf_vq5PP5AU17wO9u8hU8PeoUnnnoa_h5_vnS_fx1WbF-_fPOXl6t68nRf_BM_QivPFMY8rdvCNfrdSVP4RtWmNvpg4UNxbgAtOXJKoVPOG0TjLRKQ05IsuLoIDUiw0ioEbUFi1TlJWjtUdOgRbSeM3HMqYh9DT2pNN4pxnrnqZy7G5pzSsu6HnQScVt9v0Vc0eTenLAScxtD5mO7lsFF0-T2UTNMUJiq5K3ci9GlL_LbOW-y90O1_IgDzhr0LGwvdZr5PeuKFwjAJ3XInAInnbUpCt2AfIvmYf4A0qN5uURWxccstjGNYsRZGDnuv3OLawL8AAAD__9bFjWs) Patriot,

I’m James O’Keefe, founder of O’Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we’re facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** —[**and I need your help**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEz8GO0zAQBuCncW6J7LE9oYccKFFBAiFWCKE9rSaxNzVkktRxWvXtkaOqHD3zWf_8xMsY3u-NqI8C4BzcKgCE_igALq83jtsf_vq5PP5AU17wO9u8hU8PeoUnnnoa_h5_vnS_fx1WbF-_fPOXl6t68nRf_BM_QivPFMY8rdvCNfrdSVP4RtWmNvpg4UNxbgAtOXJKoVPOG0TjLRKQ05IsuLoIDUiw0ioEbUFi1TlJWjtUdOgRbSeM3HMqYh9DT2pNN4pxnrnqZy7G5pzSsu6HnQScVt9v0Vc0eTenLAScxtD5mO7lsFF0-T2UTNMUJiq5K3ci9GlL_LbOW-y90O1_IgDzhr0LGwvdZr5PeuKFwjAJ3XInAInnbUpCt2AfIvmYf4A0qN5uURWxccstjGNYsRZGDnuv3OLawL8AAAD__9bFjWs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “** _Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

His baseless claims—defamation, fraud, wiretapping—**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, “This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment.”

If Mannina’s defamation claim wins, **it’s over for OMG**.

Our “American Swiper” program, which drives our exposés, could spark countless lawsuits from others we’ve exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I’m asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEz8GO0zAQBuCncW6J7LE9oYccKFFBAiFWCKE9rSaxNzVkktRxWvXtkaOqHD3zWf_8xMsY3u-NqI8C4BzcKgCE_igALq83jtsf_vq5PP5AU17wO9u8hU8PeoUnnnoa_h5_vnS_fx1WbF-_fPOXl6t68nRf_BM_QivPFMY8rdvCNfrdSVP4RtWmNvpg4UNxbgAtOXJKoVPOG0TjLRKQ05IsuLoIDUiw0ioEbUFi1TlJWjtUdOgRbSeM3HMqYh9DT2pNN4pxnrnqZy7G5pzSsu6HnQScVt9v0Vc0eTenLAScxtD5mO7lsFF0-T2UTNMUJiq5K3ci9GlL_LbOW-y90O1_IgDzhr0LGwvdZr5PeuKFwjAJ3XInAInnbUpCt2AfIvmYf4A0qN5uURWxccstjGNYsRZGDnuv3OLawL8AAAD__9bFjWs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEz8GO0zAQBuCncW6J7LE9oYccKFFBAiFWCKE9rSaxNzVkktRxWvXtkaOqHD3zWf_8xMsY3u-NqI8C4BzcKgCE_igALq83jtsf_vq5PP5AU17wO9u8hU8PeoUnnnoa_h5_vnS_fx1WbF-_fPOXl6t68nRf_BM_QivPFMY8rdvCNfrdSVP4RtWmNvpg4UNxbgAtOXJKoVPOG0TjLRKQ05IsuLoIDUiw0ioEbUFi1TlJWjtUdOgRbSeM3HMqYh9DT2pNN4pxnrnqZy7G5pzSsu6HnQScVt9v0Vc0eTenLAScxtD5mO7lsFF0-T2UTNMUJiq5K3ci9GlL_LbOW-y90O1_IgDzhr0LGwvdZr5PeuKFwjAJ3XInAInnbUpCt2AfIvmYf4A0qN5uURWxccstjGNYsRZGDnuv3OLawL8AAAD__9bFjWs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEz8GO0zAQBuCncW6J7LE9oYccKFFBAiFWCKE9rSaxNzVkktRxWvXtkaOqHD3zWf_8xMsY3u-NqI8C4BzcKgCE_igALq83jtsf_vq5PP5AU17wO9u8hU8PeoUnnnoa_h5_vnS_fx1WbF-_fPOXl6t68nRf_BM_QivPFMY8rdvCNfrdSVP4RtWmNvpg4UNxbgAtOXJKoVPOG0TjLRKQ05IsuLoIDUiw0ioEbUFi1TlJWjtUdOgRbSeM3HMqYh9DT2pNN4pxnrnqZy7G5pzSsu6HnQScVt9v0Vc0eTenLAScxtD5mO7lsFF0-T2UTNMUJiq5K3ci9GlL_LbOW-y90O1_IgDzhr0LGwvdZr5PeuKFwjAJ3XInAInnbUpCt2AfIvmYf4A0qN5uURWxccstjGNYsRZGDnuv3OLawL8AAAD__9bFjWs)

clean_body: On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after... | | | | Patriot, I’m James O’Keefe, founder of O’Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism. Right now, we’re facing a newly filed, federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere —. On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “ Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist ... I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump. His baseless claims—defamation, fraud, wiretapping—are meant to bankrupt us. As I told the Associated Press, “This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment.” If Mannina’s defamation claim wins, it’s over for OMG. Our “American Swiper” program, which drives our exposés, could spark countless lawsuits from others we’ve exposed, ending our work. We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default. Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom. More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to keep fighting corruption with the truth. Join The Fight Today, James O’Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win.
